    <BottomNavItem Href="/" Label="Home" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/search" Label="Search" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/inbox" Label="Inbox" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/profile" Label="Profile" />
</BottomNav>

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: Optional destination URL. When set, renders as an anchor; otherwise a button.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label. Required because FABs are usually icon-only. Defaults to "Primary action".

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked when the FAB is activated. Ignored when Href is set (the anchor navigates instead).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The icon (or other content) rendered inside the floating action button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked when the FAB is activated. Ignored when Href is set (the anchor navigates instead).

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: Destination URL. When set, item renders as an <a>; otherwise as a <button>.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Text label shown under the icon. Also used as the accessible name.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot (use Icon or <SvgGlyph>). The Content suffix avoids colliding with the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Badge
parameters.description: Optional badge (count, dot, or any content) shown on the icon. Int, string, or RenderFragment.

parameters.name: IconSize
parameters.description: Size class applied to the icon container. Defaults to h-5 w-5 to match the original visual. Override to fit larger content like avatars (e.g. "h-7 w-7").

parameters.name: IsActive
parameters.description: Manual active-state override. When null, active is inferred from the current route matching Href.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Click handler — fires for both <a> and <button> renderings (link navigation still proceeds).

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the item is pressed. Default is None. Scale is recommended for a tactile feel on mobile.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Click handler — fires for both <a> and <button> renderings (link navigation still proceeds).

Button.name: Button
Button.description: Versatile button with variants, sizes, icons, and loading states.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The button's label content. Hidden in favor of LoadingText while IsLoading is true (unless LoadingText is null).

parameters.name: LeftIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered before ChildContent. Hidden while IsLoading is true (replaced by the spinner).

parameters.name: RightIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered after ChildContent. Still shown while IsLoading is true.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style. Defaults to Default (solid primary color).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Button height/padding. Defaults to Default. Combines with Density to pick the final height.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-button density override. When null, the button inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, behaviour matches the historical Comfortable default. Only padding / row-height shifts between values — text size + radius are governed by Size.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true, the button stretches to fill its container's width (w-full). Default is false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked on click, after any cascaded trigger's own activation (Popover/Dropdown/Dialog AsChild) has run.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the button. On the <a> render path (see Href) this maps to aria-disabled plus non-interactive styling instead of a native disabled attribute.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, shows a spinner in place of LeftIcon and disables interaction (pointer-events-none), without visually dimming like Disabled.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Text shown next to the spinner while IsLoading is true. When null, ChildContent stays visible alongside the spinner instead.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: When set, the button renders as an <a href> styled exactly like a button — the Blazor-idiomatic polymorphism for the common "link that looks like a button" case (#269). All visual props (Variant/Size/icons) still apply; Disabled/IsLoading map to aria-disabled + non-interactive styling since a link can't be natively disabled. Leave null for a normal <button>.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: HTML button type. Defaults to Button — explicitly NOT submit. The HTML spec says <button> inside <form> defaults to type="submit", which would submit the form on every click. Lumeo defaults to a regular button so Buttons don't silently submit EditForm; opt in via Type="Submit".

parameters.name: StopPropagation
parameters.description: Stop click propagation to ancestors. Use this instead of the Razor directive @@onclick:stopPropagation on a Lumeo component — that directive creates an onclick parameter that case-insensitively collides with the OnClick parameter, producing a compile error. The directive only works natively on HTML elements; this parameter is the equivalent for the <button> element underneath.

parameters.name: PreventDefault
parameters.description: Prevent the default click action on the underlying <button> element. Same rationale as StopPropagation — Razor's @@onclick:preventDefault directive collides case-insensitively with the OnClick parameter on components.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the button is pressed down. Default is None (no press animation — original behaviour).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked on click, after any cascaded trigger's own activation (Popover/Dropdown/Dialog AsChild) has run.

enums.name: ButtonPressEffect
enums.description: Visual press feedback style for Button.

examples.title: Variants

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The buttons (or button-like elements, e.g. link-buttons or Toggle) to render as a single visually-joined group.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root role="group" element.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Layout direction: Horizontal (default) joins children left-to-right with rounded end-caps; Vertical stacks them top-to-bottom.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the button group (exposes it to AT as a named role="group"). Roving tabindex is intentionally NOT forced here — a ButtonGroup commonly wraps independent actions that each need their own tab stop; use Toolbar for single-tab-stop/arrow-key navigation. (#270)

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root role="group" element.

Calendar.name: Calendar
Calendar.description: Date picker calendar grid with single, range, and multi-select modes.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected day in single-selection mode. Ignored when IsRange or IsMultiple is set. Pair with ValueChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised after a day is selected in single-selection mode.

parameters.name: MinDate
parameters.description: Earliest selectable day. Days before it render disabled and the "previous month" navigation stops at the containing month.

parameters.name: MaxDate
parameters.description: Latest selectable day. Days after it render disabled and the "next month" navigation stops at the containing month.

parameters.name: IsRange
parameters.description: When true, the grid selects a start/end range instead of a single day. Takes precedence over Value selection.

parameters.name: RangeStart
parameters.description: The range's start day in range-selection mode. Pair with RangeStartChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: RangeStartChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the range's start day changes.

parameters.name: RangeEnd
parameters.description: The range's end day in range-selection mode. Pair with RangeEndChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: RangeEndChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the range's end day changes.

parameters.name: IsMultiple
parameters.description: When true the grid selects a set of independent days: clicking a day (or Enter/Space on it) toggles it in/out of Values. Takes precedence over single Value selection; ignored when IsRange is set.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The selected days in multiple-selection mode. Pair with ValuesChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: ValuesChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the selected set changes in multiple-selection mode (IsMultiple).

parameters.name: NumberOfMonths
parameters.description: Number of month panels rendered side by side. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: ShowWeekNumbers
parameters.description: When true, adds a leading column showing each row's ISO week number. Default is false.

parameters.name: ShowYearPicker
parameters.description: Convenience shortcut that opens the calendar straight into the year-picker view, overriding InitialView. Default is false.

parameters.name: InitialView
parameters.description: The view (days/months/years) the calendar first renders. Defaults to Days; overridden by ShowYearPicker.

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Predicate that marks individual dates as non-selectable, in addition to the MinDate/MaxDate bounds.

parameters.name: DateClass
parameters.description: Returns extra CSS classes to append to a specific day's button, e.g. to highlight holidays or booked dates.

parameters.name: DateTooltip
parameters.description: Optional per-date tooltip text. Returned string is shown via the styled Lumeo <Tooltip> on hover/focus (not the native browser title attribute). Return null or empty for no tooltip on that date. Useful for booking calendars: "Booked by John, 14:00–17:00" or "Sold out".

parameters.name: DateBadge
parameters.description: Optional per-date indicator slot. Returns a RenderFragment rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell — good for status dots, count badges, icons. Return null for no badge on that date. The slot is non-interactive (pointer-events-none) so clicks still hit the day button.

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: The day of the week to render in the leftmost column. When null (default), uses CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.DateTimeFormat.FirstDayOfWeek — so de-DE / fr-FR / etc. start on Monday automatically, en-US on Sunday. Pass an explicit DayOfWeek to override.

parameters.name: SwipeEnabled
parameters.description: When true (default), users can swipe left/right on the day grid to navigate to the next or previous month on touch devices. Vertical page scroll is unaffected (touch-action: pan-y). Set to false to disable swipe navigation.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised after a day is selected in single-selection mode.

events.name: RangeStartChanged
events.description: Raised when the range's start day changes.

events.name: RangeEndChanged
events.description: Raised when the range's end day changes.

events.name: ValuesChanged
events.description: Raised when the selected set changes in multiple-selection mode (IsMultiple).

examples.title: Default
examples.code: <Calendar @bind-Value="_selectedDate" />

examples.title: Date Range Display
examples.code: @if (_checkIn.HasValue) { Check-in: @_checkIn.Value.ToString("MMM d, yyyy") }

examples.title: Pre-selected Date
examples.code:
<Calendar @bind-Value="_date" />

@code {
    private DateOnly? _date = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today);
}

examples.title: Min & Max Date
examples.code:
<Calendar @bind-Value="_date" MinDate="@_minDate" MaxDate="@_maxDate" />

@code {
    private DateOnly? _date;
    private DateOnly _minDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today.AddDays(-7));
    private DateOnly _maxDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today.AddDays(30));
}

Card.name: Card
Card.description: Flexible container with header, content, and footer slots.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The card's content — typically composed from CardHeader, CardContent, and CardFooter, though any markup is valid.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the card's root div, after the variant/interactive/press-effect classes.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Optional click handler. When set, the card becomes a button-role interactive surface with cursor-pointer, focus-visible ring, keyboard activation, and honours PressEffect.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the card is pressed (only applies when OnClick is bound). Default is None.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Surface style — four tiers, matching the depth ramp of shadcn (bordered → shadow), Radix Themes (ghost|surface|classic) and MudBlazor (Outlined / Elevation): Default — bordered card with the card background (no shadow). Flat — drops the border + card background; a content-only surface that (with OnClick) is the natural primitive for clickable list rows, replacing the Ghost button + !p-0 workaround. Outline — bordered but with a transparent fill, so the page background shows through; for cards layered on a coloured/!card surface. Elevated — bordered card background plus a shadow-sm for a raised, floating feel (shadcn's default Card depth).

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-card density override. Tightens internal padding when rendered inside dense layouts (DataGrid row, dashboard tile grid). Falls back to ancestor DensityScope or Comfortable.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root element (e.g. id, data-*, ARIA overrides).

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Optional click handler. When set, the card becomes a button-role interactive surface with cursor-pointer, focus-visible ring, keyboard activation, and honours PressEffect.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Notifications</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">You have 3 unread messages.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">Your recent notifications will appear here.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
        <Button Class="w-full">Mark all as read</Button>

        <Center Class="w-32 h-32 rounded-l-lg bg-muted shrink-0">
            <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Star)" class="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground" />
        </Center>
        <Stack Gap="0" Class="flex-1">
            <CardHeader>
                <Heading Level="3" Size="base" Weight="semibold" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Featured Article</Heading>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">5 min read</Lumeo.Text>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">
                    An introduction to modern component-driven design systems.
                </Lumeo.Text>
            </CardContent>
            <CardFooter>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Link" Class="px-0">Read more</Button>
            </CardFooter>
        </Stack>
    </Flex>

examples.title: With Form
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Create project</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Deploy your new project in one click.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <Stack Gap="4">
            <FormField Label="Name">
                <Input placeholder="Name of your project" />
            </FormField>
            <FormField Label="Description">
                <Input placeholder="Describe your project" />
            </FormField>
        </Stack>
    </CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
        <Flex Justify="between" Class="w-full">
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
            <Button>Deploy</Button>
        </Flex>
    </CardFooter>
</Card>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The card body content, rendered below the header with horizontal and bottom padding but no top padding (it abuts CardHeader's bottom spacing).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the section's root div, after the density-driven padding classes.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

parameters.name: ChildContent

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root p element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root p element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The footer content — commonly actions or metadata — laid out in a horizontal, vertically-centered flex row.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the footer's root div, after the density-driven padding classes.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The header content, typically a CardTitle and optional CardDescription stacked with vertical spacing.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the header's root div, after the density-driven padding classes.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The title text or markup, rendered as a semibold h3 heading.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root h3 element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root h3 element.

Carousel.name: Carousel
Carousel.description: Slide-based content rotator with autoplay and keyboard nav.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Axis the deck scrolls and navigates along. Horizontal (default) uses Left/Right arrow keys; Vertical uses Up/Down.

parameters.name: Loop
parameters.description: Wraps navigation from the last slide back to the first (and vice versa) instead of stopping at the ends.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables all navigation — Prev/Next buttons, indicator dots, keyboard arrows, swipe, and autoplay.

parameters.name: Autoplay
parameters.description: Advance slides automatically on a timer. Pairs well with Loop so the deck wraps instead of stopping at the end.

parameters.name: AutoplayInterval
parameters.description: Autoplay tick interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 4000.

parameters.name: PauseOnHover
parameters.description: Pause autoplay while the pointer is over the carousel or focus is inside it (so users can read / interact). Defaults to true.

parameters.name: ShowIndicators
parameters.description: Render clickable indicator dots (one per slide) below the deck.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The carousel's slides, normally a sequence of CarouselContent wrapping CarouselItems plus any nav/indicator components.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root region element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root region element.

records.name: CarouselContext
records.signature:
CarouselContext(
        string ContentId,
        Lumeo.Orientation Orientation,
        bool CanScrollPrev,
        bool CanScrollNext,
        EventCallback ScrollPrev,
        EventCallback ScrollNext,
        Action<object> RegisterItem,
        Action<object> UnregisterItem
    )

@index

@product.Category

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The deck's CarouselItem slides, laid out in a scroll-snapping row (or column).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer clipping wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the outer clipping wrapper.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The slide's content.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: 1-based position of this slide, used together with Total to build the accessible "Slide N of M" label. Optional — leave both unset to omit the label.

parameters.name: Total
parameters.description: Total number of slides in the deck, paired with Index for the accessible "Slide N of M" label.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the slide's group element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the slide's group element.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the button element.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the button element.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected path of option values, from root to leaf (e.g. ["region", "state", "city"]). null or empty means nothing is selected.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the selected path changes — a leaf option is picked or the selection is cleared. Binding it makes Value controlled.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: The hierarchical option tree the cascader drills into, one column per level.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown in the trigger when nothing is selected. Defaults to the localized "Cascader.Placeholder" string.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the dropdown from opening.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows a clear ("x") button in the trigger when a selection exists, letting the user reset Value to null in one click.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Shows a search box at the top of the dropdown that filters the root column (and any column whose descendants match) by label.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering an asterisk next to Label and setting aria-required on the trigger.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state on the trigger. Also set implicitly when a wrapping FormField reports a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true (and the cascader is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there is no error (and the cascader is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the trigger. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label instead.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The form field name, forwarded for consistency with other form controls (not rendered directly by this component).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger's wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Fired when the selected path changes — a leaf option is picked or the selection is cleared. Binding it makes Value controlled.

records.name: CascaderOption
records.signature: CascaderOption

examples.code: <Cascader Options="@_options" Disabled="true" />

Center.name: Center
Center.description: Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Explicit CSS height (e.g. "100vh", "20rem") applied as an inline style. When unset, defaults to h-full so the element fills its parent's height.

parameters.name: Inline
parameters.description: When true, uses inline-flex instead of flex for the centering container. Default is false.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The content to center both horizontally and vertically.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element.

</Center>

</Center>

Chart.name: Chart
Chart.description: Declarative chart wrapper over ECharts — 30+ types supported.

parameters.name: Option
parameters.description: Typed ECharts option to render. Ignored when OptionJson is set.

parameters.name: OptionJson
parameters.description: Raw ECharts option as a JSON string, used instead of Option when set — an escape hatch for option shapes not covered by the typed model.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Declarative children — ChartThreshold and ChartReferenceZone. Other content renders nothing visible.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: ECharts theme name (or registered custom theme) applied on init; changing it disposes and reinitializes the underlying chart instance.

parameters.name: EChartsSource
parameters.description: URL of the ECharts UMD bundle to load. Falls back to the library-bundled version when not set.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible text alternative for the chart (WCAG 1.1.1). When set, the canvas host is exposed as role="img" with this aria-label so screen readers announce a summary instead of an empty graphic. Strongly recommended.

parameters.name: AccessibilityLayer
parameters.description: When true (default, matching shadcn's accessibilityLayer), the chart renders a visually-hidden data table built from the series data and makes the canvas host keyboard-focusable with a summarising aria-label, so screen-reader and keyboard users can reach the otherwise opaque <canvas> data. When AriaLabel is not set, a generated summary of the data is used as the label. Set to false to opt out entirely.

parameters.name: MaxAccessibilityRows
parameters.description: Upper bound on the number of data rows the hidden screen-reader table materialises (default DefaultMaxAccessibilityRows). A big series would otherwise emit one hidden <tr> per data point — thousands of rows of DOM bloat that no assistive tech can usefully navigate. Above the cap the table keeps the first N rows plus a single "… and N more data points" row; the host's summarising aria-label is built from the FULL data so its totals stay accurate. Set to 0 (or negative) to disable the cap and render every row.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: CSS width of the chart container. Defaults to 100%.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the chart container. Defaults to 350px.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked with the ECharts click-event payload when the user clicks a chart element.

parameters.name: OnMouseOver
parameters.description: Invoked with the ECharts mouseover-event payload when the pointer hovers a chart element.

parameters.name: ShowLoading
parameters.description: When true, shows ECharts' built-in loading spinner overlay — distinct from the skeleton driven by IsLoading.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.description: Chart group name used to sync cursor/zoom interactions across multiple charts sharing the same group.

parameters.name: AspectRatio
parameters.description: CSS aspect-ratio applied to the container instead of a fixed Height (e.g. 16/9).

parameters.name: OnDoubleClick
parameters.description: Invoked with the ECharts event payload when the user double-clicks a chart element.

parameters.name: OnBrushSelected
parameters.description: Invoked with the ECharts event payload when the user completes a brush selection.

parameters.name: OnDataZoom
parameters.description: Invoked with the ECharts event payload when the user zooms or pans via data zoom.

parameters.name: OnInitError
parameters.description: Invoked with the error message when ECharts fails to initialize (e.g. an invalid EChartsSource).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) applied to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, forces the loading state on top of the chart (consumer is refetching data). Independent of the JS-driven ECharts loading indicator controlled by ShowLoading.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingSkeleton
parameters.description: When true (default), renders the loading state while the chart has not yet rendered for the first time, and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out entirely.

parameters.name: SkeletonKind
parameters.description: Shape family for the skeleton. Each chart wrapper presets a sensible default (bars for Bar, pie ring for Pie, etc.) — consumers only override when they want a different silhouette.

parameters.name: SkeletonStyle
parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with synthesized placeholder data in a muted palette; ECharts animates the option swap to real data. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG overlay skeleton.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds — each tick regenerates the placeholder dataset with a new random seed so bars/lines/slices visibly redistribute while loading. Defaults to 1400ms; clamped to ≥200ms.

parameters.name: PhantomShapeOverride
parameters.description: Explicit override for the phantom layout (category count, series count, stacking, area fill). When null (default), the shape is inferred from the real Option so the phantom mirrors the actual chart structure.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), overlays a small top-right pill containing a spinner and LoadingText on top of the active skeleton — a clear, always-on visual cue that the chart is loading. The pill renders independently of SkeletonStyle so phantom and silhouette both get the same hint. Set to false for bare visuals where the skeleton speaks for itself.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to null or empty to hide the text and show only the spinner. When not set, uses the active locale's "Chart.Loading" string (default: "Loading…").

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked with the ECharts click-event payload when the user clicks a chart element.

events.name: OnMouseOver
events.description: Invoked with the ECharts mouseover-event payload when the pointer hovers a chart element.

events.name: OnDoubleClick
events.description: Invoked with the ECharts event payload when the user double-clicks a chart element.

events.name: OnBrushSelected
events.description: Invoked with the ECharts event payload when the user completes a brush selection.

events.name: OnDataZoom
events.description: Invoked with the ECharts event payload when the user zooms or pans via data zoom.

events.name: OnInitError
events.description: Invoked with the error message when ECharts fails to initialize (e.g. an invalid EChartsSource).

enums.name: ChartLabelStrategy
enums.description: Strategy for rendering category-axis labels on cartesian charts.

enums.name: ChartSkeletonKind
enums.description: Shape family for ChartSkeleton. Each value renders a different SVG silhouette that matches the shape of an actual chart, so loading states don't cause layout shift or empty whitespace flicker before ECharts mounts.

enums.name: ChartSkeletonStyle
enums.description: How the loading state's visual is presented. Phantom = render the real chart with synthesized data in a muted palette and morph to real data via ECharts' option-change animation (default — feels continuous). Silhouette = fall back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay. A small "Loading…" pill (spinner + label) is overlaid on TOP of whichever style is chosen via ShowLoadingLabel so users never mistake the cycling phantom data for a bug. The label can be disabled per-chart for bare visuals.

enums.name: ChartThresholdAxis
enums.description: Which axis a threshold is perpendicular to. Horizontal = a yAxis line spanning the chart width; Vertical = an xAxis line spanning the chart height.

parameters.name: Categories
parameters.description: Category labels along the axis, one per data point; series values are matched to these by index.

parameters.name: Series
parameters.description: The series to plot, each with a name and its list of values aligned to Categories by index.

parameters.name: Smooth
parameters.description: When true, renders the line using a smoothed (curved) interpolation instead of straight segments between points.

parameters.name: ShowDots
parameters.description: When true (default), draws a marker dot at each data point on the line.

parameters.name: Stacked
parameters.description: When true, stacks each series on top of the previous one instead of overlaying them independently.

parameters.name: Gradient
parameters.description: When true (default) the fill uses a lighter opacity than a solid area. This is the legacy opacity-only behaviour and is unaffected by GradientFill.

parameters.name: GradientFill
parameters.description: Opt into a real vertical gradient fill: each series' area fades from its own (brand/theme) colour at the top to transparent at the bottom, the look used by modern dashboards. Off by default so existing charts are unchanged. Override the stops with GradientStops.

parameters.name: GradientStops
parameters.description: Explicit gradient colour-stops applied to every series' area fill when set (implies GradientFill). Offsets run 0 (top) → 1 (bottom); colours accept theme tokens like var(--color-primary). When null and GradientFill is true, a per-series colour → transparent fade is used.

parameters.name: ShowLegend
parameters.description: When true (default), renders a legend listing each series/segment name.

parameters.name: ShowTooltip
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a tooltip with the value(s) under the cursor on hover.

parameters.name: Colors
parameters.description: Explicit colors, in series/segment order. Falls back to the active theme's chart palette when not set and ColorPalette is not set.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: CSS width of the chart container. Defaults to 100%.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the chart container. Defaults to 350px.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: ECharts theme name (or registered custom theme) applied to the chart. Falls back to the library default when not set.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) applied to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Declarative annotation children — ChartThreshold and ChartReferenceZone. Forwarded to the underlying Chart.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, overlays a shape-aware loading skeleton on top of the chart (consumer is fetching data). Flips back to the real chart once set to false.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingSkeleton
parameters.description: When true (default), renders a shape-aware skeleton while the chart has not yet mounted and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out.

parameters.name: SkeletonKind
parameters.description: Shape family for the loading skeleton. Defaults to ChartSkeletonKind.Area for this chart type; override if you want a different silhouette.

parameters.name: SkeletonStyle
parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with placeholder data and morphs to real data via ECharts' option-change animation. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds. Lower = faster data cycling while loading. Defaults to 1400.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a small "Loading…" pill in the top-right corner whenever IsLoading is active. Works on top of any SkeletonStyle.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to empty to hide. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: ShowDataLabels
parameters.description: When true, renders a label with each data point's value directly on the chart.

parameters.name: LabelPosition
parameters.description: Placement of the value label relative to its data point (e.g. top, inside). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelFormat
parameters.description: ECharts label formatter string/template applied to the value labels (e.g. {c}%). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelStrategy
parameters.description: Controls category-axis label rendering. Smart auto-rotates at higher densities; ShowAll forces all horizontal; Auto thins overlapping labels.

parameters.name: LabelRotate
parameters.description: Manual rotation override (degrees) for category-axis labels.

parameters.name: DataZoom
parameters.description: When true, adds a zoom/pan slider (plus inside wheel-zoom) so users can navigate large datasets.

parameters.name: Toolbox
parameters.description: When true, shows the ECharts toolbox (save-as-image, restore, data-zoom) in the corner of the chart.

parameters.name: ColorPalette
parameters.description: Explicit ordered color palette applied to the chart's series/segments; takes precedence over Colors when both are set.

parameters.name: AnimationDuration
parameters.description: Duration (in milliseconds) of the chart's entrance/update animation. Uses ECharts' default when not set.

parameters.name: AnimationEasing

parameters.name: LabelStrategy
parameters.description: Controls how category-axis labels are rendered. Smart (default): show every label; auto-rotate -30° at 11–16 categories, -60° at 17–24, -75° above 24. ShowAll: force every label with no rotation (may overlap on dense datasets). Auto: let ECharts auto-thin labels that would overlap (original ECharts default — hides every second label when crowded).

parameters.description: Manual override for category-label rotation in degrees (e.g. -30, -45). When set, takes precedence over the rotation implied by LabelStrategy.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered along the line. Null or empty hides it.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Hex / CSS colour for the line. When null ECharts inherits the series colour.

parameters.name: LineStyle
parameters.description: Line style passed to ECharts — "solid", "dashed", or "dotted". Defaults to "dashed" for visual distinction from data lines.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The tooltip body. Receives the current ChartTooltipContext for the hovered point. The fragment is re-rendered into the chart's hidden tooltip portal on every hover; ECharts pulls the portal's innerHTML into the tooltip box.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Extra classes for the rendered tooltip wrapper inside the portal. Lets consumers theme the tooltip without restyling the whole portal.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes flow through to the portal <div> so consumers can attach id, data-*, ARIA attributes etc. to the rendered tooltip wrapper without restyling the whole portal.

parameters.description: Optional mark-line configuration (e.g. average/threshold lines) applied to the first series.

parameters.name: MarkPoint
parameters.description: Optional mark-point configuration (e.g. max/min markers) applied to the first series.

parameters.name: MarkArea
parameters.description: Optional mark-area configuration (e.g. shaded threshold bands) applied to the first series.

parameters.name: OptionOverride
parameters.description: Raw ECharts option fragment merged over the generated option after all other parameters are applied — an escape hatch for options this component doesn't expose directly.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Fill ratio between 0 and 1 that the liquid level represents.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Text rendered inside the shape, above the fill level.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Outline shape the liquid fills (e.g. circle, rect, diamond, pin, triangle). Defaults to circle.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Fill (wave) color.

parameters.name: BackgroundColor
parameters.description: Color of the unfilled portion of the shape.

parameters.name: WaveAnimation
parameters.description: When true (default), animates the wave surface.

parameters.name: EChartsSource
parameters.description: URL of the ECharts UMD bundle to load before the liquidfill extension is registered. Falls back to the library default when not set.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: CSS width of the chart container. Defaults to 100%.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the chart container. Defaults to 350px.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: ECharts theme name (or registered custom theme) applied to the chart. Falls back to the library default when not set.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) applied to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, overlays a shape-aware loading skeleton on top of the chart (consumer is fetching data). Flips back to the real chart once set to false.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingSkeleton
parameters.description: When true (default), renders a shape-aware skeleton while the chart has not yet mounted and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out.

parameters.name: SkeletonKind
parameters.description: Shape family for the loading skeleton. Defaults to ChartSkeletonKind.Pie for this chart type; override if you want a different silhouette.

parameters.name: SkeletonStyle
parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with placeholder data and morphs to real data via ECharts' option-change animation. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds. Lower = faster data cycling while loading. Defaults to 1400.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a small "Loading…" pill in the top-right corner whenever IsLoading is active. Works on top of any SkeletonStyle.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to empty to hide. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: ShowDataLabels
parameters.description: When true, renders a label with each data point's value directly on the chart.

parameters.name: LabelPosition
parameters.description: Placement of the value label relative to its data point (e.g. top, inside). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelFormat
parameters.description: ECharts label formatter string/template applied to the value labels (e.g. {c}%). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: Toolbox
parameters.description: When true, shows the ECharts toolbox (save-as-image, restore, data-zoom) in the corner of the chart.

parameters.name: ColorPalette
parameters.description: Explicit ordered color palette merged into the generated option's top-level color list.

parameters.name: AnimationDuration
parameters.description: Duration (in milliseconds) of the chart's entrance/update animation. Uses ECharts' default when not set.

parameters.name: AnimationEasing
parameters.description: ECharts easing function name (e.g. cubicOut) used for the chart's entrance/update animation.

parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with placeholder data and morphs to real data via ECharts' option-change animation. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds. Lower = faster data cycling while loading. Defaults to 1400.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a small "Loading…" pill in the top-right corner whenever IsLoading is active. Works on top of any SkeletonStyle.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to empty to hide. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: ShowDataLabels
parameters.description: When true, renders a label with each data point's value directly on the chart.

parameters.name: LabelPosition
parameters.description: Placement of the value label relative to its data point (e.g. top, inside). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelFormat
parameters.description: ECharts label formatter string/template applied to the value labels (e.g. {c}%). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with placeholder data and morphs to real data via ECharts' option-change animation. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds. Lower = faster data cycling while loading. Defaults to 1400.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a small "Loading…" pill in the top-right corner whenever IsLoading is active. Works on top of any SkeletonStyle.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to empty to hide. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: ShowDataLabels
parameters.description: When true, renders a label with each data point's value directly on the chart.

parameters.name: LabelPosition
parameters.description: Placement of the value label relative to its data point (e.g. top, inside). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelFormat
parameters.description: ECharts label formatter string/template applied to the value labels (e.g. {c}%). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelStrategy
parameters.description: Controls category-axis label rendering. Smart auto-rotates at higher densities; ShowAll forces all horizontal; Auto thins overlapping labels.

parameters.name: LabelRotate
parameters.description: Manual rotation override (degrees) for category-axis labels.

parameters.name: DataZoom
parameters.description: When true, adds a zoom/pan slider (plus inside wheel-zoom) so users can navigate large datasets.

parameters.name: Toolbox
parameters.description: When true, shows the ECharts toolbox (save-as-image, restore, data-zoom) in the corner of the chart.

parameters.name: ColorPalette
parameters.description: Explicit ordered color palette applied to the chart's series/segments; takes precedence over Colors when both are set.

parameters.name: AnimationDuration
parameters.description: Duration (in milliseconds) of the chart's entrance/update animation. Uses ECharts' default when not set.

parameters.name: AnimationEasing
parameters.description: ECharts easing function name (e.g. cubicOut) used for the chart's entrance/update animation.

parameters.name: MarkLine
parameters.description: Optional mark-line configuration (e.g. average/threshold lines) applied to the first series.

parameters.name: MarkPoint
parameters.description: Optional mark-point configuration (e.g. max/min markers) applied to the first series.

parameters.name: MarkArea
parameters.description: Optional mark-area configuration (e.g. shaded threshold bands) applied to the first series.

parameters.name: OptionOverride
parameters.description: Raw ECharts option fragment merged over the generated option after all other parameters are applied — an escape hatch for options this component doesn't expose directly.

parameters.name: Words
parameters.description: Word/weight pairs; each word's rendered font size scales with its weight.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Outline shape the word cloud is packed into (e.g. circle, cardioid, diamond, triangle, star). Defaults to circle.

parameters.name: SizeRange
parameters.description: Minimum and maximum font size (px), as a two-element array, that words are scaled between.

parameters.name: RotationRange
parameters.description: Minimum and maximum rotation angle (degrees), as a two-element array, applied to words.

parameters.name: EChartsSource
parameters.description: URL of the ECharts UMD bundle to load before the wordcloud extension is registered. Falls back to the library default when not set.

parameters.name: ShowTooltip
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a tooltip with the value(s) under the cursor on hover.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: CSS width of the chart container. Defaults to 100%.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the chart container. Defaults to 350px.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: ECharts theme name (or registered custom theme) applied to the chart. Falls back to the library default when not set.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) applied to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the chart's root element.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, overlays a shape-aware loading skeleton on top of the chart (consumer is fetching data). Flips back to the real chart once set to false.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingSkeleton
parameters.description: When true (default), renders a shape-aware skeleton while the chart has not yet mounted and whenever IsLoading is true. Set to false to opt out.

parameters.name: SkeletonKind
parameters.description: Shape family for the loading skeleton. Defaults to ChartSkeletonKind.Generic for this chart type; override if you want a different silhouette.

parameters.name: SkeletonStyle
parameters.description: Phantom (default) renders the real chart with placeholder data and morphs to real data via ECharts' option-change animation. Silhouette falls back to the legacy SVG skeleton overlay.

parameters.name: PhantomCycleMs
parameters.description: Phantom-mode refresh interval in milliseconds. Lower = faster data cycling while loading. Defaults to 1400.

parameters.name: ShowLoadingLabel
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a small "Loading…" pill in the top-right corner whenever IsLoading is active. Works on top of any SkeletonStyle.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Label rendered next to the spinner inside the loading pill. Set to empty to hide. Defaults to "Loading…".

parameters.name: ShowDataLabels
parameters.description: When true, renders a label with each data point's value directly on the chart.

parameters.name: LabelPosition
parameters.description: Placement of the value label relative to its data point (e.g. top, inside). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: LabelFormat
parameters.description: ECharts label formatter string/template applied to the value labels (e.g. {c}%). Only applies when ShowDataLabels is true.

parameters.name: Toolbox
parameters.description: When true, shows the ECharts toolbox (save-as-image, restore, data-zoom) in the corner of the chart.

parameters.name: ColorPalette
parameters.description: Explicit ordered color palette merged into the generated option's top-level color list.

parameters.name: AnimationDuration
parameters.description: Duration (in milliseconds) of the chart's entrance/update animation. Uses ECharts' default when not set.

parameters.name: AnimationEasing
parameters.description: ECharts easing function name (e.g. cubicOut) used for the chart's entrance/update animation.

parameters.name: OptionOverride
parameters.description: Raw ECharts option fragment merged over the generated option after all other parameters are applied — an escape hatch for options this component doesn't expose directly.

Checkbox.name: Checkbox
Checkbox.description: Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

parameters.name: Checked
parameters.description: Whether the checkbox is checked. Pair with CheckedChanged for two-way binding. Ignored visually while IsIndeterminate is true.

parameters.name: CheckedChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user toggles the checkbox.

parameters.name: IsIndeterminate
parameters.description: Renders the dash ("mixed") visual instead of check/empty. Clicking clears it and checks the box. Pair with IsIndeterminateChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: IsIndeterminateChanged
parameters.description: Raised when IsIndeterminate is cleared by a user click.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables interaction and dims the checkbox.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Visible label text rendered next to the checkbox. When unset, use AriaLabel instead so the control still has an accessible name.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional helper text rendered under Label, wired to the control via aria-describedby.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: Explicit element id for the checkbox button. When inside a FormField, the field's generated control id takes precedence. Falls back to an auto-generated id.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name used when Label is not set (the checkbox renders without a visible label). Required for WCAG compliance when the checkbox sits alone in a cell or alongside text that isn't linked to it via for / htmlFor.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the checkmark draws itself in via stroke-dasharray and the box plays a subtle 200ms scale bounce on check. Default is false.

parameters.name: HapticFeedback
parameters.description: When true, triggers a short haptic vibration via navigator.vibrate() each time the checkbox state changes. Silently no-ops on browsers without the Vibration API (e.g. iOS Safari). Default is false.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required: sets aria-required and renders a destructive-colored asterisk after Label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual and aria-invalid, independent of any cascaded FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the control when invalid and not composed inside a FormField (which owns its own error display).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control when not invalid and not composed inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for the hidden native bubble input, so the checkbox participates in a plain <form> POST. Falls back to the cascaded FormField's name when unset.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Value submitted for this checkbox in a native <form> POST when Name is set and the box is checked. Mirrors the native checkbox default of "on".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the checkbox button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the checkbox button element (an explicit id is ignored when inside a FormField).

events.name: CheckedChanged
events.description: Raised when the user toggles the checkbox.

events.name: IsIndeterminateChanged
events.description: Raised when IsIndeterminate is cleared by a user click.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
    <Checkbox @bind-Checked="_checked" />
    <Label>Accept terms and conditions</Label>
</Flex>

examples.code:

    <Label>Enable notifications</Label>
</Flex>
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Checked: @_checked</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private bool _checked = true;
}

examples.code:

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The chip's label content, wrapped in a <span> between the leading icon/avatar and the close button.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Surface style: Default is a filled bg-secondary pill, Outline is bordered with a transparent fill, and Solid fills with the palette selected by Color.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Palette used by Solid — one of primary, destructive, success, or warning. Any other value (including null) falls back to the secondary palette.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Chip size, driving text size, corner radius, avatar/close-icon dimensions, and (together with Density) the padding.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-chip density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the padding shifts — text size + radius stay governed by Size.

parameters.name: Closable
parameters.description: Shows a trailing remove (X) button. Clicking it invokes OnClose instead of OnClick (the click is stopped from propagating to the chip itself).

parameters.name: OnClose
parameters.description: Raised when the remove (X) button is clicked. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

parameters.name: Clickable
parameters.description: Makes the chip itself an interactive role="button" surface — clickable and keyboard-activatable (Enter/Space) — invoking OnClick.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Raised on click or Enter/Space when Clickable is true. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the chip: suppresses OnClick and OnClose, and applies a dimmed, non-interactive style.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Leading icon glyph string, rendered before ChildContent. Ignored when Avatar is set; takes precedence over IconContent.

parameters.name: Avatar
parameters.description: Leading avatar image URL, rendered as a rounded thumbnail before ChildContent. Takes precedence over Icon and IconContent.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the chip is pressed (only applies when Clickable is true). Default is None.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the chip's root div, after the size/variant/interactive classes.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

events.name: OnClose
events.description: Raised when the remove (X) button is clicked. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Raised on click or Enter/Space when Clickable is true. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    <Chip>Default</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Outline">Outline</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="primary">Primary</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="destructive">Destructive</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="success">Success</Chip>
</ChipGroup>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Flex Class="items-center gap-2">
    <Chip Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm">Small</Chip>
    <Chip>Default</Chip>
    <Chip Size="Lumeo.Size.Lg">Large</Chip>
</Flex>

examples.title: Closable
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    @foreach (var tag in _tags)
    {
        var t = tag;
        <Chip Closable="true" OnClose="@(() => _tags.Remove(t))">@t</Chip>
    }
</ChipGroup>

examples.title: Clickable
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    @foreach (var filter in _filters)
    {
        var f = filter;
        <Chip Clickable="true"
              Variant="@(_active == f ? Chip.ChipVariant.Solid : Chip.ChipVariant.Outline)"
              Color="@(_active == f ? "primary" : null)"
              OnClick="@(() => _active = f)">
            @f
        </Chip>
    }
</ChipGroup>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's Chip children, laid out in a wrapping flex row.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

Code.name: Code
Code.description: Inline or block monospace code snippet with optional copy button.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Rendering style: "inline" (default) renders a compact inline <code> chip; "block" renders a padded, scrollable code block with preserved whitespace.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Optional text-size utility suffix (e.g. "sm", "lg") appended as text-{Size}. Leave unset to use the variant's default size.

parameters.name: Source
parameters.description: Raw source to render (block variant). When set together with Highlighter the output is syntax-highlighted; otherwise the source is rendered as escaped plain text. Falls back to ChildContent when null. (#196)

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Language hint (e.g. "csharp", "ts") — emitted as data-language and passed to Highlighter.

parameters.name: Highlighter
parameters.description: Pluggable syntax highlighter: (code, language) => safe HTML. Plug in Prism / Shiki / highlight.js (or a server-side highlighter). The delegate MUST return SAFE HTML — escape untrusted source. Core ships no built-in highlighter on purpose (dependency-free), mirroring StreamingText.MarkdownRenderer. Ignored unless Source is set.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Content rendered as-is when Source is null. Use for static markup/content instead of a plain source string.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <code> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <code> element.

CodeEditor.name: CodeEditor
CodeEditor.description: Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The document text. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; when bound, an incoming change that doesn't match the last value this editor pushed is treated as authoritative and rolls CodeMirror back via setValue. Unbound (uncontrolled) usage only re-syncs on a genuine parameter change, so the caret and in-flight typing survive unrelated re-renders.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised on every edit with the document's current text.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Source language. Currently supported: csharp, javascript, typescript, html, css, json, markdown, xml, sql, python, plaintext. Unknown values fall back to plaintext.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: light | dark | auto (follows page theme via the `dark` class on <html>).

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the editor viewport (e.g. 400px, 100%). Applied as an inline style on the CodeMirror host element.

parameters.name: LineNumbers
parameters.description: Shows the gutter line-number column. Default true.

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Makes the document non-editable (CodeMirror's read-only mode) and sets role="document" instead of role="textbox" for assistive tech.

parameters.name: ShowMinimap
parameters.description: Shows a scrollbar-side minimap of the document. CodeMirror 6 has no built-in minimap, so this lazily loads the @@replit/codemirror-minimap extension from EsmBase on first enable. If that import fails (e.g. offline with no self-hosted copy of the package) the editor degrades gracefully — the rest of the editor keeps working, just without a minimap. Toggling at runtime adds/removes the extension without losing selection or scroll position.

parameters.name: EsmBase
parameters.description: Base URL the CodeMirror core, language packs, theme, and minimap are imported from. Defaults to the public esm.sh CDN. Point this at a self-hosted ESM mirror (or a path served by your own app) for air-gapped / offline / strict-CSP deployments — e.g. EsmBase="/_content/MyApp/esm" or EsmBase="https://esm.myco.internal". A trailing slash is optional. When null, falls back to the global window.lumeoCdn.codeMirrorBase override (if set) and then esm.sh.

parameters.name: TabSize
parameters.description: Number of columns a tab/indent level occupies. Default 4.

parameters.name: UseTabs
parameters.description: Inserts literal tab characters on Tab instead of spaces sized to TabSize. Default false (spaces).

parameters.name: WordWrap
parameters.description: "off" | "on"

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text shown when the document is empty; also used as the element's aria-label when set.

parameters.name: OnChange
parameters.description: Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised on every edit with the document's current text.

events.name: OnChange
events.description: Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the panel is open. Uncontrolled by default (self-managed after the initial value); bind OpenChanged for controlled usage.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for Open. Binding this switches the component to controlled mode.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true the collapsible cannot be toggled: the trigger no-ops and every part (root/trigger/content) emits data-disabled so consumers can style the disabled state with a data-[disabled] selector (Radix parity).

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for Open.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root element.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for Open. Binding this switches the component to controlled mode.

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged.

parameters.name: ForceMount

ColorPicker.name: ColorPicker
ColorPicker.description: Hue + saturation/value picker with hex input.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required on the trigger button and (outside a FormField) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border and focus ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the trigger (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the trigger (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the trigger (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: HTML name attribute applied to the trigger button, used when the picker participates in native form submission.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected color, as a hex string (#RGB/#RRGGBB/#RRGGBBAA) or an rgba(r, g, b, a) string when the alpha slider has been used. Defaults to #000000 when null.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the color changes, via the SV canvas, hue/alpha sliders, RGB inputs, hex field, or a preset swatch.

parameters.name: ShowAlpha
parameters.description: Shows the alpha (opacity) slider and emits an rgba() Value whenever alpha drops below 100%.

parameters.name: Presets
parameters.description: Optional palette of hex colors rendered as clickable swatches below the RGB inputs.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the popover from opening.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the picker popover is open. Two-way bindable via OpenChanged.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the popover's open state changes, e.g. via the trigger, Escape, or an outside click.

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Legacy alias for Open.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Legacy alias for OpenChanged.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the picker's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the picker's outer wrapper.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the color changes, via the SV canvas, hue/alpha sliders, RGB inputs, hex field, or a preset swatch.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Raised when the popover's open state changes, e.g. via the trigger, Escape, or an outside click.

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Legacy alias for OpenChanged.
