Combobox.name: Combobox
Combobox.description: Searchable select with filtering, custom values, and grouping.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The composition-mode children — typically a ComboboxInput plus a ComboboxContent with ComboboxItems. Required even in data-bound mode (see Items).

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Selected value in single-select mode. Ignored when Multiple is true (use Values instead).

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the selection changes in single-select mode.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Popover open state. Bind via @bind-Open when the Combobox lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active validation) — otherwise a parameter cascade can close the popover mid-click. In the bound (controlled) mode the parent owns state and the popover survives re-renders. When unbound, the component still functions but is vulnerable to the cascade-close race; binding is the recommended pattern.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the popover opens or closes. Pair with Open for @bind-Open.

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for Open; forwards straight through.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged; forwards straight through.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the combobox's wrapper element.

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: When true, enables multi-select mode: selections accumulate in Values instead of overwriting Value, and chosen items render as removable chips.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: Selected values in Multiple mode. Ignored in single-select mode.

parameters.name: ValuesChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the selection changes in Multiple mode.

parameters.name: MaxDisplayTags
parameters.description: Cap on the number of selected-value chips rendered by ComboboxInput in Multiple mode; the rest collapse into a "+N more" indicator. Mirrors Select.MaxDisplayTags.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: When true, the input shows a clear (×) affordance that resets Value (or Values in Multiple mode) to its empty state. Mirrors Select.Clearable.

parameters.name: Creatable
parameters.description: When true, shows a ComboboxCreate affordance for the current search text that isn't matched by an existing item, letting the user add a new option.

parameters.name: OnCreate
parameters.description: Invoked when the user commits creating a new item (via Creatable); the created value is then also selected.

parameters.name: OnSearchAsync
parameters.description: When set, invoked with the (debounced) search text so the consumer can fetch remote results and update Items/ChildContent accordingly.

parameters.name: DebounceMs
parameters.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before OnSearchAsync fires after the user stops typing (default 300).

parameters.name: IsSearchLoading
parameters.description: When true, shows a loading indicator in the popover while an async search is in flight.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering a visual asterisk next to Label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Marks the field as invalid, applying error styling and (when set) showing ErrorText instead of HelperText. Also derived automatically from a wrapping FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the control when Invalid is true (standalone usage only — inside a FormField, the FormField owns error display).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control when not invalid (standalone usage only).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the control (standalone usage only — inside a FormField, the FormField owns the label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Logical name for the field, matching the naming convention of sibling form controls (e.g. Select.Name) for form-association tooling.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes merged onto the Combobox's wrapper element. Consistent with every other form component per the library's base API contract.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Convenience placeholder shown by ComboboxInput when it doesn't set its own Placeholder. Lets consumers write <Combobox Placeholder="…"> instead of threading it through the input child.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the combobox text input on first render. See Input.AutoFocus — the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM, this parameter uses FocusElement after the component has mounted.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Optional data source. When set, ComboboxContent renders options from this list instead of ChildContent.

parameters.name: ItemValue
parameters.description: Extracts the string value for each item. Defaults to ToString().

parameters.name: ItemText
parameters.description: Extracts the display label for each item. Defaults to ItemValue when null.

parameters.name: ItemGroup
parameters.description: Optional group key extractor. When set, options are grouped under sticky headers.

parameters.name: ItemDisabled
parameters.description: Optional per-item disabled predicate.

parameters.name: ItemDescription
parameters.description: Optional per-item secondary line (description) extractor. When set and ItemTemplate is null, the default item renderer shows the description in a smaller, muted line below the label — the standard pattern for command pickers (vscode-style "label + helper text").

parameters.name: ItemIcon
parameters.description: Optional per-item leading icon. Receives the raw item object and returns a RenderFragment (typically a single <Icon> or <SvgGlyph>). Rendered before the label when ItemTemplate is null. Skip via returning null per item to mix iconed and non-iconed rows.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: When true and Items is set, uses Blazor's Virtualize component for the option list.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated pixel height of each option row used by the Virtualize component. Default 36.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised when the selection changes in single-select mode.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the popover opens or closes. Pair with Open for @bind-Open.

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged; forwards straight through.

events.name: ValuesChanged
events.description: Raised when the selection changes in Multiple mode.

events.name: OnCreate
events.description: Invoked when the user commits creating a new item (via Creatable); the created value is then also selected.

events.name: OnSearchAsync
events.description: When set, invoked with the (debounced) search text so the consumer can fetch remote results and update Items/ChildContent accordingly.

records.name: ComboboxContext
records.signature:
ComboboxContext(
        string? Value, HashSet<string>? Values, string SearchText, bool IsOpen, bool Multiple, bool IsSearchLoading, bool Creatable,
        EventCallback<string> OnSelect, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, EventCallback<string> OnSearch,
        EventCallback<string> OnCreateItem,
        string WrapperId, string ContentId, string InputId, int FocusedIndex, string? FocusedItemId, string? FocusedItemValue,
        EventCallback<int> SetFocusedIndex,
        Action<string, string> RegisterItem, Action<string> UnregisterItem, int ItemCount,
        bool Invalid, bool Required,
        // Data-bound mode params (null when composition mode)
        IEnumerable<object>? Items,
        Func<object, string> ItemValue,
        Func<object, string>? ItemText,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemGroup,
        Func<object, bool>? ItemDisabled,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemDescription,
        Func<object, RenderFragment?>? ItemIcon,
        RenderFragment<object>? ItemTemplate,
        bool Virtualize,
        float ItemSize)

gotchas: Data-bound mode (the Items parameter) still requires <ComboboxInput /> and <ComboboxContent /> children — a bare <Combobox Items="..." /> with no children renders only an empty wrapper. Map items with ItemValue/ItemText (there is no ItemLabel parameter); items are typed as object, so the Combobox is not generic (no TItem).

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Combobox @bind-Value="_selected" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="blazor">Blazor</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="react">React</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="vue">Vue.js</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxEmpty>No framework found.</ComboboxEmpty>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

examples.title: Country Selector
examples.code:
<Label>Country</Label>
<Combobox @bind-Value="_selected" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Search countries..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="Australia">Australia</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="Canada">Canada</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="France">France</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="United Kingdom">United Kingdom</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="United States">United States</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxEmpty>No country found.</ComboboxEmpty>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

examples.title: With Label
examples.code:
<Label>Language</Label>
<Combobox @bind-Value="_selected" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Search languages..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="C#">C#</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="TypeScript">TypeScript</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxEmpty>No language found.</ComboboxEmpty>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

examples.title: Multiple Selection
examples.code:
<Combobox Multiple="true" @bind-Values="_selectedFrameworks" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Select frameworks..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="react">React</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="vue">Vue</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="angular">Angular</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="svelte">Svelte</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="blazor">Blazor</ComboboxItem>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

@code {
    private HashSet<string> _selectedFrameworks = new();
    private bool _isOpen;
}

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The popover's option list in composition mode (a sequence of ComboboxItem/ComboboxGroup). Ignored in data-bound mode (Combobox.Items set), where options are rendered from the data source instead.

parameters.name: EmptyText
parameters.description: Text shown when there are no matching options; defaults to the localized "no results" message.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the popover panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the popover panel.

parameters.name: OnCreate
parameters.description: Invoked with the current search text when the create affordance is clicked.

parameters.name: ShowCreate
parameters.description: When true (default), the create affordance renders whenever there's non-empty search text. Set false to suppress it (e.g. once you've determined the term isn't creatable).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the create button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the create button.

events.name: OnCreate
events.description: Invoked with the current search text when the create affordance is clicked.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom empty-state content; defaults to the localized "no results" message when unset.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the empty-state container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the empty-state container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's items — a sequence of ComboboxItems, or nested ComboboxGroups for multi-level grouping.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Group header text. When null/empty the group renders no header (still nests its items).

parameters.name: LabelClass
parameters.description: Extra classes for the group label — theming hook for the header appearance.

parameters.name: Collapsible
parameters.description: When true the header toggles the group open/closed. Collapsed groups hide their items.

parameters.name: DefaultExpanded
parameters.description: Initial expanded state for a Collapsible group. Default expanded.

parameters.name: GroupSelect
parameters.description: In Multiple mode, render a tri-state checkbox on the header that selects / deselects every descendant item in one click.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's header row.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the group's root role="group" element.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown when empty; falls back to the parent Combobox.Placeholder, then a localized default search prompt.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the input (or its chip-wrapper in Multiple mode).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the <input> element. A splatted id is stripped when the combobox is inside a FormField, so it can't override the field-owned input id.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's visible label content.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The item's value, emitted on selection and compared against the combobox's Value/Values to determine selected state. Required.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the item renders muted/non-interactive, announces aria-disabled and cannot be selected by click — mirrors SelectItem.Disabled.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the option button.

parameters.name: SearchValue
parameters.description: Optional text used to match against the search input. Falls back to Value.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the option button.

Command.name: Command
Command.description: Command palette — keyboard-driven finder for actions.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The palette's content: typically a CommandInput followed by a CommandList containing CommandGroup/CommandItem elements.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root element.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text; when null, falls back to the localized default search prompt.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the search input on first render via the existing focus interop. Mirrors cmdk, where a bare Command.Input does NOT autofocus but a dialog-hosted command palette does — so this is opt-in (default false): set AutoFocus="true" when hosting the palette in a Dialog/Popover so the user can type immediately on open. The HTML autofocus attribute is a no-op in Blazor WASM, hence the post-render FocusElement hop (see Input.AutoFocus).

Confetti.name: Confetti
Confetti.description: Burst of colored particles on demand via imperative Fire() method.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Content rendered inside the confetti container, positioned beneath the overlay <canvas> that the particles are drawn on.

parameters.name: ParticleCount
parameters.description: Number of confetti particles to emit per burst.

parameters.name: Spread
parameters.description: Spread angle in degrees.

parameters.name: Colors
parameters.description: Colors to use for confetti. Defaults to a festive palette using CSS variables (resolved at runtime).

parameters.name: OriginX
parameters.description: Origin X position (0–1, relative to element width). Default: 0.5 (center).

parameters.name: OriginY
parameters.description: Origin Y position (0–1, relative to element height). Default: 0.5 (center).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the container div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the container div.

examples.title: Button-triggered Burst
examples.code:
<Confetti @ref="_confettiRef" ParticleCount="100" Spread="80">
    <Button OnClick="@(() => _confettiRef!.Fire())">Celebrate!</Button>
</Confetti>

@code {
    private Confetti? _confettiRef;
}

examples.title: Custom Colors
examples.code:
<Confetti @ref="_confettiRef"
    Colors="@(new[] { "#ff595e", "#6a4c93", "#1982c4" })">
    <Button OnClick="@(() => _confettiRef!.Fire())">Custom Colors</Button>
</Confetti>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Button content (the visible label or icon).

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Title shown at the top of the confirm dialog. Defaults to the AlertDialog default ("Are you sure?").

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional descriptive body text under the title.

parameters.name: ConfirmText
parameters.description: Label for the confirm action button. Defaults to "Continue".

parameters.name: CancelText
parameters.description: Label for the cancel action button. Defaults to "Cancel".

parameters.name: IsDestructive
parameters.description: When true, the confirm button is styled as destructive (red) — for delete / remove / discard actions.

parameters.name: OnConfirm
parameters.description: Fires after the user confirms. Does NOT fire on cancel — listen to OnCancel for that path if needed.

parameters.name: OnCancel
parameters.description: Fires when the user cancels (or closes the dialog without confirming). Optional — most consumers only care about OnConfirm.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant of the trigger button. Defaults to Default; commonly set to Destructive for delete actions so the button itself is red even before the dialog opens.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size of the trigger button.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the confirm dialog from opening.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows the trigger button's loading state (spinner, disabled interaction) while the caller has a pending operation in flight — forwarded to Button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger button.

events.name: OnConfirm
events.description: Fires after the user confirms. Does NOT fire on cancel — listen to OnCancel for that path if needed.

events.name: OnCancel
events.description: Fires when the user cancels (or closes the dialog without confirming). Optional — most consumers only care about OnConfirm.

examples.title: Basic Confirm
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton Title="Save changes?"
               Description="Your edits will be applied immediately."
               OnConfirm="@HandleSave">
    Save
</ConfirmButton>

examples.title: Destructive Action
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton Title="Delete account?"
               Description="All your data will be permanently removed."
               ConfirmText="Yes, delete"
               CancelText="Keep account"
               IsDestructive="true"
               Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive"
               OnConfirm="@HandleDelete"
               OnCancel="@HandleCancel">
    Delete Account
</ConfirmButton>

examples.title: Variants and Sizes
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary" Title="Archive project?" ConfirmText="Archive" OnConfirm="@HandleArchive">Archive</ConfirmButton>
<ConfirmButton Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" Title="Reset form?" OnConfirm="@HandleReset">Reset</ConfirmButton>
<ConfirmButton Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Lg" Title="Remove member?" IsDestructive="true" OnConfirm="@HandleRemove">Remove</ConfirmButton>

examples.title: Loading and Disabled
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton IsLoading="true" Title="Publish?" OnConfirm="@HandlePublish">Publishing…</ConfirmButton>
<ConfirmButton Disabled="true" Title="Publish?" OnConfirm="@HandlePublish">Disabled</ConfirmButton>

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the banner's root role="region" element (the preferences dialog is unaffected).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the banner's root role="region" element.

parameters.name: Categories
parameters.description: Consent buckets to expose in the preferences dialog. Omit `Required: true` ones if your site doesn't use strictly-necessary cookies.

parameters.name: PrivacyPolicyUrl
parameters.description: URL to your privacy policy page. If null, the link is hidden.

parameters.name: PolicyVersion
parameters.description: Privacy-policy version this banner asks consent for. When a stored decision was recorded against a different version, the banner re-prompts (previous choices prefill the preferences dialog, but the user must re-confirm). Bump this whenever your policy materially changes. Defaults to "1".

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Banner heading, shown next to the cookie icon.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.default: "We use a minimal set of cookies to run the site and optionally measure anonymous usage to improve it. You choose what's on."
parameters.description: Banner body text, followed by the privacy-policy link when PrivacyPolicyUrl is set.

parameters.name: PrivacyPolicyLabel
parameters.description: Link text for the privacy-policy link (only shown when PrivacyPolicyUrl is set).

parameters.name: AcceptLabel
parameters.description: Label for the layer-1 "accept everything" button.

parameters.name: RejectLabel
parameters.description: Label for the layer-1 "reject optional categories" button.

parameters.name: CustomizeLabel
parameters.description: Label for the button that opens the preferences dialog; only rendered when at least one non-required category exists.

parameters.name: PreferencesTitle
parameters.description: Heading of the preferences dialog.

parameters.name: PreferencesDescription
parameters.default: "Pick which categories you're okay with. You can change this later."
parameters.description: Body text of the preferences dialog.

parameters.name: RequiredBadge
parameters.description: Badge text shown next to a category that is Required: true (always on, not toggleable).

parameters.name: CancelLabel
parameters.description: Label for the preferences dialog's cancel button (discards draft changes).

parameters.name: SaveLabel
parameters.description: Label for the preferences dialog's save button (commits the draft toggles).

parameters.name: AnimationClass
parameters.description: CSS animation class applied to the banner on mount (default a slide-in from the bottom edge).

parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the submenu panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the submenu panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's label content.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger, preventing the submenu from opening via click, hover, or keyboard.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the button element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The element that opens the context menu on right-click, long-press, or Shift+F10 / the Menu key.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's wrapping div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the trigger's wrapping div.

parameters.name: LongPressMs
parameters.description: Duration in milliseconds a touch must remain on the trigger (without significant movement) before the context menu opens. Default: 500ms.

parameters.name: MoveTolerancePx
parameters.description: Pixel threshold for touch movement that cancels the long-press timer. Above this, the user is interpreted as scrolling, not long-pressing.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: The band's plain-text heading, rendered as an h2 and used to name the section landmark. Ignored when TitleSlot is set.

parameters.name: TitleSlot
parameters.description: Custom heading markup, rendered instead of/in addition to Title for callers that need rich heading content.

parameters.name: Subtitle
parameters.description: Supporting text rendered below the title.

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: The call-to-action buttons, centered and wrapped below the title/subtitle.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root section element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root section element.

examples.title: Basic CTA
examples.code:
<CTASection Title="Ready to build with Lumeo?"
            Subtitle="Install the package and ship your first component in minutes.">

        <Button>Get started</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Read the docs</Button>
    </Actions>
</CTASection>

<CTASection Title="Join the newsletter"
            Subtitle="Monthly updates on new components and releases. No spam.">

    </Actions>
</CTASection>

DataGrid.name: DataGrid
DataGrid.description: Enterprise grid: sort, filter, inline edit, multi-level group (client + server), pin, virtualize, export.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The rows to render. In client mode (ServerMode false) the grid sorts/filters/pages this sequence locally; in server mode it is treated as the already-fetched current page.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: Column definitions, as an alternative to declaring <DataGridColumnDef> children via ChildContent. Both styles can be mixed.

parameters.name: Striped
parameters.description: Alternates row background colors for readability.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Renders visible borders around cells instead of just row dividers.

parameters.name: Compact
parameters.description: Dense layout: header and body cells drop from px-3 py-2 to px-2 py-1 (and the root text shrinks to text-sm), so the effective row height genuinely decreases — not just the font size. The flag flows to every cell through DataGridContext{TItem}, so toggling it after first render re-pads the grid live. When virtualization is active (see VirtualItemSize) the default row-height estimate is auto-tightened under Compact unless you pass an explicit VirtualItemSize. Default false.

parameters.name: Hoverable
parameters.description: Highlights the row under the pointer with a hover background. Default true.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Fixed CSS height (e.g. "480px") for the scrollable body. Unset lets the grid grow to fit its content.

parameters.name: SelectionMode
parameters.description: Row-selection behavior: None (default), Single, or Multiple (adds checkboxes and enables Ctrl/Shift-click and Ctrl+A).

parameters.name: EditMode
parameters.description: Cell/row editing behavior: None (default), Cell (commit per cell via OnCellEdit), Row (commit per row via OnRowEdit), or Batch (buffer edits and commit together via OnBatchSave).

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of rows shown per page in client-paged mode. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: PageSizeOptions
parameters.description: The list of page-size options shown in the rows-per-page selector. Defaults to { 10, 25, 50, 100 }. Set to e.g. { 10, 50, 100, 200, 300 } for larger datasets, or to an empty array to hide the selector entirely.

parameters.name: ShowPagination
parameters.description: Shows the pagination strip beneath the grid. Default true; forced off automatically in virtualised server mode (see Virtualized).

parameters.name: ShowToolbar
parameters.description: Shows the toolbar above the grid (search box, column chooser, export, fullscreen button — gated individually by ShowSearch, ShowColumnChooser, ShowExport, Expandable). Default false.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Show the global search box in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowColumnChooser
parameters.description: Show the Columns button (visibility/reorder menu). Default true.

parameters.name: ShowExport
parameters.description: Show the Export button and its format dropdown. Default true. Set false to hide export entirely. For fine-grained per-format control see ExportFormats.

parameters.name: ExportFormats
parameters.description: Which export formats appear in the Export dropdown. Default All. Set to e.g. Csv | Excel to hide PDF in WebAssembly where QuestPDF isn't supported. When no flags are set (or ShowExport is false), the Export button is hidden.

parameters.name: VirtualizeThreshold
parameters.description: Item count above which Blazor's <Virtualize> kicks in. Only relevant when ShowPagination is false (or PageSize > this threshold) — paged grids show at most PageSize rows at once and never trigger virtualization. Default 500.

parameters.name: VirtualItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in CSS pixels — used by <Virtualize> to size the scroll spacers. Tune if your rows are taller (dense badges, two-line cells). Default 41px. When Compact is on and this parameter is left at its default, the estimate auto-tightens to CompactVirtualItemSizepx so the scroll spacers match the shorter compact rows; pass an explicit value to override either way.

parameters.name: VirtualOverscanCount
parameters.description: Extra rows rendered above and below the viewport to hide pop-in during fast scrolling. Default 3.

parameters.name: Reorderable
parameters.description: Enables drag-to-reorder columns via a pointer drag on the header cell. Default false.

parameters.name: RowReorderable
parameters.description: Enables drag-to-reorder rows via a pointer drag on the row. Default false.

parameters.name: GroupBy
parameters.description: Single-field grouping: the column Field to group rows by. Superseded by GroupByFields when that is set.

parameters.name: GroupsExpandedByDefault
parameters.description: Whether newly-formed groups start expanded. Default true.

parameters.name: GroupByFields
parameters.description: Ordered list of fields for multi-level grouping. When set (non-empty) this takes precedence over the single GroupBy parameter. Each entry must be a column Field. The grid renders nested group rows with increasing indentation per level; per-level aggregates are shown on each group header row.

parameters.name: ShowGroupPanel
parameters.description: Shows a slim bar above the grid that lists the current grouping levels as removable chips, plus a dropdown to add a new level from any Groupable column. Default false.

parameters.name: GroupPanelText
parameters.description: Placeholder/hint text shown in the group panel when no fields are grouped.

parameters.name: ChildItemsSelector
parameters.description: When set, the grid renders a hierarchical tree-grid: this selector returns a row's child rows (null/empty = leaf). Each parent row gets an expand chevron in the tree column (see TreeColumnField). Distinct from DetailTemplate, which is a flat expand-for-detail fragment. Tree-grid mode and grouping are mutually exclusive — when both are configured, tree-grid mode wins.

parameters.name: TreeGridDefaultExpanded
parameters.description: Whether tree nodes start expanded. Default false.

parameters.name: TreeColumnField
parameters.description: Field of the column that carries the tree chevron + indentation. Null (default) uses the first visible column.

parameters.name: OnTreeNodeExpand
parameters.description: Raised when a tree node is expanded or collapsed (the item, plus its new expanded state).

parameters.name: Expandable
parameters.description: When true, adds a small Expand icon to the toolbar. Clicking it renders the grid in a fullscreen modal overlay. Default false.

parameters.name: IsExpanded
parameters.description: When true, the grid is currently rendered in fullscreen. Bind this for programmatic control, or leave unbound to let the grid manage its own state via the toolbar button.

parameters.name: IsExpandedChanged
parameters.description: Fires when IsExpanded changes (fullscreen entered/exited), for two-way binding via @bind-IsExpanded.

parameters.name: FullscreenTitle
parameters.description: Optional title shown in the fullscreen header bar. Defaults to "Data Grid".

parameters.name: RowClass
parameters.description: Per-row callback returning extra CSS classes for the <tr>, e.g. highlighting rows that fail validation.

parameters.name: RowStyle
parameters.description: Per-row callback returning an inline style string for the <tr>.

parameters.name: EnableLayoutPersistence
parameters.description: Persists column visibility/order/width/pin state (and grouping) across sessions, keyed by LayoutStorageKey. Default false.

parameters.name: LayoutStorageKey
parameters.description: Storage key used to persist/restore layout when EnableLayoutPersistence is true. Required for persistence to actually save/load anything.

parameters.name: OnLayoutSave
parameters.description: Fires whenever the persisted layout changes (column reorder/resize/pin/ visibility, grouping), carrying the new DataGridLayout snapshot.

parameters.name: SavedLayout
parameters.description: A previously-saved layout to apply on load, as an alternative to (or seed for) LayoutStorageKey-based persistence.

parameters.name: GlobalLayouts
parameters.description: Consumer-managed list of named, shareable layout presets shown in the toolbar's layouts menu, in addition to the single auto-persisted layout.

parameters.name: OnSaveNamedLayout
parameters.description: Fires when the user saves the current layout under a name from the toolbar's layouts menu.

parameters.name: OnDeleteNamedLayout
parameters.description: Fires when the user deletes a named layout from the toolbar's layouts menu, carrying the deleted layout's name.

parameters.name: ServerMode
parameters.description: Delegates sorting/filtering/paging to the backend instead of processing Items locally. Requires OnServerRequest and TotalCount. Default false.

parameters.name: OnServerRequest
parameters.description: Fetch callback invoked whenever sort/filter/search/page changes in ServerMode, carrying the current request descriptor.

parameters.name: TotalCount
parameters.description: Total row count across all pages/filters in ServerMode, used to compute the pagination strip. Ignored in client mode.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows the grid's loading state (skeleton rows, pagination hidden). Also true automatically while an internal server request is in flight.

parameters.name: Virtualized
parameters.description: Enables Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} with an ItemsProvider — rows are fetched from the backend in scroll-driven windows instead of paged. Requires OnRangeRequest. When active, pagination is hidden automatically and the grid renders a single tall scrollable body.

parameters.name: OnRangeRequest
parameters.description: Range-fetch callback used in virtualised server mode. The grid invokes this whenever the viewport scrolls into an unloaded window. The callback must return the requested slice plus the current total row count so the scroll spacers stay accurate.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Declarative content: <DataGridColumnDef> / <DataGridColumnGroup> children (rendered into a hidden host div and read into the column model) plus optional <ToolbarContent>.

parameters.name: DetailTemplate
parameters.description: Row-detail template shown in an expandable sub-row when set. Adds an expand-chevron column automatically.

parameters.name: EmptyContent
parameters.description: Custom content shown instead of the default empty-state message when there are no rows to display.

parameters.name: RowContextMenu
parameters.description: Per-row context-menu content, shown on right-click. Setting this enables the context-menu interaction; leave null to disable it.

parameters.name: OnRowClick
parameters.description: Fires when a row is single-clicked, carrying the clicked item.

parameters.name: OnRowDoubleClick
parameters.description: Fires when a row is double-clicked, carrying the clicked item.

parameters.name: OnCellEdit
parameters.description: Fires when a single-cell edit is committed (Cell), carrying the item, column, and old/new value.

parameters.name: OnRowEdit
parameters.description: Fires when a row edit is committed (Row), carrying the item and its changed fields.

parameters.name: OnBatchSave
parameters.description: Fired when the user clicks "Save all" while EditMode is Batch. Args carry the buffered modifications + added rows. On a clean callback return (no exception), the grid's pending-changes buffer is cleared automatically.

parameters.name: ShowAddRow
parameters.description: When true and NewItemFactory is set, renders a thin "+ Add row" trigger below the body. Each click creates a TItem via the factory, pushes it into the added-rows buffer, and immediately shows it inline so cells can be filled in. Only meaningful in Batch.

parameters.name: NewItemFactory
parameters.description: Factory used by the "+ Add row" trigger to produce a fresh TItem. Required when ShowAddRow is true. The returned item is stored in the added-rows buffer; the user fills its cells inline and the row is delivered via OnBatchSave.

parameters.name: ColumnVirtualize
parameters.description: Simplified column virtualization: caps the number of horizontally- rendered data columns at MaxVisibleColumns. Pinned columns always make the cut. Default false.

parameters.name: MaxVisibleColumns
parameters.description: Maximum columns rendered when ColumnVirtualize is true. Default 30.

parameters.name: BatchSaveAllText
parameters.description: Label for the batch-mode "Save all" button. Override for localization.

parameters.name: BatchDiscardText
parameters.description: Label for the batch-mode "Discard" button. Override for localization.

parameters.name: BatchAddRowText
parameters.description: Label for the batch-mode "+ Add row" trigger. Override for localization.

parameters.name: OnColumnReorder
parameters.description: Fires when a column is reordered via drag (Reorderable) or the column-visibility menu, carrying the moved column's id and its old/new index.

parameters.name: OnColumnResize
parameters.description: Raised when a column is resized through the built-in UI — a pointer drag on the resize handle, a keyboard nudge (arrow keys on the focused handle), or a double-click auto-fit-to-content. The event args carry the column id, the committed pixel width (already clamped to Min/Max), and an AutoFit flag that is true only for the double-click auto-fit path. Column widths persist automatically with the rest of the layout when EnableLayoutPersistence is on; this callback is for consumers that also want to observe/store widths.

parameters.name: OnRowReorder
parameters.description: Fires when a row is reordered via drag (RowReorderable), carrying the moved item and its old/new index.

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Fires when an internal grid operation (export, server request, layout persistence) throws, carrying the exception, instead of letting it propagate unhandled.

parameters.name: SelectedItems
parameters.description: Currently-selected items. Set for one-way binding, or use with SelectedItemsChanged / @bind-SelectedItems for two-way.

parameters.name: SelectedItemsChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the selection changes, for two-way binding via @bind-SelectedItems.

parameters.name: SelectionKeySelector
parameters.description: Optional key projector that identifies items across re-fetches. In server-mode where Items is a fresh instance per page-load, the default reference-based stale-selection cleanup wipes selections that survived a page. When this selector is set, the grid identifies stale-vs-still-selected rows by comparing keys instead of references — so a selection on page 1 stays applied after a page-2 fetch returns a fresh wrapper for the same logical row. Returning null from the selector for any item falls back to reference equality for that row.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the grid's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the grid's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: CultureInfo used for cell value formatting (dates/numbers) and exports. When null (default), falls back to CurrentCulture. Useful when your app sets a different culture than the UI locale — e.g. force de-DE formatting in an English UI.

events.name: OnTreeNodeExpand
events.description: Raised when a tree node is expanded or collapsed (the item, plus its new expanded state).

events.name: IsExpandedChanged
events.description: Fires when IsExpanded changes (fullscreen entered/exited), for two-way binding via @bind-IsExpanded.

events.name: OnLayoutSave
events.description: Fires whenever the persisted layout changes (column reorder/resize/pin/ visibility, grouping), carrying the new DataGridLayout snapshot.

events.name: OnSaveNamedLayout
events.description: Fires when the user saves the current layout under a name from the toolbar's layouts menu.

events.name: OnDeleteNamedLayout
events.description: Fires when the user deletes a named layout from the toolbar's layouts menu, carrying the deleted layout's name.

events.name: OnServerRequest
events.description: Fetch callback invoked whenever sort/filter/search/page changes in ServerMode, carrying the current request descriptor.

events.name: OnRowClick
events.description: Fires when a row is single-clicked, carrying the clicked item.

events.name: OnRowDoubleClick
events.description: Fires when a row is double-clicked, carrying the clicked item.

events.name: OnCellEdit
events.description: Fires when a single-cell edit is committed (Cell), carrying the item, column, and old/new value.

events.name: OnRowEdit
events.description: Fires when a row edit is committed (Row), carrying the item and its changed fields.

events.name: OnBatchSave
events.description: Fired when the user clicks "Save all" while EditMode is Batch. Args carry the buffered modifications + added rows. On a clean callback return (no exception), the grid's pending-changes buffer is cleared automatically.

events.name: OnColumnReorder
events.description: Fires when a column is reordered via drag (Reorderable) or the column-visibility menu, carrying the moved column's id and its old/new index.

events.name: OnColumnResize
events.description: Raised when a column is resized through the built-in UI — a pointer drag on the resize handle, a keyboard nudge (arrow keys on the focused handle), or a double-click auto-fit-to-content. The event args carry the column id, the committed pixel width (already clamped to Min/Max), and an AutoFit flag that is true only for the double-click auto-fit path. Column widths persist automatically with the rest of the layout when EnableLayoutPersistence is on; this callback is for consumers that also want to observe/store widths.

events.name: OnRowReorder
events.description: Fires when a row is reordered via drag (RowReorderable), carrying the moved item and its old/new index.

events.name: OnError
events.description: Fires when an internal grid operation (export, server request, layout persistence) throws, carrying the exception, instead of letting it propagate unhandled.

events.name: SelectedItemsChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the selection changes, for two-way binding via @bind-SelectedItems.

enums.name: DataGridExportFormat
enums.description: Flags enum controlling which export formats appear in the DataGrid{TItem} toolbar's Export dropdown. Defaults to All so existing grids keep listing every format. Set to a subset (e.g. Csv | Excel) to hide individual formats — useful in WebAssembly where QuestPDF's PDF export throws PlatformNotSupportedException.

examples.title: Basic DataGrid
examples.code:
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" PageSize="5" ShowPagination="true">
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name" Sortable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Department" Field="Department" Sortable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary" Sortable="true" Format="C0" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Start Date" Field="StartDate" Format="yyyy-MM-dd" />
</DataGrid>

examples.title: Column Groups + Footer Aggregates
examples.code:
@* DataGridColumnGroup wraps a contiguous run of column defs under a labelled parent
   <th colspan>. Set Aggregate on a column to surface a sticky footer total; FooterFormat
   formats just the total (cells in C0, totals in N0). *@
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees">
    <DataGridColumnGroup TItem="Employee" Label="Identity">
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name" Sortable="true" />
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Department" Field="Department" Sortable="true" />
    </DataGridColumnGroup>
    <DataGridColumnGroup TItem="Employee" Label="Compensation">
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary"
                           Sortable="true" Format="C0"
                           Aggregate="AggregateType.Sum" FooterFormat="N0" />
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Tenure" Field="StartDate"
                           Sortable="true" Format="yyyy-MM-dd" />
    </DataGridColumnGroup>
</DataGrid>

examples.title: Toolbar, Search & Filtering
examples.code:
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" PageSize="5"
          ShowToolbar="true" ShowPagination="true">
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name"
                       Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary"
                       Filterable="true" FilterType="DataGridFilterType.Number" Format="C0" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Status" Field="Status"
                       Filterable="true" />
</DataGrid>

examples.title: Minimal toolbar (search only)
examples.code:
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" PageSize="5"
          ShowToolbar="true"
          ShowColumnChooser="false"
          ShowExport="false">
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name" Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Department" Field="Department" Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary" Sortable="true" Format="C0" />
</DataGrid>

parameters.name: DetailTemplate
parameters.description: Row-detail template forwarded to each rendered DataGridRow{TItem}.

parameters.name: EmptyContent
parameters.description: Custom content shown in the single empty-state <tr> when there are no rows to display. Falls back to a default "no data" message + icon.

parameters.name: UseVirtualization
parameters.description: Renders rows through Blazor's <Virtualize> instead of a plain loop, for large in-memory item sets. Ignored when ServerVirtualizationProvider is set (that takes the ItemsProvider path instead).

parameters.name: VirtualItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in CSS pixels, forwarded to <Virtualize> to size its scroll spacers. Defaults to 41.

parameters.name: VirtualOverscanCount
parameters.description: Extra rows rendered above/below the viewport by <Virtualize> to hide pop-in during fast scrolling. Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: ServerVirtualizationProvider
parameters.description: When set, switches the body to ItemsProvider-mode virtualisation (window-fetched server scrolling). Null disables.

parameters.name: HasDetailTemplate
parameters.description: Whether the grid has a DetailTemplate configured — adds an extra leading spacer column to ColSpan for the empty/skeleton rows.

parameters.name: SkeletonRowCount
parameters.description: Number of placeholder skeleton rows rendered while Context.IsLoading is true. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: OnContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when a row is right-clicked, carrying the item and the pointer's client X/Y coordinates for positioning the context menu.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <tbody> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <tbody> element.

events.name: OnContextMenu
events.description: Fires when a row is right-clicked, carrying the item and the pointer's client X/Y coordinates for positioning the context menu.

records.name: IndexedItem
records.signature: IndexedItem(TItem Item, int Index)

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description: The row data this cell belongs to. Read by Column's value/format/template accessors and passed to edit callbacks.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column definition this cell renders — supplies the value accessor, formatting, cell/edit templates, pin state, and CSS.

parameters.name: RowIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of the owning row within DisplayedItems (non-grouped).

parameters.name: ColumnIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of this column within the visible columns.

parameters.name: AriaColIndex
parameters.description: 1-based ARIA column index (includes any leading non-data columns).

parameters.name: Navigable
parameters.description: Whether this cell participates in roving-tabindex keyboard navigation. False in grouped mode where row indices are not globally unique.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <td>, after CssClass and CellClass.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <td> element.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Column header label. Falls back to Field where a label is needed (e.g. group-add dropdown) if left unset.

parameters.name: Field
parameters.description: Dotted property path on TItem used to read the cell value (e.g. "Address.City"), and the key used for sorting/filtering/ grouping/layout persistence. Ignored when FieldSelector is set.

parameters.name: FieldSelector
parameters.description: Custom value accessor, as an alternative to Field reflection (e.g. for computed values). Takes precedence over Field when both are set.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: Initial column width in pixels. Resizing via the header handle updates the runtime width independently; persists with layout when enabled.

parameters.name: Sortable
parameters.description: Enables click-to-sort (and shift-click multi-sort) on the header cell.

parameters.name: Filterable
parameters.description: Enables the column filter UI (funnel icon + popover, or FilterTemplate when set) on the header cell.

parameters.name: Resizable
parameters.description: Enables the resize handle on the header cell's trailing edge (pointer drag, keyboard nudge, or double-click auto-fit). Defaults to true.

parameters.name: FilterType
parameters.description: Which filter operators/UI apply to this column's built-in filter popover (Text, Number, Date, Boolean, Select …). Defaults to Text.

parameters.name: Aggregate
parameters.description: Aggregate function computed over this column's values and shown in the footer strip (Sum, Average, Count, Min, Max …). Defaults to None (no aggregate row cell).

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: .NET format string applied to IFormattable cell values (e.g. "C2", "yyyy-MM-dd"), rendered via the current/configured culture.

parameters.name: FooterFormat
parameters.description: Optional .NET format string for the footer aggregate strip — overrides Format for the totals row only. Useful when the cell format differs from the desired totals format (e.g. cells "C2", totals "N0").

parameters.name: Pin
parameters.description: Sticks the column to the Left or Right edge of the scroll container (position: sticky). Defaults to None.

parameters.name: CellTemplate
parameters.description: Custom cell rendering, given the row item. Overrides the default formatted-value / batch-dirty display.

parameters.name: HeaderTemplate
parameters.description: Custom header cell content, as an alternative to plain Title text.

parameters.name: EditTemplate
parameters.description: Custom inline-edit UI for the cell, given a CellEditContext{TItem}. Falls back to a plain text <input> when unset.

parameters.name: MinWidth
parameters.description: Minimum width in pixels enforced during resize.

parameters.name: MaxWidth
parameters.description: Maximum width in pixels enforced during resize.

parameters.name: Pinnable
parameters.description: Shows a pin-left/right control in the column's header menu, letting the user pin/unpin it interactively.

parameters.name: Groupable
parameters.description: Makes this column selectable as a grouping level (group panel dropdown, or GroupBy/GroupByFields).

parameters.name: Reorderable
parameters.description: Whether this column can be reordered via header drag-and-drop or the column-chooser arrows. Defaults to true; set false to pin the column to its declared position regardless of the grid-level Reorderable flag.

parameters.name: CellClass
parameters.description: Per-row callback returning extra CSS classes for this column's <td>.

parameters.name: HeaderCssClass
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the header <th>.

parameters.name: CustomSort
parameters.description: Custom comparer used instead of the default value comparison when sorting by this column.

parameters.name: FilterOptions
parameters.description: Explicit value/label options for a Select-type filter (FilterType Select). Ignored for other filter types.

parameters.name: Operators
parameters.description: Whitelist of filter operators shown in this column's filter UI. When null, the grid exposes the default set for FilterType.

parameters.name: FilterTemplate
parameters.description: Custom filter popover content, replacing the default operator+value inputs entirely. Given the current FilterDescriptor (or null) and an Apply callback to commit the filter.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto every cell in this column (via DataGridColumn.CssClass).

parameters.name: Visible
parameters.description: Two-way bindable column visibility. Seeds the registered column's initial visibility and lets a consumer show/hide the column programmatically via @bind-Visible. When the user toggles the column through the built-in column-chooser, VisibleChanged fires so the bound value follows. Default true.

parameters.name: VisibleChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the column's visibility changes through the built-in UI — the callback half of Visible's two-way binding.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes. This component renders no markup of its own (it only registers a column with the parent grid), so these are effectively unused.

events.name: VisibleChanged
events.description: Fires when the column's visibility changes through the built-in UI — the callback half of Visible's two-way binding.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column being filtered — supplies FilterType, Operators, FilterTemplate, Field, and Title for the popover.

parameters.name: FilterOptions
parameters.description: Value/label options rendered as checkboxes when Column.FilterType is Select (faceted multi-select filtering).

parameters.name: CurrentFilter
parameters.description: The column's currently-applied filter, if any. Hydrates the popover's editor (operator, value, checked options) so reopening shows the applied criteria instead of a blank form.

parameters.name: OnApply
parameters.description: Fires when Apply is clicked with the new FilterDescriptor, or when Clear is clicked (or a Select filter is applied with zero options checked) with null to remove the filter.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the popover's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the popover's outer wrapper.

events.name: OnApply
events.description: Fires when Apply is clicked with the new FilterDescriptor, or when Clear is clicked (or a Select filter is applied with zero options checked) with null to remove the filter.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Header label shown in the spanning th above the grouped columns.

parameters.name: HeaderClass
parameters.description: Extra classes for the spanning header cell — theming hook for the group.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The <DataGridColumnDef> children spanned by this group's header cell. Receives the group's id via a cascaded ColumnGroupId.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: The full column list (visible and hidden) shown as a reorderable, toggleable checklist.

parameters.name: OnColumnToggle
parameters.description: Fires when a column's visibility checkbox is toggled, carrying the column (already mutated to the new Visible value).

parameters.name: OnColumnReorder
parameters.description: Fires when a column is dragged to a new position in the list, carrying the moved column's id and its old/new index.

parameters.name: OnColumnPin
parameters.description: Fires when a column's pin state is changed via its pin menu (Left/Right/Unpin), carrying the column id and the new PinDirection.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the popover's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the popover's outer wrapper.

events.name: OnColumnToggle
events.description: Fires when a column's visibility checkbox is toggled, carrying the column (already mutated to the new Visible value).

events.name: OnColumnReorder
events.description: Fires when a column is dragged to a new position in the list, carrying the moved column's id and its old/new index.

events.name: OnColumnPin
events.description: Fires when a column's pin state is changed via its pin menu (Left/Right/Unpin), carrying the column id and the new PinDirection.

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description: The row data whose detail content is being expanded, passed to DetailTemplate.

parameters.name: AriaRowIndex
parameters.description: 1-based aria-rowindex for this detail row, among EVERY rendered <tr> in the table (per ARIA grid semantics — a detail row occupies a real table row, same as a data or group-header row). Allocated by DataGridBody{TItem}'s DataGridRowIndexer via DetailAriaRowIndex. Null at render sites that don't yet compute a table-wide index for detail rows (the virtualized branches — see DataGridRowIndexer's remarks), in which case the attribute is omitted and the browser falls back to DOM order.

parameters.name: DetailTemplate
parameters.description: Template rendered inside the spanning detail cell. Renders nothing when unset.

parameters.name: ColSpan
parameters.description: Number of columns the detail cell spans, matching the parent row's total column count. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <tr> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <tr> element.

parameters.name: AllItems
parameters.description: Full unpaginated/unfiltered-to-page item set used to compute aggregates over. Falls back to Context.DisplayedItems (the current page) when unset.

parameters.name: HasDetailTemplate
parameters.description: Whether the grid has a DetailTemplate configured. The aggregate strip renders as a sibling div outside the <table> rather than a <tfoot> row, so no colspan offset is needed here — reserved for parity with the other row-shaped components.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the aggregate strip.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the aggregate strip.

parameters.name: GroupKey
parameters.description: The group's key value, shown as the row's label.

parameters.name: Count
parameters.description: Number of rows in this group, shown next to the label (e.g. "3 items").

parameters.name: IsExpanded
parameters.description: Whether the group's rows are currently shown. Controls the chevron rotation; the actual show/hide of child rows is handled by the caller.

parameters.name: OnToggle
parameters.description: Fires when the row (or its chevron) is clicked, to toggle IsExpanded in the owner.

parameters.name: ColSpan
parameters.description: Number of columns the group label cell spans, matching the grid's total column count. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: RowIndex
parameters.description: 0-based position of this group header row among EVERY rendered <tr> in the tbody — data rows and other group header rows alike. The caller (DataGridBody{TItem}) must count this row's own slot too, the same way it counts DataGridRow{TItem}.TableRowIndex, or a group's first item row and every row after it under-reports its aria-rowindex by one per preceding group header. See AriaRowIndex.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: Nesting depth for multi-level grouping (0 = top level). Controls indentation.

parameters.name: Aggregates
parameters.description: Per-group aggregate strip rendered next to the group label.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <tr> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <tr> element.

events.name: OnToggle
events.description: Fires when the row (or its chevron) is clicked, to toggle IsExpanded in the owner.

parameters.name: HasDetailTemplate
parameters.description: Whether the grid has a DetailTemplate configured — renders an extra leading spacer <th> aligning with each row's expand-chevron cell.

parameters.name: ActiveFilterColumn
parameters.description: Field of the column whose filter popover is currently open. Forwarded to each DataGridHeaderCell{TItem} so only that column shows its filter as open.

parameters.name: Reorderable
parameters.description: Enables drag-to-reorder on the header cells. Forwarded to each DataGridHeaderCell{TItem}.

parameters.name: OnFilterToggle
parameters.description: Fires when a column's filter icon is clicked, carrying the column's field (to open) or null (to close whatever is open).

parameters.name: OnFilterApply
parameters.description: Fires when a column's filter popover is applied or cleared, carrying the field and the new (or null) FilterDescriptor.

parameters.name: OnColumnReorder
parameters.description: Fires when a column is dragged to a new position, carrying the moved column's id and its old/new index.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <thead> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <thead> element.

events.name: OnFilterToggle
events.description: Fires when a column's filter icon is clicked, carrying the column's field (to open) or null (to close whatever is open).

events.name: OnFilterApply
events.description: Fires when a column's filter popover is applied or cleared, carrying the field and the new (or null) FilterDescriptor.

events.name: OnColumnReorder
events.description: Fires when a column is dragged to a new position, carrying the moved column's id and its old/new index.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: The column this header cell represents — supplies title, sort/filter/ resize/pin/reorder eligibility, and CSS.

parameters.name: ColumnIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of this column within the visible columns.

parameters.name: AriaColIndex
parameters.description: 1-based ARIA column index (includes any leading non-data columns).

parameters.name: SortDirection
parameters.description: Current sort direction applied to this column, driving the sort icon and aria-sort. Defaults to None.

parameters.name: HasActiveFilter
parameters.description: Whether this column currently has an applied filter — shows the filter icon in its "active" state.

parameters.name: IsFilterOpen
parameters.description: Whether this column's filter popover is currently open.

parameters.name: Reorderable
parameters.description: Enables drag-to-reorder on this header cell (still gated per-column by Column.Reorderable).

parameters.name: OnFilterToggle
parameters.description: Fires when this column's filter icon is clicked, to open/close its filter popover.

parameters.name: OnFilterApply
parameters.description: Fires when this column's filter popover is applied or cleared, carrying the new (or null) FilterDescriptor.

parameters.name: OnColumnReorder
parameters.description: Fires when this column is dragged to a new position, carrying its id and the old/new index.

parameters.name: SortPriority
parameters.description: 1-based multi-sort priority (the order this column was added to the sort, via shift-click). 0 when not sorted.

parameters.name: TotalSortCount
parameters.description: Total number of columns currently participating in a multi-sort. Used to decide whether to show the priority badge (hidden when only one column is sorted).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <th> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <th> element.

events.name: OnFilterToggle
events.description: Fires when this column's filter icon is clicked, to open/close its filter popover.

events.name: OnFilterApply
events.description: Fires when this column's filter popover is applied or cleared, carrying the new (or null) FilterDescriptor.

events.name: OnColumnReorder
events.description: Fires when this column is dragged to a new position, carrying its id and the old/new index.

parameters.name: PageChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user navigates to a different page (Previous/Next, a page number, or the ellipsis jump), carrying the new 1-based page number.

parameters.name: PageSizeChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user changes the rows-per-page selector, carrying the new page size.

parameters.name: PageSizeOptions
parameters.description: Page-size options shown in the rows-per-page selector. Empty array hides the selector entirely.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the pagination strip.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the pagination strip.

events.name: PageChanged
events.description: Fires when the user navigates to a different page (Previous/Next, a page number, or the ellipsis jump), carrying the new 1-based page number.

events.name: PageSizeChanged
events.description: Fires when the user changes the rows-per-page selector, carrying the new page size.

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description: The row data. Passed to DataGridCell{TItem}, DetailTemplate, and every selection/expansion/edit lookup against the cascaded DataGridContext{TItem}.

parameters.name: RowIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of this row within its current render scope (DisplayedItems, or the enclosing group/tree-node's item list). Item-only — does NOT count group header rows, since it also drives striping and the row-reorder token, which must stay keyed to item order regardless of how many group headers precede a given item. For aria-rowindex, see TableRowIndex.

parameters.name: TableRowIndex
parameters.description: 0-based position of this row among EVERY rendered <tr> in the tbody — data rows AND DataGridGroupRow{TItem} header rows alike. Only diverges from RowIndex in grouped renders, where each group header occupies a table row that RowIndex deliberately does not count. Feeds AriaRowIndex only. Null (falls back to RowIndex) at every render site with no group headers ahead of it — flat, tree-grid, and virtualized — where the two counters are identical anyway.

parameters.name: DetailAriaRowIndex
parameters.description: 1-based aria-rowindex for this row's own expanded DataGridDetailRow{TItem}, when one will render — allocated by DataGridBody{TItem}'s DataGridRowIndexer in the same pass as TableRowIndex, so the detail row's slot is reserved and every row after it advances accordingly. Null when this row has no expanded detail (either no DetailTemplate, or collapsed) — see AriaRowIndex.

parameters.name: RowToken
parameters.description: Stable per-slot token for this row (see RowTokenAt) — only the value-type half of RowKey's identity is ever built from this; reference types key off their own instance identity hash instead.

parameters.name: DetailTemplate
parameters.description: Row-detail template shown in an expandable sub-row below this row when set.

parameters.name: OnContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when the row is right-clicked, carrying the item and the pointer's client X/Y coordinates for positioning the context menu.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <tr> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the <tr> element.

events.name: OnContextMenu
events.description: Fires when the row is right-clicked, carrying the item and the pointer's client X/Y coordinates for positioning the context menu.

parameters.name: SearchText
parameters.description: Current value of the global search box.

parameters.name: SearchTextChanged
parameters.description: Fires on every keystroke in the global search box with the new value.

parameters.name: RegisteredContent
parameters.description: The ToolbarContent{TItem} component the consumer placed inside the DataGrid, forwarded by the parent grid. When null, the toolbar's left slot renders just the search + filter chips; when non-null, its Class styles the wrapper and its ChildContent renders alongside the chips.

parameters.name: OnColumnVisibilityToggle
parameters.description: Mirrors OnColumnReorder as forwarded state; the actual column-visibility/reorder UI (DataGridToolbarColumns{TItem}) gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnColumnToggle
parameters.description: Mirrors OnColumnReorder as forwarded state; column-visibility toggling is wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnColumnReorder
parameters.description: Mirrors OnColumnReorder as forwarded state; column reordering is wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnExport
parameters.description: Mirrors OnServerRequest-adjacent export wiring as forwarded state; the export UI (DataGridToolbarExport{TItem}) gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnRemoveFilter
parameters.description: Fires when a filter chip's remove (×) button is clicked, carrying the removed FilterDescriptor.

parameters.name: SelectedItems
parameters.description: Currently-selected items. Gates whether the "copy selected" tool (DataGridToolbarCopySelected{TItem}) renders.

parameters.name: AllItems
parameters.description: All items available for export/copy (not just the current page).

parameters.name: EffectiveColumns
parameters.description: The grid's effective column list. Along with SelectedItems, gates whether the "copy selected" tool renders.

parameters.name: EnableLayoutPersistence
parameters.description: Shows the layouts dropdown (DataGridToolbarLayouts{TItem}) when true, mirroring EnableLayoutPersistence.

parameters.name: OnSaveLayout
parameters.description: Mirrors OnLayoutSave as forwarded state; the layouts UI gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnResetLayout
parameters.description: Forwarded state mirroring the grid's layout-reset action; the layouts UI gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: GlobalLayouts
parameters.description: Mirrors GlobalLayouts as forwarded state; the layouts UI gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnSaveNamedLayout
parameters.description: Mirrors OnSaveNamedLayout as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead.

parameters.name: OnDeleteNamedLayout
parameters.description: Mirrors OnDeleteNamedLayout as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead.

parameters.name: OnApplyNamedLayout
parameters.description: Forwarded state mirroring the grid's named-layout-apply action; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: LayoutStorageKey
parameters.description: Mirrors LayoutStorageKey as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead.

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Mirrors OnError as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: Expandable
parameters.description: Shows the fullscreen-expand tool (DataGridToolbarFullscreen{TItem}) when true, mirroring Expandable.

parameters.name: IsExpanded
parameters.description: Forwarded state mirroring IsExpanded; the fullscreen tool reads its own state through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: OnToggleExpanded
parameters.description: Forwarded state mirroring the grid's fullscreen-toggle action; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Show the global search box. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowColumnChooser
parameters.description: Show the Columns (visibility/reorder) button. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowExport
parameters.description: Show the Export dropdown. Default true. Combined with ExportFormats.

parameters.name: ExportFormats
parameters.description: Which export formats to include in the dropdown. Default All.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the toolbar's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the toolbar's outer wrapper.

events.description: Fires on every keystroke in the global search box with the new value.

events.name: OnColumnVisibilityToggle
events.description: Mirrors OnColumnReorder as forwarded state; the actual column-visibility/reorder UI (DataGridToolbarColumns{TItem}) gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnColumnToggle
events.description: Mirrors OnColumnReorder as forwarded state; column-visibility toggling is wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnColumnReorder
events.description: Mirrors OnColumnReorder as forwarded state; column reordering is wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnExport
events.description: Mirrors OnServerRequest-adjacent export wiring as forwarded state; the export UI (DataGridToolbarExport{TItem}) gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnRemoveFilter
events.description: Fires when a filter chip's remove (×) button is clicked, carrying the removed FilterDescriptor.

events.name: OnSaveLayout
events.description: Mirrors OnLayoutSave as forwarded state; the layouts UI gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnResetLayout
events.description: Forwarded state mirroring the grid's layout-reset action; the layouts UI gets its data through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnSaveNamedLayout
events.description: Mirrors OnSaveNamedLayout as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead.

events.name: OnDeleteNamedLayout
events.description: Mirrors OnDeleteNamedLayout as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead.

events.name: OnApplyNamedLayout
events.description: Forwarded state mirroring the grid's named-layout-apply action; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnError
events.description: Mirrors OnError as forwarded state; wired through the cascaded DataGridToolbarContext{TItem} instead of this parameter.

events.name: OnToggleExpanded
