parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes applied to the wrapper around the toolbar content (the flex row holding your custom buttons + the filter chips).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom content rendered in the toolbar's left-hand slot alongside the built-in filter chips, replacing the default right-hand tool stack (column chooser, export, layouts, etc.) so the consumer takes full control of the tools.

DataTable.name: DataTable
DataTable.description: Table with sorting, pagination, and row selection built in.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The rows to render. Enumerated once per parameter set into _itemsList; null or empty renders EmptyTemplate (or the built-in "No results" placeholder) instead of the table body.

parameters.name: HeaderTemplate
parameters.description: Header cells rendered inside the single <tr> of <thead>, after the selection checkbox column (if Selectable is on). Typically one <th> per column, e.g. via DataTableSortableHeader.

parameters.name: RowTemplate
parameters.description: Per-row content, rendered once for each item in Items and given the current item as its context. Typically one <td> per column.

parameters.name: LoadingTemplate
parameters.description: Content rendered inside each skeleton row while IsLoading is true. Rendered SkeletonRows times.

parameters.name: EmptyTemplate
parameters.description: Content shown in place of the table body when Items is null or empty. Falls back to a centered "No results." message when unset.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows SkeletonRows loading rows (via LoadingTemplate) instead of the real data while true.

parameters.name: SkeletonRows
parameters.description: Number of skeleton rows rendered while IsLoading is true. Default 5.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <table> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer scrollable wrapper <div>.

parameters.name: SortColumn
parameters.description: The currently sorted column's identifier, as set by a header (e.g. Column). Two-way bindable via SortColumnChanged; the table itself does not sort Items — sorting is left to the consumer.

parameters.name: SortColumnChanged
parameters.description: Raised when SortColumn changes.

parameters.name: SortDir
parameters.description: The current sort direction for SortColumn. Default Ascending.

parameters.name: SortDirChanged
parameters.description: Raised when SortDir changes.

parameters.name: OnSort
parameters.description: Raised when a sortable header is clicked, with the target column and its new direction. Combine with SortColumn/SortDir (or their two-way bindings) to actually re-order Items.

parameters.name: Selectable
parameters.description: Enables row selection: renders a checkbox column (with a "select all" checkbox in the header) and aria-selected/aria-multiselectable on the grid.

parameters.name: SelectedItems
parameters.description: The currently selected rows. Two-way bindable via SelectedItemsChanged; membership is decided by ItemKey when supplied, otherwise by reference/value equality.

parameters.name: SelectedItemsChanged
parameters.description: Raised with a new HashSet{T} whenever selection changes (row toggle or select-all). Always a fresh instance so @bind-SelectedItems and change detection see the update.

parameters.name: ItemKey
parameters.description: Optional stable-key selector for selection membership. When TItem is a plain reference type (not a record / value type), the default HashSet{T} compares by object reference — so refreshing Items with new instances that are value-equal but reference-distinct silently drops the selection highlight. Supply a key (e.g. p => p.Id) and membership is decided by that key instead of reference identity, so selection survives a same-content refresh. When null, membership falls back to SelectedItems.Contains(item) (reference/value equality), preserving the original behaviour.

parameters.name: AriaColCount
parameters.description: Total column count reported via aria-colcount on the grid (including the selection column when Selectable is on). Set this when the header/row templates render a fixed number of columns so assistive tech can announce "column X of N". 0 (default) omits the attribute since the count can't be inferred from consumer templates.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: Virtualize the row list using Blazor's <Virtualize> — only renders rows in the viewport.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in pixels used by the virtualizer (default 41). Only relevant when Virtualize is true.

events.name: SortColumnChanged
events.description: Raised when SortColumn changes.

events.name: SortDirChanged
events.description: Raised when SortDir changes.

events.name: OnSort
events.description: Raised when a sortable header is clicked, with the target column and its new direction. Combine with SortColumn/SortDir (or their two-way bindings) to actually re-order Items.

events.name: SelectedItemsChanged
events.description: Raised with a new HashSet{T} whenever selection changes (row toggle or select-all). Always a fresh instance so @bind-SelectedItems and change detection see the update.

examples.title: Default
examples.code: Status Email Amount @payment.Status @payment.Email $@payment.Amount

examples.title: Loading State
examples.code: ... ...

examples.title: Empty State
examples.code:
<DataTable Items="Array.Empty<Item>()" TItem="Item">
    <HeaderTemplate>...</HeaderTemplate>
    <EmptyTemplate>
        <EmptyState Title="No data" Description="Nothing to display." />
    </EmptyTemplate>
    <RowTemplate>...</RowTemplate>
</DataTable>

examples.title: Sortable Columns
examples.code: Name Email Role @context.Name @context.Email @context.Role @code { private string? _sortColumn; private DataTable.SortDirection _sortDir = DataTable.SortDirection.None; private void HandleSort((string Column, DataTable.SortDirection Direction) sort) { _sortColumn = sort.Column; _sortDir = sort.Direction; } }

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The header's label content, rendered before the sort direction icon inside the clickable button.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: Identifier for the column this header controls. Compared against SortColumn to decide which sort icon to show and passed back on OnSort.

parameters.name: SortColumn
parameters.description: The DataTable{TItem}'s currently sorted column, typically bound to DataTable.SortColumn. When it matches Column, the header shows an active (ascending/descending) icon instead of the neutral one.

parameters.name: SortDirection
parameters.description: The current sort direction for this column when it is the active SortColumn, typically bound to DataTable.SortDir.

parameters.name: OnSort
parameters.description: Raised on click with this header's Column and the next direction in the ascending → descending → none cycle.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <th> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <th> element.

events.name: OnSort
events.description: Raised on click with this header's Column and the next direction in the ascending → descending → none cycle.

DatePicker.name: DatePicker
DatePicker.description: Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Picker visual style. Defaults to Calendar.

parameters.name: DateTimeValue
parameters.description: Optional DateTime? binding. When set, takes precedence over Value. Changes fire both ValueChanged (DateOnly?) and DateTimeValueChanged (DateTime?). When ShowTimePicker is enabled the current Time selection is folded into the emitted DateTime; otherwise the time component is midnight.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Date format string. When null (default), the display falls back to the current culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for parsing and formatting within this picker. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization.

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Custom predicate to disable specific dates (e.g. booked rooms, unavailable slots). Returns true for dates that should not be selectable.

parameters.name: DateClass
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes per day cell (e.g. status backgrounds for booking calendars).

parameters.name: DateTooltip
parameters.description: Per-date tooltip text rendered as the day cell's title attribute (native browser tooltip).

parameters.name: DateBadge
parameters.description: Per-date indicator slot (status dots, count badges, icons) rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The selected days for Multiple. Clicking a day (or Enter/Space on it) toggles it in/out of the set; the popover stays open so several days can be picked in one session. Pair with ValuesChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: AllowKeyboardInput
parameters.description: When true (default), the trigger renders as a typeable <input> in the configured Format. On blur / Enter the buffer is parsed via DateOnly.TryParseExact(string, string, IFormatProvider, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles, out DateOnly) (with a fallback to DateOnly.TryParse(string, IFormatProvider, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles, out DateOnly)). On success the value commits via ValueChanged; on failure the buffer reverts and OnParseError fires. Set to false to keep the historic button-only trigger (input readonly). Has no effect for Range, Wheel, Inline, or when a custom TriggerContent is supplied.

parameters.name: OnParseError
parameters.description: Fires when keyboard input cannot be parsed against the active Format (or culture short pattern), or parses to a date that is rejected by MinDate/MaxDate/IsDateDisabled. The argument is the offending raw buffer.

parameters.name: Inline
parameters.description: Optional controlled-mode override for the popover open state. When non-null, the consumer holds the source of truth — the picker no longer mutates its internal state and instead raises OpenChanged. Use this when the picker lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active DataAnnotationsValidator) and the popover would otherwise close mid-click during a parameter cascade. When null (default), the picker falls back to its internal open state and behaves exactly as before.

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: Leftmost column day of week. Null means culture default.

parameters.name: ShowWeekNumbers
parameters.description: When true, renders an ISO week-number column.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the popover would open or close. Pair with Open via @bind-Open for the controlled-mode pattern described above.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true, the date picker expands to fill its container width — equivalent to FullWidth on a Button. Propagates w-full to the Popover wrapper and PopoverTrigger so the constraint reaches the rendered trigger element through the shrink-wrap chain.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the date-picker trigger on first render. Whichever trigger element is rendered (button / range-button / masked input) receives the focus via its shared id. See Input.AutoFocus for the rationale.

events.name: OnParseError
events.description: Fires when keyboard input cannot be parsed against the active Format (or culture short pattern), or parses to a date that is rejected by MinDate/MaxDate/IsDateDisabled. The argument is the offending raw buffer.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the popover would open or close. Pair with Open via @bind-Open for the controlled-mode pattern described above.

enums.name: DatePickerVariant
enums.description: Visual style of the picker. Calendar renders the existing month-grid Calendar (default). Wheel renders three iOS-style snap-scrolling columns (day / month / year) — designed for mobile / touch UIs.

records.name: DatePickerPreset
records.signature: DatePickerPreset(string Label, DateOnly Date, DateOnly? End = null)
records.description: Quick-select preset. For Single only Date is used; for Range the preset selects Date..End (or a single-day range when End is null).

examples.title: Default
examples.code: <DatePicker @bind-Value="_selectedDate" />

examples.title: With Label
examples.code:
<Label>Date of birth</Label>
<DatePicker @bind-Value="_date" Placeholder="Pick your date of birth" />

examples.title: Custom Format
examples.code: <DatePicker @bind-Value="_date" Format="yyyy-MM-dd" Placeholder="YYYY-MM-DD" />

examples.title: Min & Max Date
examples.code:
<DatePicker @bind-Value="_date" MinDate="@_minDate" MaxDate="@_maxDate" Placeholder="Select within range" />

@code {
    private DateOnly? _date;
    private DateOnly _minDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today);
    private DateOnly _maxDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today.AddDays(30));
}

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Custom predicate to disable specific dates (e.g. booked rooms). Returns true for dates that should not be selectable.

parameters.name: DateClass
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes per day cell — forwarded to inner Calendar.

parameters.name: DateTooltip
parameters.description: Per-date tooltip text rendered as the day cell's title.

parameters.name: DateBadge
parameters.description: Per-date indicator slot rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Date format. When null (default) the inner DatePicker falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true, the date range picker expands to fill its container width. Forwarded directly to the inner DatePicker.

DateTimePicker.name: DateTimePicker
DateTimePicker.description: Combined date + time picker with timezone awareness.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the trigger button.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when invalid. Only rendered when this picker is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when not invalid. Only rendered when this picker is standalone (outside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Field label rendered above the trigger button. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The trigger button's name attribute, for form submission/identification.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected local date and time. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; also derivable from/to OffsetValue when a TimeZone is configured.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user picks a date or time (or clears via Clearable) with the new Value.

parameters.name: OffsetValue
parameters.description: Optional DateTimeOffset binding. When the caller binds this, it takes precedence: writes flow back through OffsetValueChanged with the offset that matches TimeZone at the picked wall-clock time (DST-aware). The plain ValueChanged still fires for back-compat. Recommended over Value when working with multi-zone scenarios.

parameters.name: OffsetValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised alongside ValueChanged with the offset-aware instant (DST-adjusted for TimeZone) whenever the picked value changes.

parameters.name: TimeZone
parameters.description: When non-null, all display/edit happens in this zone — the user picks a wall-clock instant in that zone, and the emitted DateTimeOffset carries the matching offset for that instant (DST-aware). When null, the picker behaves exactly as before (local time, no zone indicator).

parameters.name: ShowTimeZoneLabel
parameters.description: When true (default) and TimeZone is set, renders a small "Europe/Berlin (UTC+1)"-style indicator next to the value.

parameters.name: Use24Hour
parameters.description: Shows 24-hour time (00-23) instead of a 12-hour clock with an AM/PM column. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowSeconds
parameters.description: Adds a seconds column to the time picker. Default false (minute precision).

parameters.name: MinuteStep
parameters.description: Minute column increment. 1 (default) lists every minute; 5/15 etc. list only multiples of the step.

parameters.name: SecondStep
parameters.description: Second column increment (only relevant when ShowSeconds is true). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: DateFormat
parameters.description: Date portion format. When null (default) falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown on the trigger button when no value is selected. Falls back to the localized "DateTimePicker.Placeholder" string when null.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for date/time formatting. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the popover from opening.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows a trailing clear (X) button on the trigger when a value is selected, letting the user reset Value to null.

parameters.name: MinDate
parameters.description: Earliest selectable date/time. Forwarded to the embedded calendar's date gate; on the boundary day, also disables times before MinDate's time-of-day.

parameters.name: MaxDate
parameters.description: Latest selectable date/time. Forwarded to the embedded calendar's date gate; on the boundary day, also disables times after MaxDate's time-of-day.

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Per-date predicate returning true to disable a specific date in the embedded calendar, independent of MinDate/MaxDate.

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: Override the locale-derived first day of week shown by the embedded calendar. Forwarded to the inner Calendar; leave null to fall back to CurrentCulture.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger button.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised when the user picks a date or time (or clears via Clearable) with the new Value.

events.name: OffsetValueChanged
events.description: Raised alongside ValueChanged with the offset-aware instant (DST-adjusted for TimeZone) whenever the picked value changes.

examples.title: Basic DateTimePicker
examples.code: <DateTimePicker @bind-Value="_dateTime" />

examples.title: Clearable
examples.code: <DateTimePicker @bind-Value="_dateTime" Clearable="true" />

examples.title: 12-Hour with Seconds
examples.code: <DateTimePicker @bind-Value="_dateTime" Use24Hour="false" ShowSeconds="true" />

examples.title: Min & Max Date
examples.code:
<DateTimePicker @bind-Value="_dateTime" MinDate="@_minDate" MaxDate="@_maxDate" Placeholder="Select within range" />

@code {
    private DateTime? _dateTime;
    private DateTime _minDate = DateTime.Today;
    private DateTime _maxDate = DateTime.Today.AddDays(30);
}

Delta.name: Delta
Delta.description: Trend indicator showing delta value with up/down arrow + color.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The change value to display, rounded to 2 decimal places. NaN/infinite values render as an em dash with no arrow or colour.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: How Value is formatted: Percent (default) appends a % sign; Absolute renders the bare number.

parameters.name: Positive
parameters.description: Which direction counts as "good" for colouring. Good (default) colours a positive delta green and negative red; Bad inverts this (e.g. a churn-rate metric where lower is better).

parameters.name: ShowArrow
parameters.description: When true (default), shows an up/down chevron alongside the value; hidden for a zero or non-finite delta regardless.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for number formatting (decimal separator, group separator). Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization — a de-DE user sees +12,5% while an en-US user sees +12.5%.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root <span>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root <span>.

examples.title: Percent Delta
examples.code:
<Delta Value="12.5" />
<Delta Value="-3.2" />
<Delta Value="0" />

examples.title: Absolute Delta
examples.code:
<Delta Value="420" Format="Delta.DeltaFormat.Absolute" />
<Delta Value="-88" Format="Delta.DeltaFormat.Absolute" />

examples.title: Inverted Positive (Lower is Better)
examples.code:
<Delta Value="-5.1" Positive="Delta.DeltaDirection.Bad" />
<Delta Value="2.3" Positive="Delta.DeltaDirection.Bad" />

examples.title: No Arrow
examples.code:
<Delta Value="7.4" ShowArrow="false" />
<Delta Value="-1.9" ShowArrow="false" />

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The density cascaded to every density-aware descendant. Default Comfortable.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The subtree that receives the cascaded density.

examples.title: Scoping a panel
examples.code:
<DensityScope Value="Density.Compact">
    <Button>Save</Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
    <Input Placeholder="Search…" />
</DensityScope>

<DensityScope Value="Density.Spacious">
    <Button>Save</Button>
    <Input Placeholder="Search…" />
</DensityScope>

examples.title: Interactive — switch the scope
examples.code:
<DensityScope Value="_density">
    <Button>Primary</Button>
    <Input Placeholder="Type here…" />
</DensityScope>

@code {
    private Density _density = Density.Comfortable;
}

examples.title: Per-component override
examples.code:
<DensityScope Value="Density.Compact">
    <Button>Inherits Compact</Button>
    <Button Density="Density.Spacious">Overrides to Spacious</Button>
</DensityScope>

Descriptions.name: Descriptions
Descriptions.description: Key-value pair list for read-only entity details.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: One or more DescriptionsItem elements, rendered inside the <dl>.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Optional heading rendered above the description list.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Wraps the list in a bordered card and separates items with divider lines instead of gaps.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: Number of grid columns the items are laid out into: 1, 2, 3, or 4. Any other value falls back to 3.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer container.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<Descriptions Title="User Details" Column="2">
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Name">John Doe</DescriptionsItem>

    <DescriptionsItem Label="Status">Active</DescriptionsItem>
</Descriptions>

examples.title: Bordered

<Descriptions Title="Order Details" Bordered="true" Column="3">

    <DescriptionsItem Label="Date">Jan 27, 2025</DescriptionsItem>

</Descriptions>

    <DescriptionsItem Label="RAM">16 GB</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Storage">512 GB</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="GPU">Integrated</DescriptionsItem>
</Descriptions>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The value content, rendered inside the <dd>.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: The term text, rendered inside the <dt>. When omitted, the <dt> is still rendered (empty, visually hidden via sr-only) so the term/description pairing stays valid for screen readers.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's wrapping <div>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's wrapping <div>.

Dialog.name: Dialog
Dialog.description: Modal dialog with header, content, footer, and focus trap.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The dialog's trigger and content, typically a DialogTrigger and DialogContent.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the dialog is open. Two-way bindable via OpenChanged; when neither this nor OpenChanged is supplied, the dialog manages its own state internally, seeded from DefaultOpen.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the open state changes, e.g. via DialogTrigger, Escape, a backdrop click, or DialogClose.

parameters.name: DefaultOpen
parameters.description: Uncontrolled initial open state. Used only when the consumer does NOT bind Open (Radix defaultOpen): the dialog then owns its open state internally, seeded from this value. When Open is supplied the component is controlled and this is ignored.

parameters.name: OnBeforeClose
parameters.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, X button, or a DialogClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort the dismiss — useful for "discard unsaved changes?" guards. Inspect Reason to find out which gesture asked to close.

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Legacy alias for Open.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Legacy alias for OpenChanged.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Raised when the open state changes, e.g. via DialogTrigger, Escape, a backdrop click, or DialogClose.

events.name: OnBeforeClose
events.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, X button, or a DialogClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort the dismiss — useful for "discard unsaved changes?" guards. Inspect Reason to find out which gesture asked to close.

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Legacy alias for OpenChanged.

records.name: DialogContext
records.signature: DialogContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string TitleId, string DescriptionId, Func<string, Task<bool>> TryDismiss, DialogDescriptionRegistry DescriptionRegistry = null!, Action RegisterDescription = null!, Action UnregisterDescription = null!)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Dialog @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <DialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Edit Profile</Button>
    </DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Edit Profile</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>Make changes to your profile here.</DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <Grid Columns="4" Gap="4" Class="items-center py-4">
            <Label Class="text-right">Name</Label>
            <Input Class="col-span-3" Value="John Doe" />
            <Label Class="text-right">Username</Label>
            <Input Class="col-span-3" Value="@johndoe" />
        </Grid>
        <DialogFooter>
            <DialogClose>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
            </DialogClose>
            <DialogClose>
                <Button>Save Changes</Button>
            </DialogClose>
        </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
}

examples.title: Simple Dialog
examples.code:
<Dialog @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <DialogTrigger>
        <Button>Share</Button>
    </DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Share this document</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>Anyone with the link can view this document.</DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <Stack Gap="4" Class="py-4">
            <Input Value="https://example.com/share/abc123" />
        </Stack>
        <DialogFooter>
            <DialogClose>
                <Button>Copy Link</Button>
            </DialogClose>
        </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
}

examples.title: Confirmation Dialog
examples.code:
<Dialog @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <DialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">
            <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Trash)" class="h-4 w-4" /> Delete Account
        </Button>
    </DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
                This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your
                account and remove your data from our servers.
            </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <DialogFooter>
            <DialogClose>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
            </DialogClose>
            <DialogClose>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Yes, delete account</Button>
            </DialogClose>
        </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
}

examples.title: Prevent Close
examples.code:
<Dialog @bind-Open="_preventCloseOpen">
    <DialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Protected Dialog</Button>
    </DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent PreventClose="true">
        <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Unsaved Changes</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?</DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <DialogFooter>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" OnClick="@(() => _preventCloseOpen = false)">Discard</Button>
            <Button OnClick="@(() => _preventCloseOpen = false)">Save Changes</Button>
        </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

@code {
    private bool _preventCloseOpen;
}

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The close trigger's content, e.g. a "Cancel" button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The dialog panel's content, typically DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, and DialogFooter.

parameters.name: PreventClose
parameters.description: Disables the Escape key and backdrop click as dismiss gestures, and (unless ShowCloseButton forces it) hides the X button — leaving only an explicit DialogClose (or programmatic close) able to dismiss the dialog.

parameters.name: ShowCloseButton
parameters.description: Whether the top-end close (X) button renders. null (default) keeps the legacy coupling — X shows whenever PreventClose is false. true forces the X even on a modal dialog (backdrop/Escape stay disabled; the X still routes through the dismiss guard so an OnBeforeClose veto applies); false hides it for fully custom close chrome. Mirrors OverlayOptions.ShowCloseButton for service dialogs.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Controls the panel's max width, from Sm up to Full. Default Default.

parameters.name: Scrollable
parameters.description: Caps the panel at 85vh and makes its content vertically scrollable, so a tall body doesn't overflow the viewport.

parameters.name: PlayExitAnimation
parameters.description: When true (the default), closing the dialog keeps the panel mounted for a brief zoom-out (and backdrop fade-out) before unmounting, instead of vanishing instantly — so a declarative <DialogContent> animates its close the same way a declarative Sheet already does, and the same way OverlayProvider already animates service-opened dialogs. Set to false to opt OUT (immediate unmount on close) for tests or consumers who want an instant dismiss.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the dialog panel.

parameters.name: ZIndex
parameters.description: Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay so a Dialog opened from inside another Dialog stacks above instead of colliding.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the dialog panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description:
The description text, rendered inside a

that DialogContent wires to aria-describedby for as long as this component is mounted.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description:
Additional CSS classes merged onto the

element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description:
Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the

element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The footer's content, typically action buttons.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the footer <div>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the footer <div>.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The header's content, typically a DialogTitle and DialogDescription.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the header <div>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the header <div>.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The title text, rendered inside an <h2> that DialogContent wires to aria-labelledby.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <h2> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <h2> element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper element (or folded onto the single child element when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Prefer a <button> child (a <Button Href> link activates on Enter only, not Space). Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger element (or the TriggerSlot passed to the AsChild child).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger element (or the TriggerSlot passed to the AsChild child).

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Layout direction applied to descendants. Rtl flips logical CSS utilities, native text alignment, form controls and bidi text. Default Ltr.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The subtree that renders under the given Direction.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root div.

examples.title: LTR vs RTL
Nested scope override
examples.code:
<DirectionProvider Direction="LayoutDirection.Rtl">
    <Flex Align="center" Gap="3">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Info)" class="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">Outer panel is RTL.</Lumeo.Text>
    </Flex>

    @* Nested provider overrides just this subtree *@
    <DirectionProvider Direction="LayoutDirection.Ltr">
        <Flex Align="center" Gap="3">
            <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Info)" class="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">This block is forced back to LTR.</Lumeo.Text>
        </Flex>
    </DirectionProvider>
</DirectionProvider>

examples.title: Wrapping the whole app
examples.code:
@* App.razor / MainLayout — wrap once. *@
<DirectionProvider Direction="@(_isRtl ? LayoutDirection.Rtl : LayoutDirection.Ltr)">
    @Body
</DirectionProvider>

Dock.name: Dock
Dock.description: macOS-style icon dock with cursor-proximity magnification.

parameters.name: MaxScale
parameters.description: Maximum scale factor applied to the item closest to the cursor (e.g. 1.8 = 80% bigger).

parameters.name: MagnifyRadius
parameters.description: Radius (px) around each item within which neighbors start scaling.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label for the dock toolbar container. Defaults to "Application Dock".

    </button>
    <button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-card border border-border/40 flex items-center justify-center" title="Files">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="Lucide.FolderOpen" class="h-6 w-6 text-foreground/80" />
    </button>
    <button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-card border border-border/40 flex items-center justify-center" title="Mail">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="Lucide.Mail" class="h-6 w-6 text-foreground/80" />
    </button>
</Dock>

examples.code:
<Dock MaxScale="2.2" MagnifyRadius="120">
    <!-- dock items with SvgGlyph icons -->
</Dock>

Drawer.name: Drawer
Drawer.description: Slide-up sheet for mobile-first contextual content.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The drawer's parts: typically a DrawerTrigger and a DrawerContent.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the drawer panel is open.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for Open.

parameters.name: OnBeforeClose
parameters.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, or a DrawerClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for Open.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for Open.

events.name: OnBeforeClose
events.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, or a DrawerClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged.

records.name: DrawerContext
records.signature: DrawerContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string TitleId, string DescriptionId, Func<string, Task<bool>> TryDismiss, DrawerDescriptionRegistry DescriptionRegistry = null!, Action RegisterDescription = null!, Action UnregisterDescription = null!)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Drawer @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <DrawerTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Drawer</Button>
    </DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent>
        <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>Move Goal</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>Set your daily activity goal.</DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <Stack Gap="0" Class="p-4 text-center">
            <Lumeo.Text Size="5xl" Weight="bold">@_goal</Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">calories/day</Lumeo.Text>
        </Stack>
        <DrawerFooter>
            <DrawerClose>
                <Button Class="w-full">Submit</Button>
            </DrawerClose>
            <DrawerClose>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="w-full">Cancel</Button>
            </DrawerClose>
        </DrawerFooter>
    </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
    private int _goal = 350;
}

examples.title: Filters Drawer
examples.code: Filter Results Narrow down your search.

examples.title: Prevent Close
examples.code:
<Drawer @bind-Open="_preventDrawerOpen">
    <DrawerTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Protected Drawer</Button>
    </DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent PreventClose="true">
        <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>Confirm Action</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>You must choose an option to continue.</DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-4">
            <Button Class="w-full" OnClick="@(() => _preventDrawerOpen = false)">Confirm</Button>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="w-full" OnClick="@(() => _preventDrawerOpen = false)">Cancel</Button>
        </Stack>
    </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>

@code {
    private bool _preventDrawerOpen;
}

examples.title: Snap points (touch)
examples.code:
<Drawer @bind-Open="_snapOpen">
    <DrawerTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Snap Drawer</Button>
    </DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent SnapPoints="_snapPoints" @bind-ActiveSnapPoint="_snapIndex">
        <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>Snap Drawer</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>Drag the handle to snap between 40%, 75%, and full height.</DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-4">
            @* …content… *@
        </Stack>
        <DrawerFooter>
            <DrawerClose><Button Class="w-full">Close</Button></DrawerClose>
        </DrawerFooter>
    </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>

@code {
    private bool _snapOpen;
    private int _snapIndex = 1;                      // open at 75%
    private double[] _snapPoints = { 0.4, 0.75, 1.0 };
}

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The close trigger's content.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The panel's content, typically DrawerHeader, body content, and DrawerFooter.

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Which viewport edge the panel rests against and slides in from. Default Bottom.

parameters.name: Animation
parameters.description: The open/close transition style. Default Slide.

parameters.name: PreventClose
parameters.description: Disables Escape, backdrop-click and swipe dismissal; the drawer can then only be closed programmatically (or, in snap mode, settles at the lowest snap instead of closing). Default false.

parameters.name: SnapPoints
parameters.description: vaul-style snap points: fractional resting heights in ascending order, each 0 < f ≤ 1 (e.g. [0.4, 0.75, 1] = 40% / 75% / fully open). When set on a Top/Bottom drawer, the panel rests at one of these heights, drags between them, and dismisses when flicked/dragged below the lowest. Ignored for Left/Right (which keep plain swipe-to-dismiss). (#218)

parameters.name: ActiveSnapPoint
parameters.description: Index into SnapPoints of the current resting snap. Two-way bindable: updates as the user drags between snaps, and setting it moves the drawer programmatically. -1 (default) opens at the most-open (last) snap. (#218)

parameters.name: ActiveSnapPointChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for ActiveSnapPoint, fired as the user drags between snaps or the panel settles.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel element.

parameters.name: PlayExitAnimation
parameters.description: When true (the default), closing keeps the panel mounted for a slide/fade out before unmounting instead of vanishing instantly — so a declarative drawer animates its close the same way OverlayProvider already animates service-opened ones. Set to false to opt OUT (immediate unmount) for tests or consumers who want an instant dismiss. Ignored in snap-point mode (the JS gesture owns the transform).

parameters.name: ZIndex
parameters.description: Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay.

events.name: ActiveSnapPointChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for ActiveSnapPoint, fired as the user drags between snaps or the panel settles.

parameters.name: ChildContent

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content.

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger element (or the TriggerSlot in AsChild mode).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger element (or merged into the TriggerSlot in AsChild mode).

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Button label text. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom button content (overrides Text). The trailing chevron icon is always appended.

parameters.name: MenuContent
parameters.description: The dropdown menu's items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style forwarded to the underlying Button (default Default).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size forwarded to the underlying Button (default Default).

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger, removes it from the tab order, and force-closes the menu if it was open.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the underlying Button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the focusable trigger wrapper (author-supplied values win over the built-in tabindex/onkeydown).

DropdownMenu.name: DropdownMenu
DropdownMenu.description: Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger and content that make up the menu (typically a DropdownMenuTrigger plus a DropdownMenuContent).

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the menu panel is open. Controlled together with OpenChanged; leave unbound to let the trigger own the state internally.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, click-outside, item selection).

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Use Open instead. IsOpen will be removed in a future release.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Use OpenChanged instead. IsOpenChanged will be removed in a future release.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, click-outside, item selection).

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Use OpenChanged instead. IsOpenChanged will be removed in a future release.

enums.name: MenuItemVariant
enums.description: Visual variant for a menu item (DropdownMenu / ContextMenu / Menubar). Mirrors shadcn/ui's variant prop on menu items. In addition to the applied Tailwind classes, the item emits a data-variant attribute so consumers can drive their own data-[variant=destructive]:… CSS.

records.name: DropdownMenuContext
records.signature: DropdownMenuContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string WrapperId, string ContentId)

<DropdownMenu>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content, rendered after the checkmark indicator.

parameters.name: Checked
parameters.description: Whether the checkbox item is checked. Controlled together with CheckedChanged; when left unbound the item tracks its own toggles internally.

parameters.name: CheckedChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user clicks the item, with the new checked state.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button.

events.name: CheckedChanged
events.description: Fires when the user clicks the item, with the new checked state.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The menu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).

parameters.name: Align
parameters.description: Alignment of the panel relative to the trigger along the cross axis. Defaults to Start.

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Which side of the trigger the panel opens on. Defaults to Bottom.

parameters.name: ShowArrow
parameters.description: When true, renders a small pointer arrow on the panel edge facing the trigger.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the group's role="group" container, exposed via aria-label.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fires when the item is activated (click or Enter/Space). The menu closes right after this callback runs.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the item is not clickable/focusable and renders with reduced opacity.

parameters.name: Inset
parameters.description: Indents the item by a label's width so it lines up with checkbox/radio items in the same menu (shadcn inset). Adds ps-8 and emits data-inset.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant. Destructive renders the item in the destructive color and emits data-variant="destructive".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's root button.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Fires when the item is activated (click or Enter/Space). The menu closes right after this callback runs.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The label text or markup.

parameters.name: Inset
parameters.description: Indents the label to align with inset items (shadcn inset).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the label element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the label element.

parameters.name: ChildContent

parameters.name: Value

parameters.name: ValueChanged

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes

records.name: DropdownMenuSubContext
records.signature:
DropdownMenuSubContext(
        bool IsOpen,
        EventCallback<bool> SetOpen,
        string WrapperId,
        string TriggerId,
        string ContentId,
        EventCallback CloseTree,
        Action ScheduleClose,
        Action CancelClose,

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The submenu's items (typically DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuSeparator, etc.).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the submenu panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the submenu panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the trigger is not clickable/focusable and cannot open the submenu.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's root button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger's root button.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot (carrying group + data-state so a descendant chevron still rotates, plus the trigger id and menu ARIA) that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal. Prefer a <button> child. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true the trigger ignores clicks and is marked aria-disabled. The live @onclick sits on this outer role="button" element, not the wrapped Button, so disabling only the inner button (as DropdownButton/SplitButton do) previously still let a click on the trigger padding open the menu — this gates that.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger wrapper (ignored when AsChild is set — the child owns its own classes via the slot).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger wrapper (or merges into the TriggerSlot's attributes when AsChild is set).

EmptyState.name: EmptyState
EmptyState.description: Illustrated placeholder for empty lists with call-to-action.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: Custom illustration slot for branded empty states. Wins over IconContent when both are provided. Use for SVGs / images where the icon doesn't carry enough brand weight (404, broken state, onboarding hero).

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: The headline shown below the icon/illustration. Rendered in an <h3>; omitted entirely when blank.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Supporting copy shown below the title in the muted foreground color. Omitted entirely when blank.

parameters.name: Action
parameters.description: Call-to-action slot rendered below the description (typically a Button) to help the user resolve the empty state.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root container.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Centered heading above the grid. Also names the <section> landmark via aria-labelledby. Omitted when null/empty.

parameters.name: Subtitle
parameters.description: Centered supporting text below Title.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns at the widest breakpoint: 1, 2, 3 (default) or 4. Any other value falls back to the 3-column layout.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The feature callouts, typically FeatureItem instances.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root section.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root section.

examples.title: Basic Feature Grid
examples.code:
<FeatureGrid Title="Everything in the box"
             Subtitle="A focused set of primitives that compose into anything.">
    <FeatureItem Title="Theming" Description="Every color is a CSS variable.">
        <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Palette)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
    </FeatureItem>
    <FeatureItem Title="Accessible" Description="WAI-ARIA roles and keyboard navigation.">
        <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Accessibility)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
    </FeatureItem>
    <FeatureItem Title="Density" Description="Flip a panel between compact and spacious.">
        <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Rows3)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
    </FeatureItem>
</FeatureGrid>

examples.title: Two Columns

<FeatureGrid Columns="2" Title="Built for Blazor">
    <FeatureItem Title="Native components" Description="Pure Razor with thin interop where it counts." />
    <FeatureItem Title="Source generators" Description="The [LumeoForm] generator wires up validation and binding." />
</FeatureGrid>

parameters.description: Feature heading, rendered as a bold h3 below the icon badge.

parameters.name: Description

parameters.name: IconContent

FileManager.name: FileManager
FileManager.description: Headless file and folder explorer — folder tree, breadcrumb path, list/grid views, lazy loading, inline rename, context-menu operations.

parameters.name: Root
parameters.description: The file tree's top-level nodes. Rendered in both the left folder tree and (when CurrentPath is null) the right-hand file list.

parameters.name: CurrentPath
parameters.description: The ID of the currently open folder. Null means the root level. Uses Id as the path identifier.

parameters.name: CurrentPathChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user navigates (double-click, breadcrumb, or up button) with the newly-open folder's id, or null when returning to the root.

parameters.name: LoadChildren
parameters.description: Called the first time a folder is opened if its Children is null. Return the loaded children.

parameters.name: ViewMode
parameters.description: List or grid layout for the right-hand file view. Two-way bindable via ViewModeChanged; otherwise toggled internally by the toolbar buttons.

parameters.name: ViewModeChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user switches between list and grid view.

parameters.name: SelectedNode
parameters.description: The currently selected file/folder node (row or tile highlight, and the gate for the toolbar Delete button). Two-way bindable via SelectedNodeChanged.

parameters.name: SelectedNodeChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the selection changes — via a click, Space, or an internal clear (e.g. after the selected node is deleted or removed from a refreshed Root).

parameters.name: OnFileOpen
parameters.description: Raised when a file (not a folder) is opened via double-click or Enter.

parameters.name: OnRename
parameters.description: Raised with the node and trimmed new name when an inline rename is committed (Enter or blur) with a non-empty, changed value. Enables the context menu's Rename item.

parameters.name: OnDelete
parameters.description: Raised with the node(s) to delete — from the context menu or the toolbar Delete button (acting on SelectedNode). Enables both entry points.

parameters.name: OnNewFolder
parameters.description: Raised with the current folder (or a synthetic root node) when the toolbar's New Folder button is clicked. Enables that toolbar button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root panel.

events.name: CurrentPathChanged
events.description: Raised when the user navigates (double-click, breadcrumb, or up button) with the newly-open folder's id, or null when returning to the root.

events.name: ViewModeChanged
events.description: Raised when the user switches between list and grid view.

events.name: SelectedNodeChanged
events.description: Raised when the selection changes — via a click, Space, or an internal clear (e.g. after the selected node is deleted or removed from a refreshed Root).

events.name: OnFileOpen
events.description: Raised when a file (not a folder) is opened via double-click or Enter.

events.name: OnRename
events.description: Raised with the node and trimmed new name when an inline rename is committed (Enter or blur) with a non-empty, changed value. Enables the context menu's Rename item.

events.name: OnDelete
events.description: Raised with the node(s) to delete — from the context menu or the toolbar Delete button (acting on SelectedNode). Enables both entry points.

events.name: OnNewFolder
events.description: Raised with the current folder (or a synthetic root node) when the toolbar's New Folder button is clicked. Enables that toolbar button.

FileUpload.name: FileUpload
FileUpload.description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField, on the Dropzone/generic label) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border on the dropzone, destructive helper text) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the control (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for form-field integration. Not currently rendered onto the underlying <InputFile> element.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text. Rendered above the control on the Dropzone/Avatar variants when outside a FormField, or as the Dropzone's headline / the Button variant's caption when set.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Secondary helper text shown below the headline on the Dropzone variant (e.g. accepted types or size limits).

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Allows selecting more than one file at once. Ignored by the Avatar variant, which is always single-file.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: The native accept attribute value (e.g. "image/*" or ".pdf,.docx"), used both to filter the OS file picker and to validate dropped/selected files client-side.

parameters.name: MaxFileSize
parameters.description: Maximum size in bytes allowed per file; larger files are rejected with MaxFileSizeError (or a localized default). Default 10 MB.

parameters.name: MaxFiles
parameters.description: Maximum number of files (counting non-failed/cancelled existing items) allowed in the selection at once; exceeding it rejects the whole new batch with MaxFilesError. Default 10.

parameters.name: ShowThumbnails
parameters.description: Renders an inline image preview (data URI) for image files, on both the file-list rows and the Avatar variant's picker.

parameters.name: FileTemplate
parameters.description: Custom render fragment for each file-list row, receiving the underlying IBrowserFile. Falls back to the built-in row (icon/thumbnail, name, size, status, progress, actions) when unset.

parameters.name: ShowFileList
parameters.description: When true (default), renders the internal file card list after selection. Set to false for immediate-upload flows where the app renders its own file list — the internal card with the remove-X will no longer linger after the upload completes. Selection and upload events (OnFilesSelected, OnUpload, OnFileUploaded) still fire normally regardless of this setting. Pair with Reset via @@ref to clear state and allow the same file to be re-picked.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual presentation: Dropzone (drag-and-drop area, default), Button (compact inline trigger button), or Avatar (single circular image picker).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size of the trigger when Variant="Button". Mirrors ButtonSize so a button-variant FileUpload can match neighbouring buttons in toolbars or compact forms. Has no visual effect on Dropzone or Avatar variants today.

parameters.name: ShowProgress
parameters.description: Legacy: shows a single global progress bar driven by Progress. Ignored once OnUpload is set, since per-file progress is tracked automatically.

parameters.name: OnUpload
parameters.description: Consumer-supplied upload handler. Called once per file after selection (or after explicit StartUploadAsync if AutoUpload is false). Receives the item, an IProgress{T} for reporting percent 0-100, and a CancellationToken that fires if the user clicks Cancel. Should return the server-assigned URL/id on success, or throw/return null on failure.

parameters.name: AutoUpload
parameters.description: When true (default), uploads begin immediately after files are selected. When false, the user must click the Upload button to start. Requires OnUpload to be set.

parameters.name: MaxConcurrentUploads
parameters.description: Maximum number of OnUpload calls running simultaneously.

parameters.name: ChunkSize
parameters.description: Optional chunk size hint (bytes) for consumers that want to implement chunked/resumable upload inside their OnUpload handler. The component passes this value through ChunkSize but does NOT implement chunking itself.

parameters.name: MaxFileSizeError
parameters.description: Overrides the default localized "exceeds max size" message shown when a file is rejected for being larger than MaxFileSize.

parameters.name: MaxFilesError
parameters.description: Overrides the default "Maximum N files allowed" message shown when a selection would exceed MaxFiles.

parameters.name: FileTypeError
parameters.description: Overrides the default "unsupported file type" message shown when a file doesn't match Accept.

parameters.name: OnFilesSelected
parameters.description: Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).

parameters.name: OnFileUploaded
parameters.description: Fires each time a file upload succeeds.

parameters.name: OnAllUploaded
parameters.description: Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).

parameters.name: OnFileFailed
parameters.description: Fires each time a file upload fails.

parameters.name: OnFileRemoved
parameters.description: Fires when a file is removed from the list.

parameters.name: OnFileRejected
parameters.description: Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the variant-specific root element (the dropzone/button/avatar wrapper).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the variant-specific root element.

events.name: OnFilesSelected
events.description: Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).

events.name: OnFileUploaded
events.description: Fires each time a file upload succeeds.

events.name: OnAllUploaded
events.description: Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).

events.name: OnFileFailed
events.description: Fires each time a file upload fails.

events.name: OnFileRemoved
events.description: Fires when a file is removed from the list.

events.name: OnFileRejected
events.description: Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

examples.title: Default
examples.code: <FileUpload OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Image Upload
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Label="Upload an image"
    Description="PNG, JPG or GIF up to 10MB"
    Accept="image/*"
    OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Multiple Files
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Label="Upload documents"
    Description="Select one or more files"
    Multiple="true"
    OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Upload with progress (fake delay)
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Multiple="true"
    Label="Upload files"
    OnUpload="@SimulateUpload"
    OnFileUploaded="@(item => _uploadedCount++)"
    OnAllUploaded="@(items => _allDoneMsg = $"All {items.Count} file(s) done!")"  />

@code {
    private async Task<string?> SimulateUpload(
        FileUpload.FileUploadItem item,
        IProgress<int> progress,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        for (int pct = 0; pct <= 100; pct += 10)
        {
            ct.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();
            progress.Report(pct);
            await Task.Delay(50, ct);
        }
        return $"https://cdn.example.com/{item.Name}";
    }
}

FileViewer.name: FileViewer
FileViewer.description: Universal file preview — auto-detects type from MIME / extension and renders PDF, images, video, audio, Markdown, JSON, CSV, source code (CodeMirror), and plain text inline; unknown types fall back to a download CTA. Pluggable per-kind renderer overrides; auth-aware HttpClient hook.

parameters.name: Src
parameters.description: The URL of the file to preview. Required. Changing it cancels any in-flight text-based fetch (Markdown/Code/Json/Csv/Text) and starts resolving/loading the new file.

parameters.name: Kind
parameters.description: Override detection with an explicit kind. Default Auto.

parameters.name: MimeType
parameters.description: Explicit MIME type from your backend (e.g. "application/pdf"). Wins over HEAD and extension detection but loses to an explicit Kind override.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Human-readable file name. Used for the toolbar label, the download attribute, and the aria-label. Falls back to the last URL path segment when not provided.

parameters.name: AutoHead
parameters.description: Issue a HEAD request to inspect Content-Type when neither Kind nor MimeType is set. Off by default because many CDNs and signed URLs reject HEAD with 405 / 403.

parameters.name: MaxBytes
parameters.description: Cap on the number of bytes fetched for text-based kinds (Markdown, Code, JSON, CSV, Text). Default 10 MB. Excess content is truncated and a one-line notice is appended.

parameters.name: MaxCsvRows
parameters.description: Cap on the number of CSV rows rendered. Default 1000.

parameters.name: ShowToolbar
parameters.description: Show the top toolbar (file name + download). Default true.

parameters.name: ShowDownload
parameters.description: Show the download button in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowFileName
parameters.description: Show the file name in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: HttpClient
parameters.description: Plug a custom HttpClient for the text fetches. Use this to attach a pre-configured Authorization handler instead of mutating the default client. Highest precedence — wins over HttpClientName, DI, and the factory.

parameters.name: HttpClientName
parameters.description: Name of the client to pull from a DI-registered IHttpClientFactory for the text fetches (Markdown/Code/JSON/CSV/Text). When the factory is registered (the common case once AddHttpClient() has been called) this is the recommended way to get a correctly-pooled client and avoid socket exhaustion. Ignored when an explicit HttpClient is supplied. Null/empty uses the factory's default client.

parameters.name: EnableOfficeOnlineViewer
parameters.description: Show an "Open in viewer" action on the Office-document fallback panel that opens the file in the Microsoft Office web viewer. Off by default because it sends the document URL to a Microsoft endpoint and only works for publicly reachable absolute http(s) URLs.

parameters.name: ConfigureRequest
parameters.description: Hook to mutate the outgoing HttpRequestMessage before it's sent — typical use is adding an Authorization header for signed-but-not-presigned URLs.

parameters.name: CustomRenderers
parameters.description: Per-kind renderer overrides. The fragment receives a FileViewerRenderContext with the resolved URL, kind, the fetched text (when applicable) and the display name. When provided for a given kind, the built-in renderer is bypassed for that kind.

parameters.name: LoadingTemplate
parameters.description: Custom loading view. Default is a centered Spinner.

parameters.name: OnKindDetected
parameters.description: Fires once detection settles, with the resolved kind.

parameters.name: OnLoaded
parameters.description: Fires when the file is fully rendered (text fetched, if any).

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Fires on any detection or fetch error, with a message.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the viewer's root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the viewer's root container.

events.name: OnKindDetected
events.description: Fires once detection settles, with the resolved kind.

events.name: OnLoaded
events.description: Fires when the file is fully rendered (text fetched, if any).

events.name: OnError
events.description: Fires on any detection or fetch error, with a message.

enums.name: FileKind
enums.description: Kind of content FileViewer renders. Drives which renderer is invoked and which icon / aria-label is shown in the toolbar. Auto is the default and triggers detection from MIME / extension / HEAD content-type; everything else short-circuits detection.

Filter.name: Filter
Filter.description: Composable faceted filter builder with chips.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Content rendered above the pills row — typically the filter input controls (dropdowns, search box) that produce the active filters.

parameters.name: Pills
parameters.description: Manually-composed filter pills, rendered alongside any pills generated from Filters.

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: Trailing content rendered after the pills row — typically a "clear all" button or similar bulk action.

parameters.name: Filters
parameters.description: Data-driven filter model (#319): when supplied, the bar renders a dismissable FilterPill per descriptor (Field / Operator / Value) and raises OnRemoveFilter on dismiss. The Pills slot still works and renders alongside, so this is purely additive.

parameters.name: OnRemoveFilter
parameters.description: Invoked with the descriptor of a data-driven pill (from Filters) when its dismiss (×) button is clicked.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root container.

events.name: OnRemoveFilter
events.description: Invoked with the descriptor of a data-driven pill (from Filters) when its dismiss (×) button is clicked.

records.name: FilterDescriptor
records.signature: FilterDescriptor(string Field, string? Operator = null, string? Value = null)
records.description: A single active filter: a field, an optional comparison operator (e.g. "=", ">", "contains"), and a display value.

examples.title: Filters with various field types
examples.code:
<FilterBar>
    <ChildContent>
        <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
            <DropdownMenu>
                <DropdownMenuTrigger>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="SlidersHorizontal" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" />
                        Add Filter
                    </Button>
                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                <DropdownMenuContent>
                    <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="@(() => ToggleField("Status"))">Status</DropdownMenuItem>
                    <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="@(() => ToggleField("Priority"))">Priority</DropdownMenuItem>
                </DropdownMenuContent>
            </DropdownMenu>

            @if (_fields.Contains("Status"))
            {
                <Select Value="@_status" ValueChanged="v => _status = v">
                    <SelectTrigger Class="w-[160px] h-8 text-xs">
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span">@(_status == "" ? "Status" : $"Status: {_status}")</Lumeo.Text>
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                        <SelectItem Value="Active">Active</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                </Select>
            }
        </Flex>
    </ChildContent>
    <Pills>
        @if (_status != "")
        {
            <FilterPill Label="Status" Value="@_status" OnDismiss="@(() => _status = "")" />
        }
    </Pills>
</FilterBar>

<FilterBar>
    <ChildContent>
        <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
            <Input placeholder="Search..." Value="@_search"
                   OnInput="e => _search = e.Value?.ToString() ?? """ Class="h-8 w-[220px] text-xs" />
            <Select Value="@_role" ValueChanged="v => _role = v">
                <SelectTrigger Class="w-[150px] h-8 text-xs">
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span">@(_role == "" ? "Role" : _role)</Lumeo.Text>
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem Value="Admin">Admin</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
            </Select>
