parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Extra content rendered below Title/Description, inside the item's main flex-1 column.

parameters.name: Leading
parameters.description: Content rendered at the start of the row (e.g. an icon or avatar), before the title/description.

parameters.name: Trailing
parameters.description: Content rendered at the end of the row (e.g. an action button or chevron), after the title/description.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Primary text, rendered as a truncating single line above Description.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Secondary text, rendered as a truncating single line below Title.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: When set, renders the item as a navigable <a> pointing at this URL instead of a plain <li>. OnClick still fires alongside navigation.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Makes the item clickable/keyboard-activatable (role button when not also an Href link) and raised on click, Enter, or Space.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Dims the item, removes it from the tab order, and suppresses Href navigation and OnClick.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <li> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <li> element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Makes the item clickable/keyboard-activatable (role button when not also an Href link) and raised on click, Enter, or Space.

Map.name: Map
Map.description: Interactive geographic map powered by MapLibre GL — markers, polylines, polygons, circles, arcs, heatmaps, legend overlays, and popups; CARTO vector basemaps, no API key required.

parameters.name: Center
parameters.description: The map's center point (latitude, longitude). Default is roughly the center of Germany, (51.0, 10.4). Pushed to the live map only when the parameter itself changes — panning by the user does not overwrite it unless CenterChanged is bound.

parameters.name: CenterChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for Center, fired as the user pans the map. Binding this switches to controlled mode.

parameters.name: Zoom
parameters.description: The map's zoom level. Default 5.

parameters.name: ZoomChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for Zoom, fired as the user zooms the map. Binding this switches to controlled mode.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the map container. Default "400px".

parameters.name: TileLayer
parameters.description: Accepts a CARTO style preset (Positron, DarkMatter, Voyager), a legacy raster name (OpenStreetMap, CartoLight, CartoDark, Satellite, Terrain) — kept as aliases pointing at the closest GL vector style — or a raw MapLibre style.json URL. Auto (the default) picks Positron or DarkMatter based on the host page's theme, matching mapcn.dev.

parameters.name: Layers
parameters.description: When set, renders a chip-style switcher in the top-right that lets the user pick between presets (or custom { name, url } records).

parameters.name: ZoomControl
parameters.description: Shows the +/- zoom control buttons. Default true.

parameters.name: Attribution
parameters.description: Shows the map's attribution notice. Default true.

parameters.name: ScrollWheelZoom
parameters.description: Allows zooming with the mouse scroll wheel. Default true.

parameters.name: Cluster
parameters.description: Enable MapLibre GL native marker clustering. When true, markers are aggregated into circle bubbles via a GeoJSON cluster source — no additional script is fetched. Cluster bubbles are tinted with --lumeo-map-cluster-highlight (default amber) when at least one child marker is Highlighted. Fine-tune with ClusterRadius, ClusterMaxZoom, ClusterProperties, and ClusterColorExpression.

parameters.name: ClusterProperties
parameters.description: Additional MapLibre clusterProperties expressions merged into the GeoJSON cluster source alongside the built-in highlighted aggregator. Each entry maps a property name to a raw [operator, expression] array — e.g. { "totalScore", new object[] { "+", new object[] { "get", "score" } } }. Only meaningful when Cluster is true. Built-in keys (highlighted) win on collision.

parameters.name: ClusterColorExpression
parameters.description: Replaces the default circle-color MapLibre paint expression on cluster circles. The default expression tints any bubble that contains a highlighted marker with --lumeo-map-cluster-highlight (default amber). Pass a raw MapLibre expression array to drive cluster color from a custom aggregated property instead.

parameters.name: ClusterRadius
parameters.description: Target pixel radius of each cluster circle. Default is 50.

parameters.name: ClusterMaxZoom
parameters.description: Zoom level at which markers fully emerge from their cluster. Default is 14. Lower values break clusters apart at coarser zoom levels.

parameters.name: Geolocate
parameters.description: Adds a "My location" button that geolocates the user.

parameters.name: Fullscreen
parameters.description: Adds a fullscreen toggle button.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.description: Adds a metric scale bar in the bottom-left corner.

parameters.name: Search
parameters.description: Adds a Nominatim-backed search bar in the top-left.

parameters.name: Projection
parameters.description: MapLibre projection name. "mercator" (default flat web-map) or "globe" for a 3-D spherical view. The globe becomes visible at zoom levels roughly 0–3; it blends back to mercator above zoom 4.

parameters.name: AutoFitBounds
parameters.description: When true the map automatically fits its viewport to include all registered markers and shapes after the first render.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Markers and shapes (e.g. MapMarker, MapPolygon) registered against this map via the cascading context. Rendered off-screen — MapLibre draws them on the canvas, not the DOM.

parameters.name: Overlay
parameters.description: Optional content rendered as an absolutely-positioned overlay inside the map container (z-index 10, pointer-events none on the wrapper so map interaction is not blocked). Use absolute-position classes on your own child element to place chips, legends, or status badges (e.g. class="absolute bottom-2 right-2 pointer-events-auto …").

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked with the clicked latitude/longitude when the user clicks the map canvas.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the map's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the map's root element.

events.name: CenterChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for Center, fired as the user pans the map. Binding this switches to controlled mode.

events.name: ZoomChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for Zoom, fired as the user zooms the map. Binding this switches to controlled mode.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked with the clicked latitude/longitude when the user clicks the map canvas.

records.name: MapContext
records.signature: MapContext(Map Owner)
records.description: Cascading context passed to MapMarker + shape children so they can register themselves with the parent Map.

gotchas: MapLibre GL JS and its stylesheet are loaded at runtime from unpkg (CDN) the first time a Map mounts. For strict-CSP or air-gapped deployments, self-host them and set window.lumeoCdn = { mapLibreJs: '/your/maplibre-gl.js', mapLibreCss: '/your/maplibre-gl.css' } before the first Map renders, or run `lumeo deps install --lib maplibre` (CLI). See /docs/cdn-deps.

parameters.name: From
parameters.description: The arc's starting point (latitude, longitude).

parameters.name: To
parameters.description: The arc's ending point (latitude, longitude).

parameters.name: Curvature
parameters.description: How tall the arc rises above the straight chord, as a fraction of the chord's length. 0 = straight line, 1 = a full semicircle-ish bulge. Defaults to 0.25.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Stroke color (any CSS color value). Null uses the layer's default.

parameters.name: Weight
parameters.description: Stroke width in pixels. Default 2.5.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Stroke opacity, 0–1. Default 0.9.

parameters.name: DashArray
parameters.description: SVG dash pattern. Defaults to "5 6" (arcs are dashed by default).

parameters.name: Dashed
parameters.description: Set to false to draw the arc as a solid line instead of the default dashed style. Has no effect when DashArray is set explicitly.

parameters.name: HoverColor
parameters.description: Stroke color on hover. Null = no hover highlight.

parameters.name: HoverWeight
parameters.description: Stroke width on hover. Null = same as Weight.

parameters.name: Animate
parameters.description: Animate the arc drawing on first render (line draws from start to end over ~1 s).

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Plain-text tooltip shown on hover.

parameters.name: PopupHtml
parameters.description: Raw HTML shown in a popup when the arc is clicked.

parameters.name: Center
parameters.description: Circle center as (lat, lon).

parameters.name: RadiusMeters
parameters.description: Radius in meters. Leaflet draws the circle in real-world units, so its pixel size grows/shrinks with zoom.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Stroke color (any CSS color value). Null uses the layer's default.

parameters.name: FillColor
parameters.description: Fill color (any CSS color value). Null uses the layer's default.

parameters.name: Weight
parameters.description: Stroke width in pixels. Default 2.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Stroke opacity, 0–1. Default 0.9.

parameters.name: FillOpacity
parameters.description: Fill opacity, 0–1. Default 0.2.

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Plain-text tooltip shown on hover.

parameters.name: PopupHtml
parameters.description: Raw HTML shown in a popup when the circle is clicked.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.type: IEnumerable<(double Lat, double Lon, double Intensity)>
parameters.description: Collection of heat points. Each tuple is (lat, lon, intensity) where intensity should be in the range 0–1 (defaults to 1 when not meaningful). Pass a bare (lat, lon) list via a helper or use the convenience constructor that sets intensity to 1.

parameters.name: Radius
parameters.description: Radius of each point in pixels at full zoom. Defaults to 20.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Opacity of the heatmap layer (0–1). Defaults to 0.8.

parameters.name: ColorRamp
parameters.description: Color ramp expressed as a MapLibre interpolation stops list. Format: alternating stop (0–1) and CSS color values. Example: new object[] { 0, "transparent", 0.4, "blue", 0.8, "red", 1, "orange" }. Defaults to a blue → cyan → yellow → orange → red ramp.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Optional title shown above the legend items.

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description: Absolute-position corner shorthand. Defaults to "bottom-left". Values: "top-left", "top-right", "bottom-left", "bottom-right". Can also pass a raw Tailwind class via Class.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The legend's items, typically a sequence of MapLegendItem elements.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the legend's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the legend's root element.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Dot color. Friendly names ("red", "green", etc.) or any CSS color value.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text shown next to the dot.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the row's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the row's root element.

parameters.name: Lat
parameters.description: The marker's latitude.

parameters.name: Lon
parameters.description: The marker's longitude.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Plain-text hover tooltip and default popup content. Overridden as popup content by Popup when set.

parameters.name: IconUrl
parameters.description: Bitmap icon URL. When set, takes precedence over Variant — we hand Leaflet a plain L.icon and skip the DivIcon path entirely. Anchored bottom-center at 32×32, matching the pre-3.1 default.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant for the auto-generated DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set. Defaults to "Default" (filled circle). Valid values: "Default", "Outline", "Pin", "Dot".

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Override the marker's theme color. Accepts a friendly name ("red", "green", "yellow", …) or a raw CSS color ("#ff0000", "hsl(...)"). Null = theme primary.

parameters.name: Highlighted
parameters.description: Marks this marker as "highlighted" (e.g. a recommendation). The pin itself is unchanged, but with Cluster on, any cluster bubble that contains at least one highlighted marker is tinted with the cluster-highlight color (the --lumeo-map-cluster-highlight CSS variable, default amber) — so a recommendation stays discoverable even while its marker is clustered away.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Permanent label rendered above the marker. Use for waypoints or numbered tours. Different from Title (hover tooltip).

parameters.name: LabelHoverOnly
parameters.description: When true, the Label is hidden by default and only appears on hover. Useful for dense maps where always-on labels create visual noise. Default is false (label always visible).

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional inline content inside the marker circle — a single letter, a number, or a small <SvgGlyph> SVG. The fragment is rendered to a hidden host and its innerHTML is spliced into the DivIcon. Ignored when IconUrl is set.

parameters.name: Popup
parameters.description: Optional rich popup body. When present, it overrides the plain Title as the marker's popup content. The fragment renders into a hidden host div and Leaflet uses the host's innerHTML.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked when the marker is clicked.

parameters.name: Draggable
parameters.description: Allow the user to drag the marker to a new position.

parameters.name: OnDragEnd
parameters.description: Fires with the new (lat, lon) after the user finishes dragging the marker. Use with two-way binding or to update your own state. Only fires when Draggable is true.

parameters.name: ClusterExclude
parameters.description: When true and the parent Map has Cluster enabled, this marker is rendered as a DOM element rather than being absorbed into the cluster source. Use for permanently-visible markers (e.g. a depot, a selected result) that must never be hidden inside a cluster bubble. Default is false.

parameters.name: Properties
parameters.description: Arbitrary key-value properties merged into this marker's GeoJSON feature when Cluster is enabled. Drives custom ClusterProperties aggregation expressions (e.g. a score field summed across the cluster). Built-in keys (id, highlighted, color, hasClick) win on collision.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked when the marker is clicked.

events.name: OnDragEnd
events.description: Fires with the new (lat, lon) after the user finishes dragging the marker. Use with two-way binding or to update your own state. Only fires when Draggable is true.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.description: Ordered list of (lat, lon) points forming the polygon ring. The first and last points are connected automatically.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Stroke color (any CSS color value). Null uses the layer's default.

parameters.name: FillColor
parameters.description: Fill color (any CSS color value). Null uses the layer's default.

parameters.name: Weight
parameters.description: Stroke width in pixels. Default 2.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Stroke opacity, 0–1. Default 0.9.

parameters.name: FillOpacity
parameters.description: Fill opacity, 0–1. Default 0.2.

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Plain-text tooltip shown on hover.

parameters.name: PopupHtml
parameters.description: Raw HTML shown in a popup when the polygon is clicked.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.description: Ordered list of (lat, lon) points the polyline visits.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Stroke color. Friendly name ("red", "blue", …) or a raw CSS color. Null = theme primary.

parameters.name: Weight
parameters.description: Stroke width in pixels.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Stroke opacity, 0..1.

parameters.name: DashArray
parameters.description: SVG dash pattern (e.g. "6 4" for dashed). Null = solid.

parameters.name: Dashed
parameters.description: Convenience toggle — renders a standard "6 4" dash when true. Ignored when DashArray is set explicitly.

parameters.name: HoverColor
parameters.description: Stroke color on hover. Null = no hover highlight.

parameters.name: HoverWeight
parameters.description: Stroke width on hover. Null = same as Weight.

parameters.name: Animate
parameters.description: Animate the line drawing on first render (draws from start to end over ~1 s).

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Optional hover tooltip text.

parameters.name: PopupHtml
parameters.description: Optional popup HTML (rendered on click).

parameters.name: Lat
parameters.description: Latitude of the popup anchor point.

parameters.name: Lon
parameters.description: Longitude of the popup anchor point.

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Whether the popup is currently visible.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for IsOpen, fired when the user dismisses the popup via its close button or a map-background click.

parameters.name: CloseButton
parameters.description: Show a close (×) button inside the popup.

parameters.name: CloseOnClick
parameters.description: Close the popup when the user clicks the map background.

parameters.name: Html
parameters.description: HTML string for the popup body. Overrides ChildContent.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Blazor render fragment for rich popup body. Rendered into a hidden host element; JS reads the innerHTML to open the MapLibre popup.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the hidden content host.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the hidden content host.

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for IsOpen, fired when the user dismisses the popup via its close button or a map-background click.

Marquee.name: Marquee
Marquee.description: Infinitely scrolling horizontal band of children.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Content to scroll. Rendered twice (a live copy plus an aria-hidden/inert duplicate track) to create a seamless looping effect via CSS animation.

parameters.name: Speed
parameters.description: Scroll speed, mapped to an animation duration: Slow (60s), Normal (30s, default), or Fast (12s).

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Horizontal scroll direction (Left or Right). Inverted by Reverse.

parameters.name: PauseOnHover
parameters.description: Pauses the scroll animation while the pointer hovers the marquee.

parameters.name: Reverse
parameters.description: Flips Direction (Left becomes Right and vice versa).

parameters.name: Vertical
parameters.description: Scrolls vertically instead of horizontally.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer wrapper.

parameters.name: Orientation

parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root nav element.

records.name: MegaMenuContext
records.signature:
MegaMenuContext(
        string? ActiveItemId,
        EventCallback<string?> SetActiveItemId,
        Lumeo.Orientation Orientation,
        IReadOnlyList<string> ItemIds,
        IReadOnlySet<string> DisabledItemIds,

examples.title: Basic Mega Menu
examples.code:
<MegaMenu>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Products">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="3">
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Design">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/components" Title="Components" Description="Pre-built UI components" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/templates" Title="Templates" Description="Starter templates" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Development">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/docs" Title="Documentation" Description="Full API reference" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Pricing" Href="/pricing" />
</MegaMenu>

examples.title: Single Column Panel

<MegaMenu>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Company">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="1" FullWidth="false">
            <MegaMenuGroup>
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/about" Title="About Us" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/careers" Title="Careers" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>

examples.title: Icons and Disabled Item
examples.code:
<MegaMenu>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Products" Icon="LumeoIcons.Box">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="2">
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Design">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="LumeoIcons.Component" Title="Components" Description="Pre-built UI components" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="LumeoIcons.LayoutTemplate" Title="Templates" Description="Starter page templates" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Development">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="LumeoIcons.Terminal" Title="CLI" Description="Command-line tooling" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="LumeoIcons.BookOpen" Title="API Reference" Description="Complete API docs" Disabled="true" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Docs" Icon="LumeoIcons.FileText" Href="#" />
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Archived" Disabled="true" />
</MegaMenu>

examples.title: Orientation — interactive
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_orientationSel" Options="_orientationOptions" />
<MegaMenu Orientation="@_activeOrientation">
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Products">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="2">
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Design">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Title="Components" Description="Pre-built UI components" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Development">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Title="CLI" Description="Command-line tooling" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Docs" Href="#" />
</MegaMenu>

@code {
    private string _orientationSel = "Horizontal";
    private Lumeo.Orientation _activeOrientation =>
        Enum.Parse<Lumeo.Orientation>(_orientationSel);
    private List<Segmented.SegmentedOption> _orientationOptions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Horizontal", Value = "Horizontal" },
        new() { Label = "Vertical", Value = "Vertical" },
    };
}

Mention.name: Mention
Mention.description: Textarea with @-trigger dropdown for mentioning users.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The textarea's raw text content, including any committed @@mention tokens.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Invoked on every keystroke and mention insertion with the updated text.

parameters.name: Trigger
parameters.description: The character that opens the mention suggestion dropdown. Default: @@.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Candidate mentions. In local/uncontrolled mode (no OnSearch delegate) this full list is filtered client-side by the search term; when OnSearch is bound, the caller is expected to hand back an already-filtered list.

parameters.name: OnSearch
parameters.description: Invoked with the text typed after the trigger character. Binding this switches to server-driven filtering — the caller supplies the matching Options instead of the component filtering the full list client-side.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the textarea.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text shown when the textarea is empty.

parameters.name: Rows
parameters.description: Visible row count of the textarea. Default: 3.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Renders the field in an invalid/error state. Also set implicitly when inside a FormField that has a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true and the field isn't inside a FormField (which renders its own error text).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there's no error, and the field isn't inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the field. Ignored when inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name attribute on the textarea, for native form submission. Falls back to the enclosing FormField's name when unset.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the textarea element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the relative-positioned wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Invoked on every keystroke and mention insertion with the updated text.

events.name: OnSearch
events.description: Invoked with the text typed after the trigger character. Binding this switches to server-driven filtering — the caller supplies the matching Options instead of the component filtering the full list client-side.

enums.name: MenuItemVariant

NavigationMenu.name: NavigationMenu
NavigationMenu.description: Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The NavigationMenuList (and typically a NavigationMenuViewport) that make up the menu.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Accessible name for the <nav> landmark. Defaults to "Main".

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Controlled value of the currently-open item. Bind with @bind-Value/ValueChanged. The value matches the open Value (or its auto id when none is set); null means no submenu is open. Leave unset for uncontrolled use.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

parameters.name: DefaultValue
parameters.description: Initial open item for uncontrolled use (ignored once Value is bound). null (default) opens nothing.

parameters.name: DelayDuration
parameters.description: Grace window in milliseconds before a hovered submenu closes after the pointer leaves it. Radix's forgiveness delay: moving between adjacent triggers, or briefly slipping off the panel, does not immediately dismiss. Defaults to 150ms.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root nav element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

examples.title: Controlled (open a panel programmatically)
examples.code:
<Flex Gap="2">
    <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" OnClick="@(() => _navValue = "products")">Open Products</Button>
    <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" OnClick="@(() => _navValue = null)">Close</Button>
</Flex>
<NavigationMenu @bind-Value="_navValue" DelayDuration="100">
    <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem Value="products">
            <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
            <NavigationMenuContent>...</NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem Value="resources">
            <NavigationMenuTrigger>Resources</NavigationMenuTrigger>
            <NavigationMenuContent>...</NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>

NumberInput.name: NumberInput
NumberInput.description: Numeric input with stepper buttons and locale formatting.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current numeric value; null when empty.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for Value.

parameters.name: Min
parameters.description: Lower bound; typed/stepped values are clamped to it. Null means no lower bound.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: Upper bound; typed/stepped values are clamped to it. Null means no upper bound.

parameters.name: Step
parameters.description: Amount added/subtracted per +/- click, ArrowUp/ArrowDown, or mouse-wheel tick. Default 1.

parameters.name: Precision
parameters.description: Number of decimal places the value is rounded to on every change. Null leaves fractional precision unrounded (except for FP cleanup on stepped values).

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the input and both stepper buttons. Default false.

parameters.name: UseMouseWheel
parameters.description: Enables incrementing/decrementing by scrolling the mouse wheel over the input. Default false.

parameters.name: Prefix
parameters.description: Text rendered inside the input before the value (e.g. a currency symbol).

parameters.name: Suffix
parameters.description: Text rendered inside the input after the value (e.g. a unit).

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Culture used to parse typed input. Display of the value inside the native <input type="number"> element uses InvariantCulture because HTML5 requires period-as-decimal — browsers will not accept a comma decimal in this input type. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization for parsing (lets a de-DE user paste 1,5 and have it round-trip to 1.5).

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering a trailing asterisk on the label and setting aria-required. Default false.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state and aria-invalid, independent of any ancestor FormField. Default false.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error text shown below the control when invalid (outside a FormField) and not inside a FormField.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control when not invalid and not inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the control (unless the control is inside a FormField, which renders its own label).

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Explicit accessible name for the input, taking priority over Label when both are set.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name attribute for form submission.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying number <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-control density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the control height shifts between values.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the control's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the control's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: Block
parameters.description: Stretch the control to fill its container — a full-width input between the −/+ buttons — instead of sizing to its content. Use it in form layouts so the field lines up with sibling full-width inputs/selects (the LumeoForm generator sets it).

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for Value.

NumberTicker.description: Animated count-up from zero to target number.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The target number to count up (or down) to. Re-animates from the last rendered value whenever this changes at runtime.

parameters.name: StartValue
parameters.description: The number the very first animation counts up from. Only used on the initial render; subsequent Value changes animate from the previously displayed number. Default: 0.

parameters.name: DurationMs
parameters.description: Duration of the count-up animation in milliseconds. Default: 1500.

parameters.name: Decimals
parameters.description: Number of decimal places to display. Negative values are clamped to 0. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Prefix
parameters.description: Text rendered before the number (e.g. a currency symbol).

parameters.name: Suffix
parameters.description: Text rendered after the number (e.g. a unit).

parameters.name: ThousandsSeparator
parameters.description: Thousands group separator. When null (the default) the separator is taken from CurrentCulture so the count-up matches the user's locale (e.g. 1.234 in de-DE). Set to an explicit string to override, or to empty string to suppress grouping.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root span.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root span.

examples.title: Basic Count-Up
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="1000" Class="text-4xl font-bold tabular-nums" />
<NumberTicker Value="99.9" Decimals="1" Class="text-4xl font-bold tabular-nums" />

examples.title: With Prefix and Suffix
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="48295" Prefix="$" Class="text-3xl font-semibold tabular-nums" />
<NumberTicker Value="94.7" Decimals="1" Suffix="%" Class="text-3xl font-semibold tabular-nums" />

examples.title: Custom Duration
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="250" DurationMs="500" Class="text-2xl font-bold" />
<NumberTicker Value="250" DurationMs="3000" Class="text-2xl font-bold" />

examples.title: Custom Separator & Currency
examples.code:
<NumberTicker Value="1500000" ThousandsSeparator="." DurationMs="2000" />
<NumberTicker Value="9876543" Prefix="$" ThousandsSeparator="," DurationMs="2000" />
<NumberTicker Value="99.9" Decimals="1" Suffix="%" />

OtpInput.name: OtpInput
OtpInput.description: One-time password input, auto-advances between boxes.

parameters.name: Length
parameters.description: Number of digit boxes (default 6). Must be non-negative; changing it at runtime resizes the cell buffer and re-registers the paste listener.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current code, one character per filled cell (gap-free — collapsed left after any edit). Length is capped at Length.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever a cell's value changes (typing, deleting, or a paste).

parameters.name: OnComplete
parameters.description: Invoked once Value's length reaches Length (i.e. every cell is filled), whether by typing or paste.

parameters.name: InputMode
parameters.description: Which characters are accepted and which virtual keyboard is requested: "Numeric" (default, digits only), "Alphanumeric" (letters + digits), or "Password" (any character).

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables every digit input.

parameters.name: Masked
parameters.description: When true, renders each cell as a password input (dots) instead of plain text.

parameters.name: Separator
parameters.description: Visual separator glyph rendered between groups when GroupSizes splits the cells into more than one group (e.g. "-" for "123 - 456").

parameters.name: GroupSizes
parameters.description: Splits the Length cells into visual groups of these sizes (e.g. [3, 3] for a 6-digit code shown as two groups of three). Any cells beyond the sum of sizes form a trailing group. null (default) renders one ungrouped row.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, exposed via aria-required on each cell.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Marks the field as invalid, applying error styling to every cell. Also derived automatically from a wrapping FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the cells when Invalid is true (standalone usage only — inside a FormField, the FormField owns error display).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the cells when not invalid (standalone usage only).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the cells (standalone usage only — inside a FormField, the FormField owns the label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Logical name for the field, matching the naming convention of sibling form controls (e.g. Select.Name) for form-association tooling.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the first OTP digit input on first render. Useful for the typical OTP flow where the field appears right after a "code sent" screen and the user should be typing immediately. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the cells' container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the cells' container (not the individual inputs).

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised whenever a cell's value changes (typing, deleting, or a paste).

events.name: OnComplete
events.description: Invoked once Value's length reaches Length (i.e. every cell is filled), whether by typing or paste.

examples.title: Default (6 digits)
examples.code: <OtpInput @bind-Value="_otpValue" OnComplete="HandleComplete" />

examples.title: 2FA Verification
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Heading Level="3">Two-factor authentication</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <OtpInput @bind-Value="_tfaValue" OnComplete="HandleTfa" />
        @if (_tfaVerified)
        {
            <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Success">Verified</Badge>
        }
    </CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
        <Button Class="w-full" Disabled="@(_tfaValue.Length < 6)">Verify</Button>
    </CardFooter>
</Card>

examples.title: 4 Digit Code
examples.code: <OtpInput @bind-Value="_otp" Length="4" />

examples.title: Variable Length
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_otpLength">
    <SegmentedItem Value="4">4 digits</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="6">6 digits</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="8">8 digits</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>

<OtpInput Length="@(int.Parse(_otpLength))" Value="@_otpValue" ValueChanged="@(v => _otpValue = v)" />

@if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_otpValue))
{
    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Value: @_otpValue</Lumeo.Text>
}

@code {
    private string _otpLength = "6";
    private string _otpValue = "";
}

OverlayForm.name: OverlayForm

parameters.name: Model
parameters.description: The object the form edits. Required — the EditContext is deferred until this is supplied, and a diagnostic renders instead of crashing when it's missing.

parameters.name: OnValidSubmit
parameters.description: Invoked when the form is submitted and passes validation.

parameters.name: OnInvalidSubmit
parameters.description: Invoked when the form is submitted and fails validation.

parameters.name: Header
parameters.description: Content pinned above the scrollable body (e.g. a title or intro text).

parameters.name: Body
parameters.description: The form's fields, rendered inside an independently-scrolling region.

parameters.name: Footer
parameters.description: Content pinned below the scrollable body, above a top border (typically Cancel/Save buttons).

parameters.name: Validator
parameters.description: Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root EditForm element (composed with, not overwritten by, the baked-in flex/scroll structure).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root EditForm element.

events.name: OnValidSubmit
events.description: Invoked when the form is submitted and passes validation.

events.name: OnInvalidSubmit
events.description: Invoked when the form is submitted and fails validation.

gotchas:
A missing Model no longer fails silently: the EditContext is still
    deferred (EditForm crashes on a null Model + null EditContext), but instead of
    an invisible empty shell the component now renders a dev-visible diagnostic
    so the misconfiguration is obvious during development.

examples.title: Basic Overlay Form
examples.code:
<OverlayForm Model="@_model" OnValidSubmit="HandleSave">
    <Header>
        <Heading Level="3" Class="text-base font-semibold">Edit contact</Heading>
    </Header>
    <Body>
        <Stack Gap="4">
            <Label>Name</Label>
            <Input @bind-Value="_model.Name" Placeholder="Jane Doe" />
            <Label>Email</Label>
            <Input @bind-Value="_model.Email" Placeholder="jane@example.com" />
            <Label>Notes</Label>
            <Textarea @bind-Value="_model.Notes" />
        </Stack>
    </Body>
    <Footer>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
        <Button Type="Button.ButtonType.Submit">Save</Button>
    </Footer>
</OverlayForm>

@code {
    private ContactModel _model = new();
    private void HandleSave(EditContext ctx) { /* persist _model */ }
}

examples.title: Prefilled edit + async save
examples.code:
<OverlayForm Model="@_editModel" OnValidSubmit="HandleAsyncSave">
    <Body>
        <Label>Name</Label>
        <Input @bind-Value="_editModel.Name" />
        <Label>Email</Label>
        <Input @bind-Value="_editModel.Email" />
    </Body>
    <Footer>
        <Button Type="Button.ButtonType.Submit" IsLoading="_saving">@(_saving ? "Saving…" : "Save")</Button>
    </Footer>
</OverlayForm>

@code {
    // Prefill from an existing record:
    private ContactModel _editModel = new() { Name = "Ada Lovelace", Email = "ada@example.com" };
    private bool _saving;
    private async Task HandleAsyncSave(EditContext ctx)
    {
        _saving = true;
        await SaveAsync(_editModel);   // await your service
        _saving = false;
    }
}

Pagination.name: Pagination
Pagination.description: Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Fully compositional content (PaginationContent, PaginationItem, etc.). When set, data-driven mode is disabled and this content renders verbatim instead.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: The current 1-based page. Setting this (without ChildContent) enables data-driven mode, which auto-renders prev/next and numbered page buttons.

parameters.name: PageChanged
parameters.description: Fired with the newly clamped page number when the user clicks a page, prev/next button, or when a shrunk total forces the current page back in range.

parameters.name: TotalPages
parameters.description: Total number of pages, for data-driven mode. Takes precedence over TotalItems/PageSize when both are supplied.

parameters.name: TotalItems
parameters.description: Total item count, for data-driven mode; combined with PageSize to compute the page count when TotalPages is not set directly.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Items per page, used with TotalItems to compute the total page count in data-driven mode. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: SiblingCount
parameters.description: Pages shown on each side of the current page (default 1).

parameters.name: BoundaryCount
parameters.description: Pages always shown at the very start/end (default 1).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root nav.

events.name: PageChanged
events.description: Fired with the newly clamped page number when the user clicks a page, prev/next button, or when a shrunk total forces the current page back in range.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))"
                           Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        @for (int i = 1; i <= _totalPages; i++)
        {
            var page = i;
            <PaginationItem IsActive="@(page == _currentPage)"
                           OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(page))">
                @page
            </PaginationItem>
        }
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))"
                       Disabled="@(_currentPage >= _totalPages)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

@code {
    private int _currentPage = 1;
    private int _totalPages = 5;

    private void GoToPage(int page)
    {
        if (page >= 1 && page <= _totalPages)
            _currentPage = page;
    }
}

examples.title: Compact
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Color="muted" Class="px-3 flex items-center">@_currentPage / @_totalPages</Lumeo.Text>
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage >= _totalPages)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

examples.title: Size
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_paginationSize">
    <SegmentedItem Value="sm">Sm</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="md">Md</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="lg">Lg</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>

<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
        {
            var page = i;
            <PaginationItem IsActive="@(page == _currentPage)"
                            OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(page))"
                            Class="@(_paginationSize switch { \"sm\" => \"h-7 w-7 text-xs\", \"lg\" => \"h-11 w-11 text-base\", _ => \"\"  })">
                @page
            </PaginationItem>
        }
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage >= 5)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

@code {
    private string _paginationSize = "md";
    private int _currentPage = 1;
}

examples.title: With Ellipsis
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="..." />
        <PaginationItem IsActive="true">1</PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>2</PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>3</PaginationItem>
        <PaginationEllipsis />
        <PaginationItem>8</PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>9</PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>10</PaginationItem>
        <PaginationNext OnClick="..." />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The pagination items (PaginationItem, prev/next, PaginationEllipsis) rendered as an ordered list of buttons.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root ul.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root ul.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the ellipsis span.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the ellipsis span.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The page number's visible label.

parameters.name: IsActive
parameters.description: Marks this item as the current page: styles it with a bordered/shadowed look and sets aria-current="page".

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fired when the button is clicked.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the button.

events.name: OnClick

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Fired when the button is clicked.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the button, e.g. when already on the last page.

parameters.name: Class

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes

events.name: OnClick

PasswordInput.name: PasswordInput
PasswordInput.description: Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The password text.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised on every keystroke with the current input value.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown when empty. Falls back to the localized "Password.Placeholder" string when null.

parameters.name: ShowStrength
parameters.description: Shows a 4-bar strength meter and label (Weak/Fair/Good/Strong) below the field while Value is non-empty. Strength is scored from length, case mix, digits, and symbols.

parameters.name: ShowToggle
parameters.description: Shows the trailing eye icon that toggles between masked and plain-text display. Default true.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the input and the visibility-toggle button.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the input.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when invalid. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when not invalid. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Field label rendered above the input. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The input's name attribute, for form submission/identification.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying password <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-input density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the field height shifts between values.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the field's outer wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the underlying <input>.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised on every keystroke with the current input value.

examples.title: Basic Password Input
examples.code: <PasswordInput @bind-Value="_password" />

examples.title: With Strength Meter
examples.code: <PasswordInput @bind-Value="_password" ShowStrength="true" />

examples.title: Without Toggle Button
examples.code: <PasswordInput @bind-Value="_password" ShowToggle="false" />

examples.title: With Strength + Custom Placeholder
examples.code:
<PasswordInput @bind-Value="_password"
               ShowStrength="true"
               Placeholder="Create a strong password" />

PdfViewer.name: PdfViewer
PdfViewer.description: Inline PDF document viewer powered by pdf.js — page navigation, zoom controls, optional text search, and download.

parameters.name: Src
parameters.description: URL of the PDF document to load (loaded by pdf.js via fetch). A quiet "No PDF loaded" placeholder renders while this is empty.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: The currently displayed 1-based page number. Clamped to [1, totalPages] on render; two-way bindable via PageChanged.

parameters.name: PageChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the displayed page changes (navigation buttons, page-number entry, keyboard, or a search jumping to a match's page).

parameters.name: Zoom
parameters.description: Zoom factor (1.0 = 100%), clamped to [0.5, 4.0]. Ignored when FitMode is not Custom. Two-way bindable via ZoomChanged.

parameters.name: ZoomChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the zoom level changes (zoom buttons, keyboard, or a FitMode switch).

parameters.name: FitMode
parameters.description: Fit-to-container mode that overrides Zoom when set to a non-Custom value. FitWidth scales the page so its width matches the scroll-parent's clientWidth (minus a 16px padding for breathing room before the scrollbar). FitPage scales so the whole page fits within the scroll-parent's box. JS computes the ratio on each render, so a container resize that triggers OnParametersSet re-renders the page at the new fit. Set back to Custom to return control to the numeric Zoom value.

parameters.name: ShowToolbar
parameters.description: Shows the toolbar bar (page nav, search, zoom, download). Default true; when false only the document viewport renders.

parameters.name: ShowPageNav
parameters.description: Shows the previous/next page buttons and page-number input in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowZoomControls
parameters.description: Shows the zoom out/percentage/in controls in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowDownload
parameters.description: Shows a download link (rendered only once Src is set) in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Shows the in-document search box and match navigation in the toolbar. Default false.

parameters.name: HighlightColor
parameters.description: CSS color used for search-match highlight overlays (blended via color-mix; the active match renders more opaque). Default "yellow".

parameters.name: OnLoaded
parameters.description: Raised once, after the document successfully loads, with its total page count.

parameters.name: OnPageChanged
parameters.description: Fires alongside PageChanged; provided for symmetry with the OnLoaded/OnError event naming.

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Fires when the underlying JS load/render fails (CDN unreachable, malformed PDF, worker init failure, …). Receives the exception message. Consumers can use this to surface their own error UI; the built-in EmptyState fallback renders regardless.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root panel.

events.name: PageChanged
events.description: Raised when the displayed page changes (navigation buttons, page-number entry, keyboard, or a search jumping to a match's page).

events.name: ZoomChanged
events.description: Raised when the zoom level changes (zoom buttons, keyboard, or a FitMode switch).

events.name: OnLoaded
events.description: Raised once, after the document successfully loads, with its total page count.

events.name: OnPageChanged
events.description: Fires alongside PageChanged; provided for symmetry with the OnLoaded/OnError event naming.

events.name: OnError
events.description: Fires when the underlying JS load/render fails (CDN unreachable, malformed PDF, worker init failure, …). Receives the exception message. Consumers can use this to surface their own error UI; the built-in EmptyState fallback renders regardless.

gotchas: pdf.js and its worker are loaded at runtime from jsDelivr (CDN) the first time a PdfViewer mounts. For strict-CSP or air-gapped deployments, self-host them and set window.lumeoCdn = { pdfJs: '/your/pdf.min.mjs', pdfJsWorker: '/your/pdf.worker.min.mjs' } before the first PdfViewer renders, or run `lumeo deps install --lib pdfjs` (CLI). See /docs/cdn-deps.

PickList.name: PickList
PickList.description: Two-column shuttle picker — move items between lists.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The full candidate set. Items present in SelectedItems render in the target panel; the rest render in the source panel.

parameters.name: SelectedItems
parameters.description: The items currently in the target panel, in display order. Bind via @bind-SelectedItems to receive reorders and moves.

parameters.name: SelectedItemsChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the target panel's contents or order changes — moves between panels, and (when Reorderable) in-panel reordering.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom render fragment for a row's content in both panels. Defaults to item.ToString().

parameters.name: SourceTitle
parameters.description: Source panel header. Defaults to the localized "Available".

parameters.name: TargetTitle
parameters.description: Target panel header. Defaults to the localized "Selected".

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: When true (default), each panel shows a search box that filters its rows by ToString() substring match.

parameters.name: Reorderable
parameters.description: When true (default), the target list can be reordered: header up/down buttons and Alt+ArrowUp/ArrowDown on a focused target item move the selected items within the target order, emitting SelectedItemsChanged. Reorder is gated while a target search is active (a filtered view has no stable order to shuffle).

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height applied to both panels' scrollable list area (default "320px").

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root grid container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root grid container.

events.name: SelectedItemsChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the target panel's contents or order changes — moves between panels, and (when Reorderable) in-panel reordering.

examples.title: Strings
examples.code:
<PickList TItem="string"
          Items="_allDepartments"
          SelectedItems="_pickedDepartments"
          SelectedItemsChanged="OnDepartmentsChanged"
          SourceTitle="All Departments"
          TargetTitle="Assigned" />

examples.title: Typed Records with Item Template
examples.code: @context.Name @context.Email

examples.title: No Search, Not Reorderable
examples.code:
<PickList TItem="string"
          Items="_allDepartments"
          SelectedItems="_picked"
          SelectedItemsChanged="OnChanged"
          ShowSearch="false"
          Reorderable="false"
          Height="220px"
          SourceTitle="All Departments"
          TargetTitle="Assigned" />

PivotGrid.name: PivotGrid
PivotGrid.description: Cross-tab / pivot table that summarizes flat data into rows x columns x aggregated measures.

parameters.name: OnCellClick
parameters.description: Invoked when a data cell is clicked. Carries the clicked cell context for drill-down.

events.name: OnCellClick
events.description: Invoked when a data cell is clicked. Carries the clicked cell context for drill-down.

examples.title: Sales by region × year
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> { new("Region", s => s.Region) })"
           ColumnFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> { new("Year", s => s.Year, v => "FY " + v) })"
           Measures="@(new List<PivotMeasure<Sale>> { new("Revenue", s => s.Amount, PivotAggregate.Sum, d => "$" + d.ToString("N0")) })" />

@code {
    record Sale(string Region, string Country, int Year, int Quarter, decimal Amount, int Units);
    List<Sale> _sales = new() { /* ... */ };
}

examples.title: Multiple measures (sum + count)
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="_regionField"
           ColumnFields="_yearField"
           Measures="@(new List<PivotMeasure<Sale>> {
               new("Revenue", s => s.Amount, PivotAggregate.Sum, d => "$" + d.ToString("N0")),
               new("Deals", s => s.Units, PivotAggregate.Count),
           })" />

examples.title: Collapsible nested row groups
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> {
               new("Region", s => s.Region),
               new("Country", s => s.Country),
           })"
           ColumnFields="_yearField"
           Measures="_amountMeasure"
           Collapsible="true"
           Compact="true" />

examples.title: Multi-level column hierarchy (Year > Quarter)
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="_regionCountryFields"
           ColumnFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> {
               new("Year",    s => s.Year, v => "FY " + v),
               new("Quarter", s => s.Quarter, v => "Q" + v),
           })"
           Measures="_amountMeasure"
           Compact="true" />

PopConfirm.name: PopConfirm
PopConfirm.description: Inline 'are you sure?' popover attached to a trigger.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Confirmation prompt title. Falls back to the localized "PopConfirm.Title" string when unset.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional supporting text shown beneath Title. Hidden when null/empty; also omitted from aria-describedby in that case.

parameters.name: ConfirmText
parameters.description: Label of the confirm button. Falls back to the localized "PopConfirm.Confirm" string when unset.

parameters.name: CancelText
parameters.description: Label of the cancel button. Falls back to the localized "PopConfirm.Cancel" string when unset.

parameters.name: IsDestructive
parameters.description: Renders the confirm button with the destructive (red) variant instead of the default variant, signalling an irreversible/dangerous action.

parameters.name: OnConfirm
parameters.description: Fires when the confirm button is activated, after the popover closes and focus returns to the trigger.

parameters.name: OnCancel
parameters.description: Fires when the cancel button is activated, after the popover closes and focus returns to the trigger.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger content that opens the confirmation popover on click.

parameters.name: Placement
parameters.description: Preferred side of the trigger for the confirm popover: "top" (default), "bottom", "left" or "right". Forwarded to the underlying Side.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional leading icon shown beside the title. Supply an IconSource from a Lumeo.Icons pack (e.g. Lucide.TriangleAlert) or from LumeoIcons.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the confirmation popover's content panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the underlying Popover.

events.name: OnConfirm
events.description: Fires when the confirm button is activated, after the popover closes and focus returns to the trigger.

events.name: OnCancel
events.description: Fires when the cancel button is activated, after the popover closes and focus returns to the trigger.

parameters.name: FocusOnOpen
parameters.description: When true (default), focus moves into the popover surface on open so its @onkeydown handler receives Escape and keyboard users land inside the dialog (the Radix onOpenAutoFocus default). Set to false when the trigger is a typeable control that must KEEP focus while the popover opens (e.g. DatePicker's keyboard-input trigger) — the surface still positions, registers click-outside and saves/restores focus, it just doesn't steal focus from the trigger on open.

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary (non-Lumeo) markup: receives the TriggerSlot so the consumer can splat @attributes="slot.Attributes" and wire @onclick="slot.OnClick.InvokeAsync" onto their own single element. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild — they consume the slot automatically.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, the trigger renders NO wrapper element and instead cascades a TriggerSlot that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — yielding ONE DOM node with merged class, composed click/keyboard, and forwarded ARIA/state (the Radix asChild goal). The child must resolve to exactly one cooperating element (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot splat); raw HTML/3rd-party markup receives nothing. Default false preserves the current role=button wrapper exactly. Prefer a <button> child for a click-toggle trigger: a <Button Href> renders an <a>, which natively activates on Enter only (not Space), so Space would not open the popover.

parameters.name: SuppressActivationKeys
parameters.description: When true, Enter/Space keydowns that bubble up to this trigger's own role="button" wrapper (from a ChildContent that contains its OWN interactive control) do NOT toggle the popover, and the Space-default suppression is skipped too. Set this when the child already owns Enter/Space itself — e.g. DatePicker's typeable input, whose Enter commits the buffer and closes, and whose Space is a literal character to type. Without this, those keys bubbling out of the child ALSO reach this wrapper's own role=button handler and toggle it a second, unwanted time — with the popover CLOSED this silently reopens it; with the popover OPEN this fights whatever the child just did (PR #356 round-2, Codex/CodeRabbit). Blazor's :stopPropagation is a static per-render flag, not evaluated per key, so it cannot selectively block only Enter/Space while still letting Escape (etc.) bubble to an ancestor Dialog/Sheet — suppressing the toggle here, at the source, is the only way to do that without also swallowing Escape. Default false preserves the existing role=button Enter/Space activation for every other consumer.

Progress.name: Progress
Progress.description: Linear progress bar with determinate + indeterminate modes.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Current progress amount, clamped into 0..Max for both the rendered fill and the announced aria-valuenow.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: The value that represents 100% completion. Default: 100.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Color variant applied to the fill/stroke. Default: Default.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Renders as a linear bar (default) or a circular ring.

parameters.name: IsIndeterminate
parameters.description: Renders a busy sweep animation instead of a value-driven fill, for progress with an unknown duration. Sets aria-busy and omits aria-valuenow.

parameters.name: ShowLabel
parameters.description: Shows a percentage/Label text next to the bar or ring.

parameters.name: ShowValue
parameters.description: For the circular shape, renders the percentage/Label text centered inside the ring.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Custom text shown instead of the computed percentage when ShowLabel or ShowValue is set.

parameters.name: Striped
parameters.description: Overlays diagonal stripes on the linear fill.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: Animates the diagonal stripes sliding across the linear fill. Implies Striped.

parameters.name: Animation
parameters.description: Opt-in animation variant for the linear progress fill. None (default) leaves existing behaviour untouched. Stripe overlays translucent diagonal stripes that sweep across the bar.

parameters.name: GradientFrom
parameters.description: Start color of a linear gradient fill (CSS color string). Requires GradientTo to also be set; overrides Variant's solid color when both are present.

parameters.name: GradientTo
parameters.description: End color of a linear gradient fill (CSS color string). Requires GradientFrom to also be set.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Bar thickness / ring diameter preset: "Small", "Default", or "Large".

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Stroke width in px for the circular shape's ring. Default: 4.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the progress element (bar or circular wrapper).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the progress element (bar or circular wrapper).

enums.name: ProgressAnimation
enums.description: Animation variants for linear progress.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Progress Value="25" />
<Progress Value="50" />
<Progress Value="75" />

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<Progress Value="60" />
<Progress Value="100" Variant="Progress.ProgressVariant.Success" />
<Progress Value="45" Variant="Progress.ProgressVariant.Warning" />
<Progress Value="80" Variant="Progress.ProgressVariant.Destructive" />

examples.title: Interactive
examples.code:
<Progress Value="@_value" />
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Button OnClick="Decrease">-10</Button>
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">@_value%</Lumeo.Text>
    <Button OnClick="Increase">+10</Button>
</Flex>

@code {
    private int _value = 50;
    private void Increase() => _value = Math.Min(100, _value + 10);
    private void Decrease() => _value = Math.Max(0, _value - 10);
}

examples.title: Indeterminate
examples.code:
<Progress IsIndeterminate="true" />
<Progress IsIndeterminate="true" Variant="Progress.ProgressVariant.Success" />

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Current progress amount, clamped into 0..Max for the rendered ring fill.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: The value that represents a complete (100%) ring. Default: 100.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Diameter of the ring in px. Default: 64.

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Stroke width of the ring in px. Default: 4.

parameters.name: ShowValue
parameters.description: Renders the percentage (or Formatted value) centered inside the ring when ChildContent is not supplied. Default: true.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: A composite format string applied to Value (e.g. "{0:N1}") for the centered text. When null, the percentage (N%) is shown.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom content centered inside the ring, replacing the default value/percentage text.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper.

parameters.name: CurrentStep
parameters.description: 0-based index of the active step. Steps before it render as completed (with a checkmark); this and later steps render as current/upcoming.

parameters.name: Steps
parameters.description: The step labels, rendered in order.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Layout direction: "Horizontal" (default) lays steps in a row with connecting lines; "Vertical" stacks them in a column.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper.

PromptInput.name: PromptInput
PromptInput.description: Multiline AI prompt textarea with submit + keyboard shortcuts.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The textarea's text content.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Invoked on every keystroke with the updated text.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text shown when the textarea is empty. Default: "Ask anything…".

parameters.name: MaxHeight
parameters.description: Maximum height in px the textarea autosizes to before scrolling. Default: 240.

parameters.name: MinHeight
parameters.description: Minimum height in px the textarea autosizes down to. Default: 56.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Disables the textarea and swaps the send button for a spinner (or the Stop button when OnStop is bound), indicating a response is in flight.

parameters.name: OnSend
parameters.description: Invoked with the current text when the user sends (Send button click, or Enter without Shift/Ctrl/Alt/Meta).

parameters.name: OnStop
parameters.description: Invoked when the user clicks the Stop button. The Stop button only replaces Send while IsLoading is true AND this callback is bound — so a consumer that doesn't support cancellation keeps the previous disabled-spinner behaviour unchanged.

parameters.name: DisableSendOnEmpty
parameters.description: Disables the Send button while Value is empty/whitespace. Default: true.

parameters.name: Attachments
parameters.description: Optional slot for attachment chips/thumbnails, rendered above the textarea.

parameters.name: ShowAttachButton
parameters.description: Shows a built-in paperclip attach button in the leading area that invokes OnAttach.

parameters.name: OnAttach
parameters.description: Invoked when the built-in attach button is clicked (only when ShowAttachButton is true).

parameters.name: MaxLength
parameters.description: Hard character limit. When set, the textarea enforces maxlength and a "count/limit" counter is shown. The counter turns into a destructive color as the limit is approached.

parameters.name: ShowCounter
parameters.description: Forces the character counter to render even when MaxLength is not set (shows the raw count).

parameters.name: LeadingContent
parameters.description: Extra content rendered in the footer's leading area, alongside the attach button.

parameters.name: TrailingContent
parameters.description: Extra content rendered in the footer's trailing area, before the Send/Stop button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Invoked on every keystroke with the updated text.

events.name: OnSend
events.description: Invoked with the current text when the user sends (Send button click, or Enter without Shift/Ctrl/Alt/Meta).

events.name: OnStop
events.description: Invoked when the user clicks the Stop button. The Stop button only replaces Send while IsLoading is true AND this callback is bound — so a consumer that doesn't support cancellation keeps the previous disabled-spinner behaviour unchanged.

events.name: OnAttach
events.description: Invoked when the built-in attach button is clicked (only when ShowAttachButton is true).

parameters.name: Class

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes

events.name: OnRefresh

QRCode.name: QRCode
QRCode.description: Renders a QR code SVG for a string payload.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The payload to encode (URL, text, etc). Nothing renders (an empty transparent box) while this is null/whitespace or fails to encode.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Rendered width/height of the code in pixels (the SVG scales to fill this box). Default 200.

parameters.name: ErrorCorrectionLevel
parameters.description: Reed-Solomon error-correction level — higher levels tolerate more damage but produce a denser code. Default Medium (~15% recovery).

parameters.name: ForegroundColor
parameters.description: Fill color of the dark modules. Default "currentColor" (inherits the surrounding text color).

parameters.name: BackgroundColor
parameters.description: Fill color of the light modules/background. Default "transparent".

parameters.name: IncludeMargin
parameters.description: Keeps the generator's built-in 4-module quiet-zone border around the code. Default true; set false to strip it and fill the box edge to edge.

parameters.name: ImageSrc
parameters.description: Optional logo image URL overlaid at the center of the code. Combine with a high ErrorCorrectionLevel so the code stays scannable.

parameters.name: ImageSize
parameters.description: Size of the center ImageSrc overlay, in pixels of the rendered Size box. Default 40.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Override the accessible label announced for the QR code. Defaults to "QR code: {Value}". Useful when the encoded payload is a long URL or technical string the user doesn't need read out — pass a human-friendly description instead.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

examples.title: Basic QR Code
examples.code: <QRCode Value="https://lumeo.nativ.sh/" Size="200" />

examples.code:

<QRCode Value="@_url" Size="180" />
