<QRCode Value="..." ErrorCorrectionLevel="QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Quartile" />
<QRCode Value="..." ErrorCorrectionLevel="QRCode.QRErrorLevel.High" />

examples.title: Error Correction Level (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_level">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Low">Low</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Medium">Medium</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Quartile">Quartile</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.High">High</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<QRCode Value="https://lumeo.nativ.sh/" Size="160" ErrorCorrectionLevel="@_level" />

@code { private QRCode.QRErrorLevel _level = QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Medium; }

QueryBuilder.name: QueryBuilder
QueryBuilder.description: Visual AND/OR predicate-tree builder; serializes to JSON or a LINQ predicate.

parameters.name: Fields
parameters.description: The fields the consumer can build conditions against. Required.

parameters.name: Query
parameters.description: The query tree. Two-way bindable via @bind-Query. When null on first render, an empty root group (And, no rules) is created.

parameters.name: QueryChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the query tree changes (rule/group added, removed, or edited). Also fires once on first render for an uncontrolled (initially-null) builder to publish the auto-seeded empty root group.

parameters.name: ShowJsonPreview
parameters.description: When true, renders a read-only JSON view of the query below the builder.

parameters.name: MaxDepth
parameters.description: Maximum group nesting depth. The "Add group" button is disabled at this depth.

parameters.name: AllowEmptyGroups
parameters.description: When false, "Remove rule" / "Remove group" are hidden when it would leave a group empty (the root may always be empty).

parameters.name: ValueEditorTemplate
parameters.description: Optional override for how a rule's value editor renders. Receives the rule. When supplied, replaces the built-in per-type editor entirely (the consumer is then responsible for binding to Value and calling NotifyChanged via the cascaded context — see docs).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element.

events.name: QueryChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the query tree changes (rule/group added, removed, or edited). Also fires once on first render for an uncontrolled (initially-null) builder to publish the auto-seeded empty root group.

records.name: QueryBuilderContext
records.signature:
QueryBuilderContext(
        IReadOnlyList<QueryField> Fields,
        int MaxDepth,
        bool AllowEmptyGroups,
        RenderFragment<QueryRule>? ValueEditorTemplate,
        Func<Task> NotifyChanged)
records.description: Cascaded state shared with the recursive QueryBuilderGroup renderer.

examples.title: Basic builder
examples.code:
<QueryBuilder Fields="_fields" @bind-Query="_query" />

@code {
    private readonly IReadOnlyList<QueryField> _fields = new List<QueryField>
    {
        new() { Name = "name", Label = "Name", Type = QueryFieldType.Text },
        new() { Name = "age", Label = "Age", Type = QueryFieldType.Number },
        new() { Name = "isActive", Label = "Active", Type = QueryFieldType.Boolean },
        new() { Name = "plan", Label = "Plan", Type = QueryFieldType.Select,
                Options = new[] { ("free", "Free"), ("pro", "Pro") } }
    };

    private QueryGroup _query = QueryGroup.CreateEmpty();
}

examples.title: With JSON preview
examples.code:
<QueryBuilder Fields="_fields" @bind-Query="_query" ShowJsonPreview="true" />

@code {
    // ShowJsonPreview renders the live System.Text.Json shape — handy for
    // showing the consumer exactly what would be sent to a backend, or for debugging.
    // Programmatically: var json = QueryBuilder.ToJson(_query);
    //                   var back = QueryBuilder.FromJson(json);
}

examples.title: Pre-populated nested groups
examples.code:
<QueryBuilder Fields="_fields" @bind-Query="_query" MaxDepth="3" />

@code {
    private QueryGroup _query = new()
    {
        Combinator = QueryCombinator.And,
        Rules =
        {
            new QueryRule { Field = "isActive", Operator = "=", Value = true },
            new QueryGroup
            {
                Combinator = QueryCombinator.Or,
                Rules =
                {
                    new QueryRule { Field = "plan", Operator = "=", Value = "pro" },
                    new QueryRule { Field = "plan", Operator = "=", Value = "enterprise" }
                }
            }
        }
    };

    // Run it client-side:
    // var predicate = QueryBuilder.ToExpression<Customer>(_query);
    // var matches = customers.Where(predicate.Compile());
}

parameters.name: Group
parameters.description: The group node this instance renders — its combinator, rules, and nested groups.

parameters.name: Depth
parameters.description: Nesting depth of this group (0 for the root). Drives the visual indent and gates "Add group" against MaxDepth.

parameters.name: Parent
parameters.description: The parent group (null for the root) — used to support self-removal.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root group element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root group element.

RadioGroup.name: RadioGroup
RadioGroup.description: Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the group as required, adding an asterisk to the label and setting aria-required.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Renders the group in an invalid/error state. Also set implicitly when inside a FormField that has a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the group when Invalid is true and the group isn't inside a FormField (which renders its own error text).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the group when there's no error, and the group isn't inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the group. Ignored when inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: When set, emits a hidden input with this name carrying the selected value, so the group participates in native form submission (the role=radio items aren't native inputs).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's RadioGroupItem or RadioGroupCard options.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The currently-selected item's value.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Invoked when a different item is selected (click, or arrow-key navigation).

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the role="radiogroup" element when there's no visible Label.

parameters.name: AriaLabelledBy
parameters.description: Id of an external element that labels the group, set as aria-labelledby.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-group density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the inter-option row gap shifts between values.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the role="radiogroup" element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the role="radiogroup" element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Invoked when a different item is selected (click, or arrow-key navigation).

records.name: RadioGroupContext

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<RadioGroup @bind-Value="_selected">
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="default" />
        <Label>Default</Label>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="comfortable" />
        <Label>Comfortable</Label>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="compact" />
        <Label>Compact</Label>
    </Flex>
</RadioGroup>

examples.title: Pricing Plan
examples.code:
<RadioGroup @bind-Value="_plan" Class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
    @foreach (var p in new[] { ("free", "Free", "$0"), ("pro", "Pro", "$15"), ("team", "Team", "$49") })
    {
        <label class="@($"flex flex-col items-center rounded-md border p-3 cursor-pointer {(_plan == p.Item1 ? \"border-primary\" : \"border-muted\")}")>
            <RadioGroupItem Value="@p.Item1" Class="sr-only" />
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">@p.Item2</Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="xs" Color="muted">@p.Item3/mo</Lumeo.Text>
        </label>
    }
</RadioGroup>

examples.title: With Form Field
examples.code:
<FormField Name="plan">
    <FormItem>
        <FormLabel>Notification preference</FormLabel>
        <RadioGroup @bind-Value="_notification">
            <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
                <RadioGroupItem Value="all" />
                <Label>All notifications</Label>
            </Flex>
            <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
                <RadioGroupItem Value="mentions" />
                <Label>Mentions only</Label>
            </Flex>
        </RadioGroup>
        <FormDescription>Choose how you want to be notified.</FormDescription>
    </FormItem>
</FormField>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The card's content (typically a title/description).

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: This card's value. Selected when it matches the enclosing RadioGroup's Value.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the card's button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the card's button element.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: This item's value. Selected when it matches the enclosing RadioGroup's Value.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the item, removing it from click/keyboard activation and arrow-key roving.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Muted helper text rendered beside the radio dot, below ChildContent. When set, the item also renders an adjacent label wrapper instead of a bare button.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The item's label content, shown next to the radio dot (or above Description).

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the radio button. Falls back to Value when no external label/ChildContent supplies one.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the radio button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the radio button element.

Rating.name: Rating
Rating.description: Star rating input with half-star support.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current rating, from 0 up to Max. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged. Fractional .5 values are only meaningful when AllowHalf is set.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the rating changes, via click, drag, or arrow-key navigation.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: Number of stars rendered. Default 5.

parameters.name: AllowHalf
parameters.description: Allows selecting half-star values (clicking an already-selected star toggles it down by 0.5).

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Disables all interaction (click, drag, keyboard), rendering the stars as a static display.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Star size. Default Md.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label (outside a FormField). Purely visual — the widget does not enforce a non-zero selection.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive error text), independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the stars (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the stars (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the stars (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for form-field integration. Not currently rendered onto the radiogroup markup.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the star row (the role="radiogroup" element).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the star row (the role="radiogroup" element).

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the rating changes, via click, drag, or arrow-key navigation.

examples.title: Basic Rating
examples.code: <Rating @bind-Value="_rating" />

examples.title: Half Stars
examples.code: <Rating @bind-Value="_rating" AllowHalf="true" />

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Rating Value="3" ReadOnly="true" Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" />
<Rating Value="3" ReadOnly="true" />
<Rating Value="3" ReadOnly="true" Size="Lumeo.Size.Lg" />

examples.title: Read-Only
examples.code: <Rating Value="4.5" ReadOnly="true" AllowHalf="true" />

ReasoningDisplay.name: ReasoningDisplay
ReasoningDisplay.description: Collapsible chain-of-thought block for AI reasoning traces.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The reasoning trace shown in the collapsible body. Rendered as plain text unless Markdown is set.

parameters.name: IsStreaming
parameters.description: When true, shows a pulsing dot next to the summary and a pulse animation on the body, and falls back to "Thinking…" in Summary's absence. Set to false once the model finishes reasoning.

parameters.name: Summary
parameters.description: Custom summary label shown next to the chevron. When unset, falls back to a duration string derived from DurationMs, or "Thinking…"/"Reasoning" based on IsStreaming.

parameters.name: DurationMs
parameters.description: Elapsed reasoning time in milliseconds, used to build the default summary (e.g. "Reasoned for 1.2s") when Summary is unset.

parameters.name: DefaultOpen
parameters.description: Whether the details/summary starts expanded. Default is false (collapsed).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Text and spacing size of the summary and body. Defaults to Md.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual density/behavior of the body. Defaults to Default.

parameters.name: Markdown
parameters.description: Renders Text as markdown instead of plain text — reasoning traces from models are usually markdown (lists, bold, code). Uses MarkdownRenderer when supplied, otherwise the built-in dependency-free CommonMark subset. Pairs naturally with Detailed. (#305)

parameters.name: MarkdownRenderer
parameters.description: Optional render hook converting the raw markdown Text into a MarkupString (plug in Markdig etc.). The delegate must return SAFE HTML — sanitise untrusted input. Ignored unless Markdown is true.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root details element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root details element.

enums.name: ReasoningVariant
enums.description: Default = standard expand/collapse display. Compact = summary label + collapsed body limited to 3 lines. Detailed = always shows full body text with extra padding.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code: <ReasoningDisplay Text="@_reasoningText" Summary="Reasoning" />

examples.title: With Duration
examples.code: <ReasoningDisplay Text="@_reasoningText" DurationMs="4200" />

examples.title: Streaming State
examples.code:
<ReasoningDisplay Text="@_partialText" IsStreaming="@_streaming" DefaultOpen="true" />

@code {
    private string _partialText = string.Empty;
    private bool _streaming;
}

examples.title: Open by Default
examples.code: <ReasoningDisplay Text="@_reasoningText" DefaultOpen="true" Summary="Chain of thought" />

Resizable.name: Resizable
Resizable.description: Draggable splitter for resizable panel layouts.

parameters.name: PanelIndex
parameters.description: Index of the leading panel this handle resizes (the one immediately before it in the group). Dragging/arrow keys resize this panel against the panel at PanelIndex + 1.

parameters.name: WithHandle
parameters.description: When true, renders a small grip glyph centered on the handle for a more discoverable drag affordance.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the handle.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the handle.

examples.title: Horizontal
examples.code:
Panel One
Panel Two

examples.title: Vertical
examples.code:
Top
Bottom

examples.title: Collapsible Panel with Constraints
examples.code:
Sidebar
Content

examples.title: Three Panels
examples.code:
Sidebar
Content
Panel

parameters.name: Order
parameters.description: This panel's index within the group, also used as its key when registering/unregistering with the group and by PanelIndex to identify which panel a handle resizes.

parameters.name: DefaultSize
parameters.description: Initial percentage size of the panel, consumed by the group to seed the shared size list when the group has no DefaultSizes of its own. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: MinSize
parameters.description: Minimum percentage size a handle drag can shrink this panel to. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: MaxSize
parameters.description: Maximum percentage size a handle drag can grow this panel to. Defaults to 90.

parameters.name: Collapsible
parameters.description: When true, the panel can collapse to CollapsedSize — by dragging its handle below (roughly) half the MinSize, or via the group's ToggleCollapse from the cascading context. Restores on drag-out / toggle. (#257)

parameters.name: CollapsedSize
parameters.description: Percentage the panel occupies while collapsed. Default 0. Only meaningful when Collapsible is true.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The panel's content.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's ResizablePanels interleaved with ResizableHandles.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Axis panels are laid out and resized along. Horizontal arranges panels side-by-side with vertical handles; Vertical stacks them with horizontal handles. Defaults to Horizontal.

parameters.name: DefaultSizes
parameters.description: Explicit initial percentage sizes for each panel, in order. Takes precedence over each panel's own DefaultSize (but is itself superseded by SavedLayout). Length should match the number of panels.

parameters.name: SavedLayout
parameters.description: Optional previously-persisted panel sizes. The group seeds its layout from this on first render (taking precedence over panel DefaultSizes and DefaultSizes). Mirrors DataGrid / Tabs SavedLayout: the library never persists on its own — store the snapshot you receive from OnLayout and feed it back here on init.

parameters.name: OnLayout
parameters.description: Fires after every resize (drag, keyboard step, or collapse toggle) with the current panel sizes so the consumer can persist them. Pairs with SavedLayout to round-trip the layout through storage.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the group's root container.

events.name: OnLayout
events.description: Fires after every resize (drag, keyboard step, or collapse toggle) with the current panel sizes so the consumer can persist them. Pairs with SavedLayout to round-trip the layout through storage.

records.name: ResizablePanelGroupContext
records.signature:
ResizablePanelGroupContext(
        string GroupId,
        Lumeo.Orientation Direction,
        EventCallback<(int PanelIndex, double Delta)> OnHandleDrag,
        Func<int, double> GetPanelSize,
        int PanelCount,
        Action<int, double, double, double, bool, double> RegisterPanel,
        Func<int, (double MinSize, double MaxSize)> GetPanelConstraints,
        Func<int, bool> IsPanelCollapsed,
        EventCallback<int> ToggleCollapse,
        Action<int> UnregisterPanel
    )

Result.name: Result
Result.description: Full-page success/error/info status screen with actions.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Outcome the result communicates. Drives the icon color/badge background, the default icon glyph, and whether the region is announced via role="alert" (error-ish outcomes) or role="status". Defaults to Info.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Controls the icon badge size, title/subtitle typography, and vertical padding. Defaults to Md.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: The headline shown below the icon. Omitted entirely when blank.

parameters.name: SubTitle
parameters.description: Supporting copy shown below the title in the muted foreground color. Omitted entirely when blank.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Extra
parameters.description: Action slot rendered below the subtitle (typically one or more Buttons) to help the user act on the result.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root container (a splatted role still wins over the status-derived default).

examples.title: Success
examples.code:
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Success" Title="Payment Successful" SubTitle="Order confirmed.">
    <Extra>
        <Button>Go to Dashboard</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">View Order</Button>
    </Extra>
</Result>

examples.title: Error
examples.code:
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Error" Title="Submission Failed" SubTitle="Please check and try again.">
    <Extra>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Retry</Button>
    </Extra>
</Result>

examples.title: All Statuses
examples.code:
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Warning" Title="Warning" SubTitle="Proceed with caution." />
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Info" Title="Information" SubTitle="Useful info." />
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.NotFound" Title="404 Not Found" SubTitle="Page does not exist." />
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Forbidden" Title="403 Forbidden" SubTitle="No permission." />

examples.title: Status — interactive
examples.code: <Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Success" Title="Success Result" SubTitle="This is a success result page." />

RichTextEditor.name: RichTextEditor
RichTextEditor.description: WYSIWYG editor wrapping TipTap with Lumeo styling.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The document as HTML. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; the live document (not this parameter) is the source of truth while editing, so an unrelated parent re-render that re-supplies a stale value never clobbers in-progress typing — only a genuine change (or a controlled rejection) re-syncs TipTap.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised on every content change with the current HTML.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown when the document is empty. Falls back to the localized "Editor.StartWriting" string when null.

parameters.name: MinHeight
parameters.description: Minimum height of the editable surface, in pixels. Default 180.

parameters.name: MaxHeight
parameters.description: Maximum height, in pixels; the surface scrolls internally once content exceeds it. Unbounded when null.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables editing and dims the toolbar (equivalent effect to ReadOnly on the underlying editor, but also disables toolbar controls).

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Makes the document non-editable while keeping the toolbar controls interactive-looking (TipTap's editable: false).

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the editable surface.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the editor when invalid. Only rendered when this editor is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the editor when not invalid. Only rendered when this editor is standalone (outside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Field label rendered above the editor. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Logical field name, kept for API parity with other FormField-aware inputs (e.g. Textarea, Input). The contenteditable surface has no native form-submittable value, so this is not currently rendered onto any element.

parameters.name: ToolbarMode
parameters.description: Legacy toolbar mode; superseded by Toolbar.

parameters.name: Toolbar
parameters.description: Toolbar density preset. Defaults to Standard.

parameters.name: Triggers
parameters.description: Registers character-triggered ("@", "#", …) suggestion popups. Each trigger's ItemSource is queried live as the user types after its char. Changing the trigger char set re-initializes the underlying editor (suggestion extensions are wired at construction time), preserving in-progress content.

parameters.name: EnableSlashCommand
parameters.description: Enables the "/" slash-command menu for inserting blocks (headings, lists, code blocks, …). Default true. Ignored if a consumer Triggers entry already claims the / character.

parameters.name: EnableTables
parameters.description: Enables table insertion/editing. Default true.

parameters.name: EnableCodeBlock
parameters.description: Enables fenced/syntax-highlighted code blocks. Default true.

parameters.name: EnableImages
parameters.description: Enables inserting images (drag-drop, paste, or picker); resolved via OnImageRequested when set, otherwise base64-embedded. Default true.

parameters.name: EnableTaskList
parameters.description: Enables checkbox task lists. Default true.

parameters.name: EnableMarkdownShortcuts
parameters.description: Enables Markdown-style typing shortcuts (e.g. ## + space → heading, - + space → bullet list). Default true.

parameters.name: EnableAiActions
parameters.description: Enables the selection-driven AI action menu (requires OnAiAction to actually produce results). Default false.

parameters.name: EnableBubbleMenu
parameters.description: Enables the floating formatting menu that appears over a text selection. Default true.

parameters.name: EnableDragHandle
parameters.description: Enables the block drag handle for reordering content by dragging. Default true.

parameters.name: MaxLength
parameters.description: Maximum character count enforced by the editor. Unbounded when null.

parameters.name: AllowWordImport
parameters.description: Enables importing a .docx file (via the toolbar) and converting it to editor content — in-browser by default, or via OnWordImportRequested for server-side conversion. Default false.

parameters.name: MaxWordImportBytes
parameters.description: Maximum size, in bytes, of a Word document accepted by the in-browser import path. Defaults to 8 MB. Larger files are refused before being read into memory and surfaced to the user via WordImportError. Set explicitly when consumers expect large documents and the deployment can afford the memory.

parameters.name: OnImageRequested
parameters.description: Resolves a picked image into a URL (or data URI). Receives file metadata from JS; consumer is expected to upload the file out-of-band (e.g. via a paired InputFile) and return a final URL. If null, images fall back to base64.

parameters.name: OnAiAction
parameters.description: Selection-driven AI actions. Receives the action id and selected plain text; returns replacement HTML to be inserted in place of the selection.

parameters.name: OnWordImportRequested
parameters.description: Optional override for Word import. Receives the picked file payload (filename + bytes) and returns HTML to replace the editor content. When NOT set, the file is converted in-browser via WordImporter (Mammoth runs inside the WASM bundle), so the demo works on static hosting with no server. Set this when you want server-side conversion (better fidelity for complex docs).

parameters.name: OnInitError
parameters.description: Raised when the underlying JS editor fails to initialize (or re-initialize after a Triggers change), with the exception message. The component also shows its own recoverable error banner with a Retry button regardless.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the editor's root wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the editor's root wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised on every content change with the current HTML.

events.name: OnInitError
events.description: Raised when the underlying JS editor fails to initialize (or re-initialize after a Triggers change), with the exception message. The component also shows its own recoverable error banner with a Retry button regardless.

enums.name: RichTextToolbarMode
enums.description: Legacy toolbar mode — kept so existing call sites compile.

enums.name: EditorToolbarPreset
enums.description: Toolbar density presets for RichTextEditor.

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: The actions listed in the menu (e.g. Improve, Shorten, Expand). Falls back to LocalizedDefault when null.

parameters.name: OnAction
parameters.description: Raised when an action is picked, with the chosen AiAction. The caller is expected to run it against the editor's current selection.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

events.name: OnAction
events.description: Raised when an action is picked, with the chosen AiAction. The caller is expected to run it against the editor's current selection.

parameters.name: EnableAiActions
parameters.description: Shows a trailing AI-actions button that raises OnAiMenuToggled instead of a formatting command.

parameters.name: OnCommand
parameters.description: Raised with the editor command name (bold, italic, underline, or link) when a formatting button is clicked.

parameters.name: OnAiMenuToggled
parameters.description: Raised when the AI-actions button is clicked (only rendered when EnableAiActions is true). Consumers typically open an AiActionMenu in response.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

events.name: OnCommand
events.description: Raised with the editor command name (bold, italic, underline, or link) when a formatting button is clicked.

events.name: OnAiMenuToggled
events.description: Raised when the AI-actions button is clicked (only rendered when EnableAiActions is true). Consumers typically open an AiActionMenu in response.

parameters.name: Preset
parameters.description: Which button set to render: Minimal (bold/italic/link/undo-redo), Standard (adds headings, lists, quote, more marks), or Full (adds paragraph style, tables, images, word import, AI actions, clear formatting).

parameters.name: Active
parameters.description: The editor's current formatting state (which marks/nodes are active at the cursor, and undo/redo availability), used to highlight the matching buttons.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables every toolbar button.

parameters.name: AllowWordImport
parameters.description: Shows the "Import .docx" button on the Full preset.

parameters.name: EnableAiActions
parameters.description: Shows the AI-actions button on the Full preset.

parameters.name: OnCommand
parameters.description: Raised with the editor command name and its optional argument (e.g. ("setHeading", 1)) when a toolbar button is clicked.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

events.name: OnCommand
events.description: Raised with the editor command name and its optional argument (e.g. ("setHeading", 1)) when a toolbar button is clicked.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: Element id for the listbox root, so an owning trigger input can point aria-controls/aria-activedescendant at it.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The suggestion items to list. An empty or null list renders a localized "no results" message instead.

parameters.name: SelectedIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of the currently highlighted item. Keyboard navigation (Up/Down/Enter/Escape) is the caller's responsibility — this component only renders the highlight and reacts to pointer interaction.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Custom render fragment for a row's content, receiving the item. When null, renders the item's icon, label, and subtitle.

parameters.name: OnPick
parameters.description: Raised with the item the user clicked (or activated).

parameters.name: OnHover
parameters.description: Raised with the item's index when the pointer hovers a row, so a caller can sync SelectedIndex to mouse movement.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label for the listbox. Falls back to the localized "Editor.Suggestions" string when null.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

events.name: OnPick
events.description: Raised with the item the user clicked (or activated).

events.name: OnHover
events.description: Raised with the item's index when the pointer hovers a row, so a caller can sync SelectedIndex to mouse movement.

RingProgress.name: RingProgress
RingProgress.description: Circular determinate progress ring with optional centre label or custom content.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The progress value, clamped to 0–100. NaN is treated as 0.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Diameter of the ring in pixels (both width and height of the SVG). Default 64.

parameters.name: Thickness
parameters.description: Stroke width of the ring in pixels. Default 6.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Theme color token for the filled arc, resolved as var(--color-{Color}). Default "primary".

parameters.name: TrackColor
parameters.description: Theme color token for the unfilled track, resolved as var(--color-{TrackColor}). Default "muted".

parameters.name: ShowLabel
parameters.description: Shows the rounded percentage as centered text. Ignored when LabelContent is set.

parameters.name: LabelContent
parameters.description: Custom content rendered centered inside the ring, replacing the built-in percentage label.

parameters.name: RoundedCaps
parameters.description: Uses rounded (stroke-linecap: round) instead of squared (butt) ends on the filled arc. Default true.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer container.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<RingProgress Value="25" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="50" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="75" ShowLabel="true" />

examples.title: Sizes

<RingProgress Value="65" Size="64" ShowLabel="true" />
<RingProgress Value="65" Size="96" ShowLabel="true" />

examples.title: Colors
examples.code:

<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="success" />
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="warning" />
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="destructive" />

parameters.name: Top
parameters.description: Pads the top edge with env(safe-area-inset-top) (notch/status bar). Default true.

parameters.name: Bottom
parameters.description: Pads the bottom edge with env(safe-area-inset-bottom) (home indicator). Default true.

parameters.name: Left
parameters.description: Pads the left edge with env(safe-area-inset-left) (landscape notch). Default false.

parameters.name: Right
parameters.description: Pads the right edge with env(safe-area-inset-right) (landscape notch). Default false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div, additive to the base lumeo-safe-area class.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. A caller-supplied class/style here is merged additively rather than overriding the computed inset padding.

examples.title: Sticky bottom tab bar (realistic example)

parameters.name: Events
parameters.description: The calendar's events. Controlled when EventsChanged has a delegate — the caller owns the collection and must apply drag/resize/click edits back onto it; otherwise the component manages its own working copy internally, seeded from this value.

parameters.name: EventsChanged
parameters.description: Invoked with the updated event collection after a drag, resize, or other edit. Binding this makes Events controlled.

parameters.name: InitialView

Note: this uses Lumeo's color-coding fallback, NOT FullCalendar Premium resource lanes (which require a paid FullCalendar Premium license not bundled here).

parameters.name: EventClassNames

parameters.name: EventColor

parameters.name: OnInitError
parameters.description: Raised when JS initialization fails (e.g. CDN down, FullCalendar threw). The argument is the error message. When raised the component renders an error card instead of the calendar.

@code {
    private bool _open;
    private SchedulerDateRange? _range;
    private string _title = "";
    private List<SchedulerEvent> _events = new();

    void HandleDateSelect(SchedulerDateRange r) { _range = r; _open = true; }
    void Add() {
        _events = _events.Append(new SchedulerEvent(
            Id: Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"),
            Title: _title,
            Start: _range!.Start,
            End: _range.End,
            AllDay: _range.AllDay
        )).ToList();
        _open = false;
    }
}

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the scrollable region. Per the WAI-ARIA APG scrollable region practice, the viewport itself carries tabindex="0" unconditionally (verified: ScrollArea previously had no tab stop and no key handler of its own, so a mouse-only user could not reach it via Tab at all — WCAG 2.1.1). ScrollArea still has no key handler today — it is a Tab stop only, not keyboard-interactive; native scroll-on-focus is the browser's own behaviour, not something this component wires up. Whether the content actually overflows depends on runtime layout/viewport size that can change after mount, so the pattern keeps the tab stop present unconditionally rather than trying to detect overflow via JS; a non-overflowing ScrollArea is simply a harmless no-op tab stop, same as the W3C APG example. Set this whenever the region's purpose isn't already conveyed by a preceding heading/label so AT announces something useful when focus lands here.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: When the scrollbars become visible. Mirrors Radix UI's ScrollArea type: Auto (default) — bars show only when the content overflows. Always — bars are always visible and the gutter is reserved (no layout shift when content grows). Scroll — bars show while scrolling. Hover — bars show on hover / focus within. Implemented cross-browser via the lumeo-scrollarea CSS (Firefox scrollbar-* + WebKit pseudo-elements). Firefox exposes only a thin bar, so the Hover/Scroll auto-hide granularity is a WebKit/overlay enhancement that degrades gracefully to a persistent thin bar there.

parameters.name: FocusRingGutter
parameters.description: Adds a 4px inline gutter (-mx-1 px-1, net-zero layout) so a focusable control's focus ring isn't clipped at the left/right edge. Per CSS spec overflow-auto on one axis promotes the other to auto too, so a full-width <Input> flush against the scroll box loses its box-shadow ring on that edge. Opt-in (default false) because the negative margin makes the element 4px wider per side — only enable when the scroll area holds focusable controls (forms, menus), not when it wraps edge-aligned content like a table.

enums.name: ScrollAreaType
enums.description: Scrollbar visibility strategy. See Type.

parameters.name: ValueChanged

parameters.name: Options

parameters.name: Block

parameters.name: Density

events.name: ValueChanged

records.name: SegmentedItemEntry
records.signature: SegmentedItemEntry(string Value, string ItemId, bool Disabled)
records.description: One entry in the ordered segment registry: the segment's current Value, its STABLE ItemId (the key for every registry mutation — survives a Value change) and its current Disabled state.

records.name: SegmentedContext
records.signature:
SegmentedContext(
        string? Value,
        EventCallback<string> Select,
        Func<bool, string> GetItemClasses,
        Func<string, bool, string> GetTabIndex,
        IReadOnlyList<SegmentedItemEntry> Items,
        Action<string, string, bool> RegisterItem,
        Action<string, string, string, bool> ReplaceItem,
        Action<string> UnregisterItem,
        // The role=radiogroup element id — the anchor for the DOM-order roving-nav
        // probe (Interop.GetOrderedDescendantIds) so arrow-key order tracks the live
        // DOM after a keyed reorder / middle-insert of SegmentedItem children.
        string ContainerId)
records.description: Cascading context for compound-mode SegmentedItem children — they read the active value + the parent's item-class function (so style stays consistent with Options-mode), register / re-key / unregister themselves in the shared ordered registry (for roving tabindex + arrow navigation) keyed by their stable ItemId, and invoke Select on click.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value selected when this item is clicked. Must match one of the parent Segmented's expected values.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The segment's visible label.

parameters.name: IconContent

Select.name: Select
Select.description: Native-feeling styled dropdown with search and groups.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Composition-mode content: a SelectTrigger plus a SelectContent with SelectItem children. Required even when using the data-bound Items parameter.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected option's value (single-select mode). Use Values instead when Multiple is true.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the selected value changes (single-select mode). Binding it makes Value controlled.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Popover open state. Bind via @bind-Open when the Select lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active validation) — otherwise a parameter cascade can close the popover mid-click. In the bound (controlled) mode the parent owns state and the popover survives re-renders. When unbound, the component still functions but is vulnerable to the cascade-close race; binding is the recommended pattern.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the popover opens or closes (click, Escape, click-outside, or a selection in single-select mode). Bind alongside Open to control it.

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for Open.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged.

parameters.name: Searchable
parameters.description: Shows a search input at the top of the popover that filters options by display text.

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Enables multi-select mode: selecting toggles membership in Values instead of replacing Value, and the trigger shows tags for each selection.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The selected option values (multi-select mode, used when Multiple is true).

parameters.name: ValuesChanged
parameters.description: Fired when the selection changes in multi-select mode. Binding it makes Values controlled.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows a clear button that resets Value/Values to null when a selection exists.

parameters.name: Creatable
parameters.description: Allows the user to add a new option by typing text that doesn't match any existing item and confirming — fires OnCreate and selects the new value.

parameters.name: OnCreate
parameters.description: Fired with the typed text when the user creates a new option via Creatable.

parameters.name: MaxDisplayTags
parameters.description: Maximum number of selection tags shown in the trigger before the rest are collapsed into a "+N" summary (multi-select mode). Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger, preventing the popover from opening.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows a loading indicator in place of the option list, for options that load asynchronously.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering an asterisk next to Label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state. Also set implicitly when a wrapping FormField reports a validation error.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when Invalid is true (and the select is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there is no error (and the select is not nested inside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label rendered above the trigger. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label instead.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The form field name, forwarded for consistency with other form controls (not rendered directly by this component).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes merged onto the Select's wrapper element. Consistent with every other form component per the library's base API contract.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Convenience placeholder shown by SelectTrigger when no value is selected and the trigger doesn't set its own Placeholder. Lets consumers write <Select Placeholder="…"> instead of threading it through the trigger — matching DatePicker / TimePicker / Combobox's top-level placeholder ergonomics.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the select's trigger button on first render. See Input.AutoFocus — the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM, this parameter uses FocusElement after mount.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the wrapper div.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Optional data source. When set, SelectContent renders options from this list instead of ChildContent.

parameters.name: ItemValue
parameters.description: Extracts the string value for each item. Defaults to ToString().

parameters.name: ItemText
parameters.description: Extracts the display label for each item. Defaults to ItemValue when null.

parameters.name: ItemGroup
parameters.description: Optional group key extractor. When set, options are grouped under sticky headers.

parameters.name: ItemDisabled
parameters.description: Optional per-item disabled predicate.

parameters.name: ItemDescription
parameters.description: Optional per-item secondary line (description) extractor. When set and ItemTemplate is null, the default item renderer shows the description in a smaller, muted line below the label.

parameters.name: ItemIcon
parameters.description: Optional per-item leading icon. Receives the raw item object and returns a RenderFragment (typically a single <Icon> or <SvgGlyph>). Rendered before the label when ItemTemplate is null. Return null per item to mix iconed and non-iconed rows.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: When true and Items is set, uses Blazor's Virtualize component for the option list.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated pixel height of each option row used by the Virtualize component. Default 36.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Fired when the selected value changes (single-select mode). Binding it makes Value controlled.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fired when the popover opens or closes (click, Escape, click-outside, or a selection in single-select mode). Bind alongside Open to control it.

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Deprecated alias for OpenChanged.

events.name: ValuesChanged
events.description: Fired when the selection changes in multi-select mode. Binding it makes Values controlled.

events.name: OnCreate
events.description: Fired with the typed text when the user creates a new option via Creatable.

records.name: SelectContext
records.signature:
SelectContext(
        string? Value, bool IsOpen, bool Searchable, string SearchText,
        bool Multiple, List<string>? Values, bool IsLoading, bool Disabled, bool Clearable, bool Creatable, int MaxDisplayTags,
        EventCallback<string> OnSelect, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, EventCallback<string> OnSearch,
        EventCallback OnClear, EventCallback<string> OnCreateItem,
        string WrapperId, string ContentId, string TriggerId, int FocusedIndex, string? FocusedItemId, string? FocusedItemValue,
        EventCallback<int> SetFocusedIndex,
        EventCallback<string> OnTypeahead,
        Action<string, string, string, bool, RenderFragment?> RegisterItem, Action<string> UnregisterItem,
        bool Invalid, bool Required,
        // Data-bound mode params (null when composition mode)
        IEnumerable<object>? Items,
        Func<object, string> ItemValue,
        Func<object, string>? ItemText,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemGroup,
        Func<object, bool>? ItemDisabled,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemDescription,
        Func<object, RenderFragment?>? ItemIcon,
        RenderFragment<object>? ItemTemplate,
        bool Virtualize,
        float ItemSize)

gotchas: Data-bound mode (the Items parameter) still requires <SelectTrigger /> and <SelectContent /> children — a bare <Select Items="..." /> with no children shows only an empty field. Map items with ItemValue/ItemText; items are typed as object, so the data-bound Select is not generic.

parameters.name: Placeholder

parameters.name: Class

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Axis the rule is drawn along: Horizontal renders a full-width line, Vertical a full-height line. Defaults to Horizontal.

parameters.name: Decorative
parameters.description: When true (the default), the separator is purely visual and exposes role="none" with no orientation — assistive tech skips it, matching Radix's decorative default. Set to false for a semantic separator that conveys structure (e.g. between menu groups or list sections): the element then carries role="separator" plus an aria-orientation matching Orientation. The implicit ARIA orientation of a separator is horizontal, so a vertical one must declare it explicitly.

parameters.name: Inset
parameters.description: When true, the rule is inset from the container edges (a 0.75rem margin on the long axis: mx-3 when horizontal, my-3 when vertical) instead of spanning the full length — the Material / MudBlazor "inset divider" look, softer than an edge-to-edge line. Default false.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Optional label rendered centered on the line (horizontal orientation only), producing a "text divider" (two rule segments flanking the text) instead of a plain line.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the separator element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the separator element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger and content that make up the sheet (typically a SheetTrigger plus a SheetContent).

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the sheet panel is open. Controlled together with OpenChanged.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, swipe, backdrop click, or a SheetClose trigger).

parameters.name: OnBeforeClose
parameters.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, X button, or a SheetClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Obsolete alias for Open; will be removed in a future release.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Obsolete alias for OpenChanged; will be removed in a future release.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, swipe, backdrop click, or a SheetClose trigger).

events.name: OnBeforeClose
events.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, X button, or a SheetClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Obsolete alias for OpenChanged; will be removed in a future release.

records.name: SheetContext
records.signature: SheetContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string TitleId, string DescriptionId, Func<string, Task<bool>> TryDismiss, SheetDescriptionRegistry DescriptionRegistry = null!, Action RegisterDescription = null!, Action UnregisterDescription = null!)

examples.title: Default (Right)
examples.code:
<Sheet @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Sheet</Button>
    </SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent>
        <SheetHeader>
            <SheetTitle>Edit Profile</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>Make changes to your profile here.</SheetDescription>
        </SheetHeader>
        <Grid Columns="4" Gap="4" Class="items-center py-4">
            <Label Class="text-right">Name</Label>
            <Input Class="col-span-3" Value="John Doe" />
        </Grid>
        <SheetFooter>
            <SheetClose>
                <Button>Save Changes</Button>
            </SheetClose>
        </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
}

            <SheetTitle>Top Sheet</SheetTitle>

        </SheetHeader>

</Sheet>

<Sheet @bind-Open="_isLeftOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>

</Sheet>

examples.title: Sizes
Prevent Close
examples.code:
<Sheet @bind-Open="_preventSheetOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Protected Sheet</Button>
    </SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent PreventClose="true">
        <SheetHeader>
            <SheetTitle>Protected Sheet</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>This sheet cannot be dismissed by clicking outside.</SheetDescription>
        </SheetHeader>
        <Stack Gap="4" Class="py-4">
            <Button OnClick="@(() => _preventSheetOpen = false)">Close Sheet</Button>
        </Stack>
    </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

@code {
    private bool _preventSheetOpen;
}

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content (typically close-button label or icon markup).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger's root element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The panel's content (typically a SheetHeader, body, and SheetFooter).

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Edge of the viewport the panel slides in from / anchors to. Defaults to Right. Mirrored under RTL so a "Right" sheet visually anchors to the start edge.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Panel width (Left/Right sides) or height (Top/Bottom sides). Defaults to Default. Superseded by SizePreset when that is set.

parameters.name: SizePreset
parameters.description: Alternative to Size that accepts the unified Size token. When set (non-null), wins over Size. Mapping: Sm→Sm, Md→Default, Lg→Lg, Xl→Xl. Full has no Size equivalent (Full is a layout intent, not a scale) — set Size directly for that case. Closes the Lumeo.Size ↔ per-component-enum overlap from #87.2.

parameters.name: Animation
parameters.description: How the sheet enters/leaves. Slide (default) animates from the configured Side. Fade uses a simple opacity tween — useful in dense forms where popovers and animations compete. None disables the animation entirely.

parameters.name: PreventClose
parameters.description: When true, disables the backdrop click, Escape key and (per ShowCloseButton) default X-button dismiss paths, so the sheet can only be closed programmatically.

parameters.name: ShowCloseButton
parameters.description: Whether the top-end close (X) button renders. null (default) keeps the legacy coupling — X shows whenever PreventClose is false. true forces the X on a modal sheet (backdrop/Escape stay disabled; the X routes through the dismiss guard); false hides it. Mirrors OverlayOptions.ShowCloseButton for service sheets.

parameters.name: SwipeToClose
parameters.description: When true, the sheet can be dismissed by swiping in the direction opposite to its Side (e.g. swipe-down on a Bottom sheet). Default false to avoid conflicts with scrollable content. Wire to true only when the sheet's content fits without scrolling.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel.

parameters.name: ZIndex
parameters.description: Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel (ignored when rendered as a nested passthrough inside an OverlayProvider shell).

enums.name: SheetSize
enums.description: Sheet sizes. Full is layout-intent (entire viewport), not a scale value, so this enum is intentionally NOT replaced by Size in 3.0.

gotchas: No inner scroll container by default — the panel is a flex-col, so a long body overflows the viewport. Wrap the scrollable region in flex-1 overflow-y-auto, or use OverlayForm which bakes that in.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The description text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-describedby on the panel once this component registers with the sheet.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description:
Additional CSS classes merged onto the description

.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description:
Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the description

.

parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the footer container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Header content, typically a SheetTitle and SheetDescription.

parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the header container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the header container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The title text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-labelledby on the panel (the accessible name of the role="dialog" sheet).

parameters.name: Class

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the title <h2>.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Prefer a <button> child (a <Button Href> link activates on Enter only, not Space). Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger wrapper (or the TriggerSlot's class when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger wrapper (or merges into the TriggerSlot's attributes when AsChild is set).

Sidebar.description: Collapsible app sidebar with groups, menu, and trigger.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Typically SidebarHeader, SidebarContent, and SidebarFooter.

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Which edge the sidebar anchors to. Only Left and Right are supported; Top/Bottom fall through to the Left default.

parameters.name: Class

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root aside element.

examples.title: Side — interactive
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_sidebarSideSel" Options="_sidebarSideOptions" />
<SidebarProvider>
    <SidebarComponent Side="@_activeSide">
        <SidebarHeader>...</SidebarHeader>
        <SidebarContent>...</SidebarContent>
    </SidebarComponent>
    <main class="flex-1 p-6">

</SidebarProvider>

@code {
    private string _sidebarSideSel = "Left";
    private Lumeo.Side _activeSide =>
        Enum.Parse<Lumeo.Side>(_sidebarSideSel);
    private List<Segmented.SegmentedOption> _sidebarSideOptions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Left", Value = "Left" },
        new() { Label = "Right", Value = "Right" },
    };
}

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Render the top divider. Default true. Set false for a seamless footer without a rule — replaces the consumer-side !border-t-0 override.

parameters.name: Class

parameters.name: Bordered

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Fallback label content used when IconContent is null (otherwise IconContent/LabelContent render instead).

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: LabelContent
parameters.description: Label slot. Named LabelContent to avoid shadowing the <Label> component.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: The link's navigation target.

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Hint shown via the Lumeo <Tooltip> when the rail is collapsed (icon-only). Renders as a styled, accessible tooltip — not the native browser title — and stays hidden while the rail is expanded (the label is visible then).

parameters.name: IsActive
parameters.description: Marks this button as the current page: adds aria-current="page" and highlights it with the accent background.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the inner a element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the inner a element.

parameters.name: ChildContent

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root li element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root li element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The sidebar layout (typically a SidebarComponent plus the main content area) that consumes the cascaded SidebarState.

parameters.name: IsCollapsed
parameters.description: Whether the sidebar is collapsed. Pair with IsCollapsedChanged for two-way binding; leave unbound for uncontrolled use (state is then self-managed and, with PersistCollapsed, persisted to localStorage).

parameters.name: IsCollapsedChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the collapsed state changes (via Toggle or the keyboard shortcut).

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Layout strategy for the sidebar when collapsed. Defaults to Push.

parameters.name: MobileSheet
parameters.description: When true, the sidebar renders as an off-canvas sheet (slide-in over a dismissible scrim) on mobile viewports (< md), regardless of Variant. On larger viewports it keeps its configured variant. Collapsed acts as the sheet's closed state; toggling opens it. Opt-in (default false) so existing layouts are unchanged. (#241)

parameters.name: ToggleShortcut
parameters.description: Keyboard shortcut that toggles the sidebar, in the IKeyboardShortcutService combo format (e.g. "ctrl+b", "meta+b"). Registered on first render and released on dispose. Defaults to "ctrl+b" which — matching shadcn's (metaKey || ctrlKey) && key === "b" — fires on both Ctrl+B and Cmd+B. Override with a different combo, or set to null/empty to disable the shortcut entirely.

parameters.name: PersistCollapsed
parameters.description: When true, the collapsed / expanded state survives page reloads — the provider reads IsCollapsed from localStorage[PersistenceKey] on first render and writes back on every change. Falls back to the parameter value when JS is unavailable (SSR, prerender, JSDisconnectedException). Opt-in to keep existing consumers' behaviour untouched.

parameters.name: PersistenceKey
parameters.description: LocalStorage key used when PersistCollapsed is true. Override to scope a per-route or per-tenant sidebar so multiple sidebars on the same origin don't clobber each other's state.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper div element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root wrapper div element.

events.name: IsCollapsedChanged
events.description: Raised when the collapsed state changes (via Toggle or the keyboard shortcut).

enums.name: SidebarVariant
enums.description: Layout strategy for the sidebar. Push — collapses to zero width, pushing main content to the edge. Overlay — floats above content with a dismissible scrim. Icon — collapses to a narrow icon rail that stays put until toggled back. MiniRail — same icon-rail width when collapsed, but expands to full width on hover or keyboard focus and collapses again on leave. Material’s standard collapsed-sidebar pattern; uses Toggle() to pin open.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div element.

parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root div element.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button element.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The signature as a data URL (PNG or SVG, per Format). Controlled when ValueChanged is bound — a change to this value repaints the canvas; an echo of the component's own emitted value is recognised and skipped to preserve the in-progress stroke.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Invoked with the updated data URL after each stroke (debounced) and on clear.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: Canvas width in px. Default: 500. Changing this at runtime resets and repaints the drawing surface.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Canvas height in px. Default: 200. Changing this at runtime resets and repaints the drawing surface.

parameters.name: StrokeColor
parameters.description: Stroke color for new drawing. Default: currentColor.

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Stroke width in px for new drawing. Default: 2.0.

parameters.name: BackgroundColor
parameters.description: Canvas background color. Default: transparent.

parameters.name: ShowClearButton
parameters.description: Shows the Clear button (disabled when the pad is already empty). Default: true.

parameters.name: ShowDownloadButton
parameters.description: Shows a Download button that saves the signature as a file in Format.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Export format for the emitted data URL. "png" is the default (universal browser support, transparent backgrounds). "svg" produces a real vector export: the JS pad records each pointer path and replays it as <path> elements, so the signature scales crisply at any size. (A signature loaded from an existing raster data URL has no vector data to export and falls back to PNG.)

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables drawing — the canvas ignores pointer input and controls are inert.

parameters.name: OnSign
parameters.description: Invoked after a stroke completes, alongside ValueChanged.

parameters.name: OnClear
parameters.description: Invoked after the pad is cleared, alongside ValueChanged.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text shown centered over the canvas while empty. Default: "Sign here".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the labelled role="group" wrapper.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Invoked with the updated data URL after each stroke (debounced) and on clear.

events.name: OnSign
events.description: Invoked after a stroke completes, alongside ValueChanged.

events.name: OnClear
events.description: Invoked after the pad is cleared, alongside ValueChanged.

Slider.name: Slider
Slider.description: Range slider with single and dual thumb modes.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, rendering a trailing asterisk on the label and setting aria-required. Default false.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state and aria-invalid, independent of any ancestor FormField. Default false.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error text shown below the control when invalid and not inside a FormField.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the control when not invalid and not inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the control (unless the control is inside a FormField, which renders its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name attribute for form submission (single-thumb mode only).

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current value (single-thumb mode), or the start-thumb value when IsRange is true.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for Value.

parameters.name: IsRange
parameters.description: Renders two thumbs (a range slider) instead of one. Default false.

parameters.name: ValueEnd
parameters.description: The end-thumb value. Only meaningful when IsRange is true.

parameters.name: ValueEndChanged
parameters.description: Two-way callback for ValueEnd.

parameters.name: MinStepsBetweenThumbs
parameters.description: Minimum permitted distance between the two range thumbs, expressed in Step units (so the absolute gap is MinStepsBetweenThumbs * Step). Mirrors Radix's minStepsBetweenThumbs. The default of 0 lets the thumbs meet but — unlike before — they can no longer cross past each other. Only meaningful when IsRange is true.

parameters.name: Min
parameters.description: Minimum permitted value. Default 0.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: Maximum permitted value. Default 100.

parameters.name: Step
parameters.description: Increment the thumb(s) snap to. Non-positive or non-finite values fall back to 1. Default 1.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the slider. Default false.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Track orientation, "Horizontal" (default) or "Vertical".

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name exposed via aria-label on the underlying range input. Required for WCAG compliance when the slider is not visually labelled by adjacent text connected via for/htmlFor. For range sliders (IsRange=true) the end handle's aria-label is automatically suffixed with "(end)".

parameters.name: ShowTooltip
parameters.description: Shows a floating value tooltip above/beside the thumb while hovering, dragging, or focused. Default false.

parameters.name: Marks
parameters.description: Explicit tick/label positions to render along the track; defaults to just Min and Max when null.

parameters.name: ShowTicks
parameters.description: Renders a small tick mark at each position in Marks (or the Min/Max default). Default false.

parameters.name: FormatTooltip
parameters.description: Custom formatter for the tooltip/mark text and aria-valuetext; when null, values are formatted with "G" under Culture.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Culture used for the default tooltip/mark value formatting. When null (default) falls back to CurrentCulture. Ignored when FormatTooltip is supplied.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the slider's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the slider's root element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for Value.

events.name: ValueEndChanged
events.description: Two-way callback for ValueEnd.
